156public class CommandStrParser {
157
158 public enum Energy {COULOMB,L2,LOG,MIN_DIST}; // for 'PointEnergies'
159
160 public static PostFactory pF; // 'PostFactory' updated externally.
161 // TODO: make pF safer for threads
162 public static final double LAYOUT_THRESHOLD=.00001; // layouts quality
163
169 public static int jexecute(String s) {
170 return jexecute(CirclePack.cpb.getActivePackData(),s);
171 }
172
199 public static int jexecute(PackData packData, String cmdstr) {
200
201 // initial checks
202 if (cmdstr==null)
203 return 0;
204 if (cmdstr.contains("-p"))
205 throw new ParserException("'jexecute': '-p' flag "
206 + "should have been handled before the call");
207
208 // catch variables, reconstitute parens/brackets, etc.
209 Vector<String> allitems=StringUtil.string2vec(cmdstr,true);
210 String cmd=(String)allitems.get(0);
211
212 // split off processing for query messages
213 if (cmd.charAt(0)=='?') {
214 return QueryParser.processQuery(packData,allitems,true);
215 }
216
217 /* NOTE: Vector 'flagSegs' will hold only the flag
218 * strings occurring after the command --- the
219 * command itself is 'cmd' */
220 allitems.remove(0); // 'cmd' is separated off
221 Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs=StringUtil.flagSeg(allitems);
222 Vector<String> items=new Vector<String>(0);
223 int count=0;
224 if (flagSegs.size()>0)
225 items=flagSegs.get(0);
226
227 // 'fix' is deprecated
228 if (cmd.startsWith("fix"))
229 cmd=new String("layout");
230
231 // "Cleanse" all packings
232 if (cmd.startsWith("Clean")) {
233 for (int i=0;i<CPBase.NUM_PACKS;i++) {
234 PackData pdata=CPBase.packings[i];
235 CPdrawing cpd=CPBase.cpDrawing[i];
236 // TODO: want to white out underlying canvas to avoid flashing
237 if (pdata.status) {
238 // trash any extensions
239 pdata.packExtensions=new Vector<PackExtender>(2);
240 // put new packing in place
241 PackData newP=CPBase.packings[i]=new PackData(i);
242 newP.cpDrawing=CPBase.cpDrawing[i];
243 newP.cpDrawing.setPackData(newP);
244 newP.cpDrawing.updateXtenders();
245 cpd.emptyScreen();
246 cpd.updateXtenders();
247 count++;
248 }
249 }
250 PackControl.mapPairFrame.setTeleState(true);
251 return 1;
252 }
253
254 if (cmd.startsWith("act")) {
255 try {
256 int newpnum=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
257 if (newpnum<0 || newpnum>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS)
258 return 0;
259 if (CPBase.GUImode!=0)
260 PackControl.switchActivePack(newpnum);
261 else
262 ShellControl.switchActivePack(newpnum);
263 return 1;
264 } catch (Exception ex) {
265 return 0;
266 }
267 }
268
269 // Change MainFrame or PairedFrame sizes
270 // ========= chgScreen/Paired =======
271 if (cmd.startsWith("chg")) {
272 int widehigh=200; // safety default
273 try {
274 widehigh=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
275 } catch (Exception ex) {
276 widehigh=200;
277 }
278
279 // TODO-layout: used to do 'pack()' here.
280
281 // reset all Main canvas size, hence all BufferedImage's
282 if (cmd.charAt(3)=='S') {
283 if (widehigh<PackControl.MinActiveSize)
284 widehigh=PackControl.MinActiveSize;
285 if (widehigh>PackControl.MaxActiveSize)
286 widehigh=PackControl.MaxActiveSize;
287 MainFrame.setCanvasDim(widehigh,widehigh);
288 PackControl.activeFrame.layMeOut();
289 return 1;
290 }
291
292 // else reset the PairedFrame canvas sizes
293 if (widehigh<PackControl.MinMapSize) widehigh=PackControl.MinMapSize;
294 if (widehigh>PackControl.MaxMapSize) widehigh=PackControl.MaxMapSize;
295 PackControl.mapPairFrame.layMeOut(new Dimension(widehigh,widehigh));
296 return 1;
297 } // done with screen size changes
298
299 /* =============================================================
300 * First, check for certain commands with
301 * multiple names
302 */
303
304 //
305 // ========= read_CT ====== (tiling of compact surface, 7/2017)
306 // Intended to read "glass" combinatorial data involving positions of
307 // atoms or reduced networks on a torus. For "jammed" Idea is
308 // to read flowers and create a conventional packing, putting
309 // a barycenter in each tile, and
310 // from that creating a standard 'tiling', as via the "pave" command.
311 if (cmd.startsWith("read_CT") || cmd.startsWith("Read_CT")) {
312
313 boolean debug=false;
314 int sz=items.size();
315 if (sz==0)
316 return 0;
317
318 // first, get the edges
319 // file name should be last in last flag segment
320 String filename=flagSegs.lastElement().lastElement();
321 File dir=CPFileManager.PackingDirectory;
322 if (cmd.charAt(0)=='R') {
323 if (filename.startsWith("~/"))
324 filename=new String(CPFileManager.HomeDirectory+
325 File.separator+filename.substring(2));
326 dir=new File(filename);
327 filename=dir.getName();
328 dir=new File(dir.getParent());
329 }
330
331 // -s flag means to read from script, -q{n} flag says to also
332 // create its simple packing in pack n (though this depends
333 // on the tiling's dual being trivalent).
334 boolean script_flag=false;
335 // if this is set to legal pack, store simple pack there
336 int simplepack=-1;
337 Iterator<Vector<String>> fseg=flagSegs.iterator();
338 while (fseg.hasNext()) {
339 try {
340 items=fseg.next();
341 String str=(String)items.get(0);
342
343 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
344 if (str.equals("-s")) {
345 script_flag=true;
346 }
347 else if (str.startsWith("-q")) {
348 int qnum=StringUtil.qFlagParse(str);
349 if (qnum<0) {
350 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Failed to create "
351 + "simple packing in 'read_CT'");
352 }
353 else
354 simplepack=qnum;
355 }
356 }
357 } catch(Exception ex) {
358 throw new ParserException("flag error :"+ex.getMessage());
359 }
360 } // done getting flags
361
362 BufferedReader fp=null;
363 fp=CPFileManager.openReadFP(dir,filename,script_flag);
364
365 // TODO: should allow file to be a list of pairs forming the edges
366
367 // get the number of vertices
368 String line=StringUtil.ourNextLine(fp);
369 StringTokenizer tok = new StringTokenizer(line);
370 int tc=tok.countTokens();
371 if (tc>2) {
372 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("read_CT file '" + filename +
373 "' must start with integer 'n' (vertex count) or "+
374 " with 'CHECKCOUNT: n'");
375 try {
376 fp.close();
377 } catch(Exception cex) {}
378 return 0;
379 }
380 String kywd=tok.nextToken();
381 int vCount=0;
382 try {
383 // need to flush CHECKCOUNT, NODECOUNT, etc., look for count
384 while (vCount==0) {
385 try {
386 vCount=Integer.parseInt(kywd);
387 } catch(Exception ex) {
388 kywd=tok.nextToken();
389 }
390 }
391 } catch(Exception ex) {
392 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("'read_CT' failed to find count of nodes");
393 try {
394 fp.close();
395 } catch(Exception cex) {}
396 return 0;
397 }
398 if (vCount==0) {
399 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("'read_CT' failed to find count of nodes");
400 try {
401 fp.close();
402 } catch(Exception cex) {}
403 return 0;
404 }
405 int [][]bouquet=new int[vCount+1][];
406
407 for (int n=1;n<=vCount;n++) {
408 line = StringUtil.ourNextLine(fp);
409 try {
410 tok = new StringTokenizer(line);
411 int indx=Integer.parseInt(tok.nextToken()); // get index
412 int num=tok.countTokens(); // count the rest
413 Vector<Integer> bvec=new Vector<Integer>(1);
414// bouquet[indx]=new int[num+1];
415 for (int j=0;j<num;j++) {
416 int v = Integer.parseInt((String) tok.nextToken());
417 bvec.add(Integer.valueOf(v));
418// bouquet[indx][j]=v;
419 }
420 // close up (TODO: data should be required to close up itself)
421 if (bvec.lastElement().intValue()!=bvec.firstElement().intValue())
422 bvec.add(Integer.valueOf(bvec.get(0)));
423 bouquet[indx]=new int[bvec.size()];
424 Iterator<Integer> bit=bvec.iterator();
425 int tick=0;
426 while(bit.hasNext()) {
427 bouquet[indx][tick++]=bit.next();
428 }
429// if (bouquet[indx][num-1]!=bouquet[indx][0])
430// bouquet[indx][num]=bouquet[indx][0];
431 } catch (Exception ex) {
432 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("Usage: read_CT form "
433 + "is 'CHECKCOUNT: <n>'");
434 try {
435 fp.close();
436 } catch(Exception cex) {}
437 return 0;
438 }
439 } // end of reading flowers
440 try {
441 fp.close();
442 } catch(Exception cex) {}
443
444 // create the PackDCEL, add all normal face barycenters
445
446 // To see the faces, listed by smallest vertex; // debug=true;
447 if (debug) {
448 System.out.println("degugging 'bouquet':\n");
449 for (int v=1;v<=vCount;v++) {
450 int []flower=bouquet[v];
451 for (int j=0;j<flower.length;j++) {
452
453 // get face containing <v,w>; keep if v is smallest index
454 int []fverts=PackDCEL.getFace(bouquet, v,flower[j]);
455 int n=fverts.length;
456 for (int k=0;k<n && fverts!=null;k++)
457 if (fverts[k]<v)
458 fverts=null;
459
460 // if kept, print
461 if (fverts!=null) {
462 StringBuilder strbld=new StringBuilder();
463 for (int k=0;k<n;k++)
464 strbld.append(fverts[k]+" ");
465 strbld.append("\n");
466 System.out.println(strbld.toString());
467 }
468 }
469 }
470 }
471
472 // create pDCEL and a new 'PackData' from it
473 PackDCEL pDCEL = CombDCEL.getRawDCEL(bouquet);
474 PackData newPack=new PackData(null);
475 pDCEL.fixDCEL(newPack);
476 newPack.set_aim_default();
477 int origVCount=pDCEL.vertCount;
478
479// debugging:
480 // read_CT was specialized for working with Varda Hagh
481 // and should be moved to a flagged option in normal reading
482
483 // add a barycenter to every face (with triangular or not)
484 if (!debug) { // to avoid barycenter, debug=true;
485 ArrayList<combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace> farray=
486 new ArrayList<combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace>();
487 for (int f=1;f<=pDCEL.intFaceCount;f++)
488 farray.add(pDCEL.faces[f]);
489 int ans=RawManip.addBaryCents_raw(pDCEL,farray);
490 if (pDCEL==null || ans==0) {
491 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("Failed to get initial DCEL, "+
492 "or failed to add barycenters to faces");
493 return 0;
494 }
495 newPack.packDCEL.fixDCEL(newPack);
496 }
497
498 if (newPack!=null && newPack.status==true && newPack.nodeCount>3) {
499 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Have replaced packing with new "+
500 "one derived from '"+filename+"'.");
501 int pnum=packData.packNum;
502 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(newPack,pnum,false);
503 count=packData.nodeCount;
504 if (debug)
505 return count;
506
507 try {
508 for (int i=1;i<=origVCount;i++)
509 newPack.setVertMark(i,1);
510 } catch (Exception ex) {
511 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("error in marking network vertices");
512 }
513
514 // 'pave' to get tilings
515 TileData td=TileData.paveMe(packData,origVCount+1);
516 if (td==null) {
517 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("'pave' failed with new "
518 + "packing from 'read_CT'");
519 return 0;
520 }
521 td.setParent(packData);
522 packData.tileData=td;
523// CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData,"layout -F");
524 packData.set_aim_default();
525
526 // if -q{n} flag was set, also create simple circle packing in pn.
527 if (simplepack>=0) {
528 try {
529 newPack=TileData.tiles2simpleCP(packData.tileData);
530 newPack.set_aim_default();
531 if (newPack!=null && newPack.status) {
532 CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(newPack,simplepack,false);
533 }
534 else
535 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("failed to create "
536 + "simple packing for p"+simplepack+" in 'read_CT'");
537 } catch(CombException cex) {
538 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("The companion 'simple' "
539 + "packing in p"+simplepack+" has failed; "
540 + "the tiling dual must be trivalent for "
541 + "this to work.");
542 }
543 }
544 return count;
545 }
546
547 return 0;
548 }
549
550 // ========= read_path =====
551 if (cmd.startsWith("read_path") || cmd.startsWith("infile_path")
552 || cmd.startsWith("Read_p")) {
553
554 int sz=items.size();
555 if (sz==0) return 0;
556
557 // in script with 'infile' or flag '-s'
558 boolean script_flag=false;
559 if (cmd.charAt(0)=='i')
560 script_flag=true;
561
562 // check for script and/or append
563 boolean append=false;
564 String str=items.get(0);
565 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
566 if (str.contains("s"))
567 script_flag=true;
568 if (str.contains("a"))
569 append=true;
570 }
571
572 // file name should be last in last flag segment
573 String filename=flagSegs.lastElement().lastElement();
574 File dir=CPFileManager.PackingDirectory;
575 if (cmd.charAt(0)=='R') {
576 if (filename.startsWith("~/"))
577 filename=new String(CPFileManager.
578 HomeDirectory+File.separator+filename.substring(2));
579 dir=new File(filename);
580 filename=dir.getName();
581 dir=new File(dir.getParent());
582 }
583
584 Path2D.Double gpath=PathManager.readpath(dir,filename,script_flag);
585 if (gpath==null)
586 return 0;
587 if (append && CPBase.ClosedPath!=null) {
588 CPBase.ClosedPath.append(gpath.getPathIterator(null),false);
589 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Appended new curve to 'ClosedPath'");
590 }
591 else {
592 CPBase.ClosedPath=gpath;
593 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Loaded a new 'ClosedPath'");
594 }
595 return 1;
596 }
597
598 // ====== read === infile_read ===== Read =====
599 else if (cmd.startsWith("read") || cmd.startsWith("infile_read") ||
600 cmd.startsWith("Read")) { // read a packing file
601 // in script with 'infile' or flag '-s'
602 int sz=items.size();
603 if (sz==0)
604 return 0;
605 boolean script_flag=false;
606 if (cmd.charAt(0)=='i')
607 script_flag=true;
608 if (sz>1 && items.get(0).equals("-s")) {
609 items.remove(0);
610 script_flag=true;
611 }
612
613 String filename=StringUtil.reconItem(items);
614 Triangulation tri=null;
615 int hes=0;
616 BufferedReader fp=null;
617
618 try {
619 File dir = CPFileManager.PackingDirectory;
620 if (cmd.charAt(0) == 'R') {
621 if (filename.startsWith("~/"))
622 filename = new String(CPFileManager.HomeDirectory
623 + File.separator + filename.substring(2));
624 dir = new File(filename);
625 filename = dir.getName();
626 dir = new File(dir.getParent());
627 }
628 fp = CPFileManager.openReadFP(dir, filename, script_flag);
629 if (fp == null) {
630 throw new InOutException("failed to open " + filename
631 + ", directory " + dir.toString());
632 }
633 int rslt = ReadWrite.readpack(fp,packData,filename);
634 // DCELdebug.rededgecenters(packData.packDCEL);
635 if (rslt > 0) {
636 fp.close();
637 packData.setName(filename);
638 if (packData.getDispOptions != null)
639 CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData, "disp -wr");
640 return rslt;
641 }
642 fp.close();
643
644 // failed? try reading as triangulation; if not, try as points
645 // for delaunay triangulation
646 CirclePack.cpb.msg("");
647 fp = CPFileManager.openReadFP(dir, filename, script_flag);
648 try {
649 tri = Triangulation.readTriFile(fp);
650 } catch (Exception ex) {
651 tri = null;
652 }
653 // yes another failure?
654 if (tri==null) {
655 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Some failure in reading "+
656 filename+" as a triangulation");
657 }
658
659 fp.close();
660
661 if (tri!=null)
662 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Have read '" + filename
663 +"' as a triangulation");
664 else {
665 throw new InOutException("couldn't read " + filename
666 + " as packing/triangulation/tiling. Check format.");
667 }
668 } catch (IOException iox) {
669 try {
670 if (fp != null)
671 fp.close();
672 } catch (IOException e) {
673 }
674 throw new ParserException("trying to read " + filename + ": "
675 + iox.getMessage());
676 }
677
678 // seems we got a triangulation
679 PackData pdata=Triangulation.tri_to_Complex(tri,hes);
680 if (pdata!=null) {
681 int pnum=packData.packNum;
682 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(pdata,pnum,false);
683 packData.chooseAlpha();
684 packData.chooseGamma();
685 packData.set_aim_default();
686 packData.set_rad_default();
687 packData.activeNode = packData.getAlpha();
688 packData.setGeometry(hes);
689
690 // set/reset stuff
691 packData.packExtensions=new Vector<PackExtender>(2);
692 packData.setName(filename);
693
694 // set small constant default radius
695 double rad=0.025;
696 if (packData.hes<0) rad=1.0-Math.exp(-1.0);
697 for (int i=1;i<=packData.nodeCount;i++)
698 packData.setRadius(i,rad);
699
700 // if 'nodes' were obtained, save them, store centers
701 if (tri.nodes!=null) {
702 packData.xyzpoint=tri.nodes;
703 // set centers
704 if (hes>0) { // sphere? assume xyz info is (theta,phi,0) form
705 for (int i=1;i<=packData.nodeCount;i++) {
706 if (tri.nodes[i]!=null)
707 packData.setCenter(i,new Complex(packData.xyzpoint[i]));
708 }
709 }
710 else { // assume (x,y) is center in the plane (or disc)
711 for (int i=1;i<=packData.nodeCount;i++) {
712 if (tri.nodes[i]!=null)
713 packData.setCenter(i,
714 new Complex(tri.nodes[i].x,tri.nodes[i].y));
715 }
716 }
717 }
718
719 packData.fillcurves();
720 packData.set_plotFlags();
721 packData.cpDrawing.reset();
722 return 1;
723 }
724 return 0;
725 }
726
727 /* ==============================================
728 * call 'packExecute' for routines that require 'status' to be true
729 */
730 int retint=0;
731 if (packData.status) {
732 retint=packExecute(packData,cmd,flagSegs);
733 if (retint>0) { // found command, return if success
734 return retint;
735 }
736 }
737
738 // on reaching here, cmd wasn't found among those requiring
739 // 'status' to be set or it returned value <=0.
740 // Look for the command here:
741
742 /* **
743 * **
744 * *********** Main 'switch' to look for commands **********
745 * Note that 'items' is already set to first 'flagSeg'
746 * **
747 * **
748 */
749 switch (cmd.charAt(0)) {
750 case 'a':
751 {
752
753 // TODO: should put more work in a separate method
754 // =========== adjoin ==========
755 if (cmd.startsWith("adjoin")) {
756 // one seg: p1 p2 v1 v2 n or p1 p2 v1 v2 (v1 w)
757 int pnum1=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
758 int pnum2=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(1));
759
760 if (pnum1<0 || pnum1>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS
761 || !CPBase.cpDrawing[pnum1].getPackData().status
762 || pnum2<0 || pnum2>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS
763 || !CPBase.cpDrawing[pnum2].getPackData().status)
764 throw new ParserException("illegal or inactive packings specified");
765 packData=CPBase.cpDrawing[pnum1].getPackData(); // where the final pack will go
766 PackData qackData=CPBase.cpDrawing[pnum2].getPackData();
767
768 int v1=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(2));
769 int v2=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(qackData,(String)items.get(3));
770 if (!packData.isBdry(v1) || !qackData.isBdry(v2))
771 throw new DataException("one or both vertices are not on the boundary");
772
773 if (pnum1==pnum2 && v1==v2 && packData.countFaces(v1)<3)
774 throw new DataException("zip up start vertex "+v1+" has too few neighbors");
775
776 // last entry has two forms: n or (v1 w)
777 int N;
778 String str=(String)items.get(4);
779 if (str.contains("(")) { // alternate form (v1 w)
780 /* check if v1 and w are bdry, on the same bdry
781 * component; count (clockwise) edges from v1 to w.*/
782 NodeLink nl=new NodeLink(packData,str);
783 int vv1=(Integer)nl.get(0);
784 int w=(Integer)nl.get(1);
785 if (w==vv1 || vv1!=v1 || !packData.isBdry(vv1) || !packData.isBdry(v1))
786 throw new ParserException("vertices equal or not on same bdry component");
787
788 // count edges clw about bdry until reaching 'w'
789 int tick=1;
790 PackDCEL pdc=packData.packDCEL;
791 HalfEdge he=pdc.vertices[v1].halfedge.twin.next;
792 HalfEdge startedge=he;
793 while (he.next.origin.vertIndx!=w && he!=startedge.prev) {
794 tick++;
795 he=he.next;
796 }
797 N=tick;
798 }
799 else // n is given
800 N=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(4));
801
802 // call to adjoin
803 PackData newPack=PackData.adjoinCall(packData, qackData, v1, v2, N);
804 if (newPack==null) {
805 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("'adjoin' failed: ");
806 return 0;
807 }
808
809 newPack.packDCEL.fixDCEL(newPack);
810 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(newPack,pnum1,true);
811 return packData.nodeCount;
812 } // end of 'adjoin'
813
814 // =========== torpack ===========
815 else if(cmd.startsWith("torpack")) {
816 // 1 or 2 doubles as side-pairing factors
817 double[] factors=new double[2];
818 factors[0]=1.0;
819 factors[1]=1.0;
820 ArrayList<Double> ftrs=new ArrayList<Double>();
821 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0) {
822 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
823 try {
824 while (items.size()>0) {
825 ftrs.add(Double.parseDouble(items.remove(0)));
826 }
827 } catch(Exception ex) {
828 throw new ParserException("Usage: torpack [A B]");
829 }
830 }
831 int n=ftrs.size();
832 if (n>=1)
833 factors[0]=ftrs.get(0);
834 if (n>=2)
835 factors[1]=ftrs.get(1);
836
837 // now try the affine packing
838 if (!ProjStruct.affineSet(packData,null,factors[0],factors[1]))
839 throw new ParserException("torpack failed");
840
841 EuclPacker e_packer=new EuclPacker(packData,-1);
842 EuclPacker.affinePack(packData,-1);
843
844 // store results as radii
845 NodeLink vlist=new NodeLink();
846 for (int i=0;i<e_packer.aimnum;i++) {
847 vlist.add(e_packer.index[i]);
848 }
849
850 e_packer.reapResults();
851 return packData.packDCEL.layoutPacking();
852 }
853 break;
854 } // end of 'a'
855 case 'b':
856 {
857 break;
858 }
859 case 'c':
860 {
861
862 // ========= cd ================
863 if (cmd.startsWith("cd")) {
864 String str="~";
865 try {
866 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
867 str=(String)items.get(0).trim();
868 } catch (Exception ex) {}
869 File file=null;
870 try {
871 // TODO: other syntax for home?
872 if (str.startsWith("~")) {
873 str=str.substring(1);
874 file=new File(CPFileManager.HomeDirectory,str);
875 }
876 // e.g. ../.. (see what happens)
877 else if (!str.startsWith(File.separator)) {
878 file =new File(CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory,str);
879 }
880 else file=new File(str);
881
882 if (!file.exists()) {
883 throw new ParserException("Directory "+str+" does not exist");
884 }
885 if (file.isDirectory()) // is it a directory?
886 CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory=new File(file.getAbsolutePath());
887 else // else, get its parent directory
888 CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory=new File(file.getParent());
889
890 // change script and packing directories, also
891 File tryfile=new File(CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory,"scripts");
892 if (tryfile.exists()) // "scripts" in new directory? change to it
893 CPFileManager.ScriptDirectory=tryfile;
894 tryfile=new File(CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory,"packings");
895 if (tryfile.exists())
896 CPFileManager.PackingDirectory=tryfile;
897 tryfile=new File(CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory,"pics");
898 if (tryfile.exists())
899 CPFileManager.ImageDirectory=tryfile;
900 str=new String(file.getCanonicalPath());
901 } catch (Exception ex) {
902 return 0;
903 }
904 if (PackControl.frame!=null)
905 PackControl.frame.setTitle("CirclePack (dir; "+str+")");
906 return 1;
907 }
908
909 // =========== cleanse ==========
910 if (cmd.startsWith("clean")) {
911 packData.packExtensions=new Vector<PackExtender>(2); // trash any extensions
912
913 // put new packing in place
914 int pnum=packData.packNum;
915 PackData newP=new PackData(pnum);
916 CPBase.packings[pnum]=newP;
917 newP.cpDrawing=CPBase.cpDrawing[pnum];
918 newP.cpDrawing.setPackData(newP);
919 newP.cpDrawing.emptyScreen();
920 newP.cpDrawing.updateXtenders();
921
922 // point local 'packData' to new one
923 packData=newP;
924 return 1;
925 }
926
927 // ========== close ===========
928 if (cmd.startsWith("close") && CPBase.GUImode!=0) {
929 // default to 'advanced'
930 if (items==null || items.size()==0) {
931 if (PackControl.anybodyOpen()>=2)
932 PackControl.frame.setVisible(false);
933 return 1;
934 }
935 Iterator<String> ws=items.iterator();
936 while (ws.hasNext()) {
937 String windStr=ws.next().toLowerCase();
938
939 if (windStr.startsWith("adv")) {
940 int k=PackControl.anybodyOpen();
941 if (k>=2) { // CirclePack.cpb.anybodyOpen();
942 PackControl.frame.setVisible(false);
943 }
944 }
945 else if (windStr.startsWith("act")) {
946 if (PackControl.activeFrame.isVisible()) {
947 PackControl.activeFrame.setState(JFrame.ICONIFIED);
948 }
949 }
950 else if (windStr.startsWith("pair") ||
951 windStr.startsWith("map")) { // dual screen mode
952 if (PackControl.mapPairFrame.isVisible()) {
953 PackControl.mapPairFrame.setState(JFrame.ICONIFIED);
954 }
955 }
956 else if (windStr.startsWith("scre")) { // screen: must preceed 'scr'
957 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.setVisible(false);
958 }
959 else if (windStr.startsWith("mes") || windStr.startsWith("msg")) {
960 if (PackControl.anybodyOpen()>=2) {
961
962 // keep locked (though not necessarily visible)
963 PackControl.msgHover.locked=true;
964 PackControl.msgHover.lockedFrame.setVisible(false);
965
966 // TODO: remove hover behavior to see if it's causing timing problems
967/* PackControl.msgHover.loadHover();
968 PackControl.msgHover.locked=false;
969*/
970 }
971 }
972 else if (windStr.startsWith("conf")) {
973 if (PackControl.prefFrame!=null) {
974 PackControl.prefFrame.setVisible(false);
975 PackControl.prefFrame=null;
976 }
977 }
978 else if (windStr.startsWith("scr")) {
979 if (PackControl.scriptHover.isLocked()) {
980 PackControl.scriptHover.loadHover();
981 PackControl.scriptHover.lockedFrame.setVisible(false);
982 }
983 }
984 else if (windStr.startsWith("fun")) {
985 PackControl.newftnFrame.setVisible(false);
986 }
987 else if (windStr.startsWith("mob")) {
988 PackControl.mobiusFrame.setVisible(false);
989 }
990
991 // TODO: suspend until browser is fixed
992// else if (windStr.startsWith("www") || windStr.startsWith("bro")) {
993// PackControl.browserFrame.setVisible(false);
994// }
995
996 else if (windStr.startsWith("abo")) {
997 PackControl.aboutFrame.setVisible(false);
998 }
999 else if (windStr.startsWith("hel")) {
1000 if (PackControl.helpHover.isLocked()) {
1001 PackControl.helpHover.lockedFrame.setVisible(false);
1002 PackControl.helpHover.loadHover();
1003 PackControl.helpHover.locked=false;
1004 }
1005 }
1006 else if (windStr.startsWith("inf")) { // info frame
1007 PackControl.packDataHover.setLocked(false);
1008 }
1009 // TODO: suspend until browser is fixed
1010// else if (windStr.startsWith("www") || windStr.startsWith("bro")) {
1011// PackControl.browserFrame.setVisible(false);
1012// }
1013 else if (windStr.startsWith("abo")) {
1014 PackControl.aboutFrame.setVisible(false);
1015 PackControl.aboutFrame=null;
1016 }
1017 else if (windStr.startsWith("sav")) { // save frame
1018 PackControl.outputFrame.setVisible(false);
1019 }
1020 } // end of while
1021 return 1;
1022 }
1023
1024 // ============== create ==============
1025 else if (cmd.startsWith("create")) {
1026 int mode=1;
1027 int param=0;
1028 flagSegs.remove(0);
1029 String type = null;
1030 try {
1031 type=items.remove(0);
1032 try {
1033 param=Integer.parseInt(items.remove(0)); // get number first
1034 } catch (Exception ex) {
1035 param=0;
1036 }
1037 if (type.startsWith("seed"))
1038 mode=1;
1039 else if (type.startsWith("hex_tor"))
1040 mode=12;
1041 else if (type.startsWith("hex") || type.startsWith("Hex"))
1042 mode=2;
1043 else if (type.startsWith("sq") || type.startsWith("Sq"))
1044 mode=3;
1045 else if (type.startsWith("chai") || type.startsWith("Chai")) {
1046 mode=4;
1047 }
1048 else if (type.startsWith("tri_g") || type.startsWith("Tri_g")) {
1049 mode=5;
1050 }
1051 else if (type.startsWith("j") || type.startsWith("J")) {
1052 mode=5; // special triangle group
1053 }
1054 else if (type.startsWith("pent3")) {
1055 mode=7;
1056 }
1057 else if (type.startsWith("pent4")) {
1058 mode=8;
1059 }
1060 else if (type.startsWith("pent")) {
1061 mode=6;
1062 }
1063 else if (type.startsWith("dyadic")) {
1064 mode=9;
1065 }
1066 else if (type.startsWith("fib") || type.startsWith("Fib")) {
1067 mode=11;
1068 }
1069 else if (type.startsWith("tetra") || type.startsWith("Tetra")) {
1070 mode=13;
1071 }
1072 else if (type.startsWith("Kag")) {
1073 mode=14;
1074 }
1075 else if (type.startsWith("tilebary")) {
1076 mode=15;
1077 }
1078 else if (type.startsWith("cyl")) {
1079 mode=16;
1080 }
1081 } catch (Exception ex) {
1082 throw new ParserException("usage: create "+type+" {n}");
1083 }
1084
1085 if (param<0)
1086 throw new ParserException("usage: create "+type+" [{n}], "
1087 + "n must be non-negative");
1088
1089 PackData newPack=null;
1090 switch (mode) {
1091 case 1: // seed
1092 {
1093 // -s flag? create from schwarzians
1094 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0
1095 || !(items=flagSegs.remove(0)).remove(0).startsWith("-s"))
1096 newPack=PackCreation.seed(param,0);
1097 else {
1098 ArrayList<Double> schvec=new ArrayList<Double>();
1099 // get as many schwarzians as available
1100 while (items.size()>0) {
1101 String numstr=items.remove(0);
1102 try {
1103 Double dbl=Double.parseDouble(numstr);
1104 schvec.add(dbl);
1105 } catch(Exception iex) {
1106 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("seed -s: schwarzian failure");
1107 break;
1108 }
1109 }
1110 int sz=schvec.size();
1111 if (sz<param) {
1112 for (int j=1;j<=(param-sz);j++)
1113 schvec.add(1.0);
1114 }
1115
1116 CircleSimple cs=new CircleSimple();
1117 Complex err=new Complex();
1118 newPack=PackCreation.seed(schvec,cs,err,0);
1119 CirclePack.cpb.msg("flower via schwarzian err: "+err);
1120 }
1121 break;
1122 }
1123 case 2: // hex/Hex
1124 {
1125 if (type.charAt(0)=='h' && param>100) {
1126 throw new DataException("Use 'Hex' (cap 'H') for "
1127 + "more than 100 generations");
1128 }
1129 newPack=PackCreation.hexBuild(param);
1130 newPack.packDCEL.layoutPacking();
1131 break;
1132 }
1133 case 3: // square grid
1134 {
1135 if (type.charAt(0)=='s' && param>8) {
1136 throw new DataException("Use 'Sq_grid' (cap 'S') for "
1137 + "more than 8 generations");
1138 }
1139 newPack=PackCreation.squareGrid(param);
1140 break;
1141 }
1142 case 4: // chair, with 'TileData'
1143 {
1144 throw new DataException("No longer active: use tile machinery");
1145 }
1146 case 5: // triangle group, and j-function
1147 {
1148 if ((type.charAt(0)=='t' || type.charAt(0)=='j') &&
1149 param>15) {
1150 throw new DataException(
1151 "Use 'Tri_group' or 'J_ftn' (capitalize) for more "
1152 + "than 15 generations");
1153 }
1154
1155 // later we reorder to put A,B,C in ascending order.
1156 double a,b,c;
1157 boolean jftn=false;
1158 if (items.size()==2)
1159 jftn=true;
1160
1161 // j-function version specified via 'j-ftn' command
1162 // or by specifying 0 as first parameter
1163
1164 // defaults:
1165 // if 3 parameters, a=2, b=3, c=7 (classical hyp example)
1166 // if 2 parameters, a=0, b=2, c=3 (j-ftn)
1167 try {
1168 a=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
1169 b=Double.parseDouble(items.get(1));
1170 if (!jftn)
1171 c=Double.parseDouble(items.get(2));
1172 else {
1173 b=a;
1174 c=b;
1175 a=0.0;
1176 }
1177 } catch (Exception ex) {
1178 if (jftn) { // j-functions version
1179 a=0.0;
1180 b=2.0;
1181 c=3.0;
1182 }
1183 else {
1184 a=2.0;
1185 b=3.0;
1186 c=7.0;
1187 }
1188 } // go with defaults
1189
1190 if (a==0.0)
1191 jftn=true;
1192
1193 // j-ftn case: parameters B and C must be integers >= 2
1194 if (jftn) {
1195
1196 int B=(int)(2.01*b);
1197 int C=(int)(2.01*c);
1198 if (B<2 || C<2)
1199 throw new DataException(
1200 "usage: j-function parameters "
1201 + "be positive integers >= 2");
1202 newPack=PackCreation.buildTriGroup(param,0,B,C);
1203 break;
1204 }
1205
1206 if (a<0.000000001 || b<0.00000001 || c<0.0000001)
1207 throw new DataException(
1208 "usage: tri-group parameters must be positive");
1209
1210 // set degrees: parameters should be (at worst) half ints
1211 if (Math.abs(2.0*a-(int)(2.0*a))>.0001 ||
1212 Math.abs(2.0*b-(int)(2.0*b))>.0001 ||
1213 Math.abs(2.0*c-(int)(2.0*c))>.0001)
1214 throw new DataException(
1215 "usage: tri_group: paremeters must be form n/2");
1216 if (Math.abs(2.0*((int)a)-2.0*a)>.1) {
1217 if (((int)b-(int)c)>0.1)
1218 throw new DataException(
1219 "usage: tri_group: 'a' half-int, "
1220 + "then b, c must be equal");
1221 }
1222 else if (Math.abs(2.0*((int)b)-2.0*b)>.1) {
1223 if (((int)a-(int)c)>0.1)
1224 throw new DataException(
1225 "usage: tri_group: 'b' is "
1226 + "half-integer, but a, c not equal");
1227 }
1228 if (Math.abs(2.0*((int)c)-2.0*c)>.1) {
1229 if (((int)b-(int)a)>0.1)
1230 throw new DataException(
1231 "usage: create tri_group: 'c' is "
1232 + "half-integer, but a, b not equal");
1233 }
1234 int A=(int)(2.01*a);
1235 int B=(int)(2.01*b);
1236 int C=(int)(2.01*c);
1237
1238 newPack=PackCreation.buildTriGroup(param, A, B, C);
1239 break;
1240 }
1241 case 6: // pentagonal tiling, with 'TileData'
1242 {
1243 if (param<0)
1244 param=0;
1245 PackDCEL pdcel=PackCreation.pentagonal_dcel(param);
1246 newPack=new PackData(null); // DCELdebug.printRedChain(pdcel.redChain);
1247 newPack.attachDCEL(pdcel);
1248 newPack.set_rad_default();
1249 newPack.set_aim_default();
1250
1251 for (int v=1;v<=newPack.nodeCount;v++) {
1252 if (newPack.isBdry(v))
1253 newPack.setAim(v,Math.PI);
1254 }
1255 for (int v=1;v<=5;v++)
1256 newPack.setAim(v,3.0*Math.PI/5.0);
1257
1258 newPack.repack_call(1000);
1259 newPack.status=true;
1260 newPack.setAlpha(1);
1261 CommandStrParser.jexecute(newPack,"layout");
1262 CommandStrParser.jexecute(newPack,"norm_scale -u 3");
1263 CommandStrParser.jexecute(newPack,"norm_scale -h 1 5");
1264 CommandStrParser.jexecute(newPack,"pave 6");
1265
1266 // TODO: call pave
1267
1268 break;
1269 }
1270 case 7: // pentagonal triple point, with 'TileData'
1271 case 8: // pentagonal quadruple point, with 'TileData'
1272 {
1273 if (param<0)
1274 param=0;
1275 int N=mode-4; // number to cluster at center
1276
1277 // get pentagonal packing, right number of generations
1278 PackDCEL pent=PackCreation.pentagonal_dcel(param);
1279 int sidelength=(int)Math.pow(2.0,param);
1280 PackDCEL pdcel=RawManip.polyCluster(pent,1,sidelength,N);
1281 CombDCEL.fillInside(pdcel);
1282
1283 // attach and set
1284 newPack=new PackData(null);
1285 newPack.attachDCEL(pdcel);
1286 newPack.set_rad_default();
1287 newPack.set_aim_default();
1288 double ang=((double)N-1.0)/((double)N)*Math.PI;
1289 for (int v=1;v<=newPack.nodeCount;v++) {
1290 if (newPack.isBdry(v)) {
1291 newPack.setAim(v,Math.PI);
1292 if (newPack.packDCEL.vertices[v].getNum()==2)
1293 newPack.setAim(v,ang); // reset at pent corners
1294 }
1295 }
1296 newPack.repack_call(1000);
1297 newPack.status=true;
1298 newPack.setAlpha(1);
1299 CommandStrParser.jexecute(newPack,"layout");
1300 CommandStrParser.jexecute(newPack,"norm_scale -u 3");
1301 CommandStrParser.jexecute(newPack,"norm_scale -h 1 5");
1302 CommandStrParser.jexecute(newPack,"pave 6");
1303
1304 break;
1305 }
1306 case 9: // dyadic (hyp penrose), with 'TileData'
1307 {
1308 newPack=PackCreation.pentHypTiling(param);
1309 break;
1310 }
1311 case 11: // fibonnacci 2D: W, H, X, width/height/base, with 'TileData'
1312 {
1313 if (type.charAt(0)=='f' && param>8) {
1314 throw new DataException("Use 'Fib2d' (cap 'F') for "
1315 + "more than 8 generations");
1316 }
1317 int W=1;
1318 int H=1;
1319 int X=1;
1320 try {
1321 W=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
1322 H=Integer.parseInt(items.get(1));
1323 X=Integer.parseInt(items.get(2));
1324 } catch (Exception ex) {} // go with defaults
1325 newPack=PackCreation.fibonacci2D(param, W, H, X);
1326 break;
1327 }
1328 case 12: // hex torus, H height, W width
1329 {
1330 int W=0;
1331 int H=0;
1332 try {
1333 H=param;
1334 W=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
1335 } catch (Exception ex) {
1336 if (H<3)
1337 H=3;
1338 if (W<3)
1339 W=3;
1340 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Usage: hex_torus <h> <w>: "+
1341 "default to "+H+" and "+W);
1342 }
1343 newPack=PackCreation.hexTorus(H,W);
1344 jexecute(newPack,"layout");
1345
1346 break;
1347 }
1348 case 13: // regular tetrahedron on the sphere
1349 {
1350 newPack=PackCreation.tetrahedron();
1351 break;
1352 }
1353 case 14: // Kagome lattice
1354 {
1355 newPack=PackCreation.buildKagome(param);
1356 break;
1357 }
1358 case 15: // hex refined tile
1359 {
1360 newPack=PackCreation.tileHexed(param);
1361 break;
1362 }
1363 case 16: // hex cylinder packing
1364 {
1365 int p;
1366 int q;
1367 int n;
1368 try {
1369 p=param;
1370 q=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
1371 n=Integer.parseInt(items.get(1));
1372 } catch (Exception ex) { // go with defaults
1373 p=6;
1374 q=6;
1375 n=4;
1376 }
1377 newPack=PackCreation.hexCylinder(p, q, n);
1378 break;
1379 }
1380 } // end of switch
1381
1382 if (newPack==null) {
1383 throw new ParserException("failed to create "+type+" packing");
1384 }
1385
1386 newPack.status=true;
1387 int pnum=packData.packNum;
1388 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(newPack,pnum,false);
1389 return packData.nodeCount;
1390 }
1391 break;
1392 } // end of 'c'
1393 case 'd':
1394 {
1395
1396 // ========= delaunay (this is 2D) ==========
1397 if (cmd.startsWith("delaun") || cmd.startsWith("Delaun")) {
1398 int N=0;
1399 String str;
1400 boolean script_flag=false; // data from script?
1401 boolean fromFile=false; // data in some file?
1402 boolean cpack=false; // from packing centers?
1403 Vector<Complex> pts=null;
1404 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
1405 int geom=100; // intended geometry
1406
1407 // check for flags
1408 Iterator<Vector<String>> fseg=flagSegs.iterator();
1409 while (fseg.hasNext()) {
1410 try {
1411 items=fseg.next();
1412 str=(String)items.get(0);
1413
1414 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
1415
1416 // -f and/or -s (script): read data from a file
1417 if (str.startsWith("-f") || str.startsWith("-s")) {
1418 if (cpack)
1419 throw new ParserException("'f' and 's' flags "
1420 + "conflict with 'c' flag");
1421 items.remove(0); // look for filename
1422 fromFile=true;
1423 if (str.startsWith("-s"))
1424 script_flag=true;
1425 String filename=StringUtil.reconItem(items);
1426 BufferedReader fp=
1427 CPFileManager.openReadFP(CPFileManager.
1428 PackingDirectory,filename,script_flag);
1429 if (fp==null) {
1430 throw new InOutException("failed to open "+
1431 CPFileManager.PackingDirectory.toString()+
1432 File.separator+filename);
1433 }
1434 RandomTriangulation.readPoints(fp,uP);
1435 if (uP.errval<0) {
1436 throw new ParserException("Error reading points");
1437 }
1438 pts=uP.z_vec;
1439 } // should have pts
1440
1441 // from current packing
1442 else if (str.startsWith("-c")) {
1443 if (fromFile)
1444 throw new ParserException("'c' flag "
1445 + "conflicts with 'f','s' flags");
1446 if (!packData.status)
1447 throw new ParserException("packing status is false");
1448 cpack=true;
1449 geom=packData.hes;
1450 pts=new Vector<Complex>(packData.nodeCount+1);
1451 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++) {
1452 if (str.contains("m")) {
1453 pts.add(CirclePack.cpb.getFtnValue(packData.getCenter(v)));
1454 }
1455 else
1456 pts.add(packData.getCenter(v));
1457 }
1458 }
1459
1460 // geometry: 0 eucl or 1 sphere. Mainly for files with keyword
1461 // "UNIT_SQUARE", which may be intended to be euclidean or
1462 // to be converted to sphere.
1463 else if (str.startsWith("-g")) {
1464 items.remove(0);
1465 try {
1466 char c=items.get(0).charAt(0);
1467 if (c=='h') // hyp
1468 geom=-1;
1469 else if (c=='e') // eucl
1470 geom=0;
1471 else if (c=='s') // sph
1472 geom=1;
1473 } catch (Exception ex) {}
1474 }
1475
1476 } // done with flag segments
1477 } catch(Exception ex) {
1478 throw new ParserException("flag error :"+ex.getMessage());
1479 }
1480 } // end of while
1481
1482 // Now, must have pts vector
1483 if (pts==null) {
1484 throw new ParserException("flags missing, do not have any points");
1485 }
1486 if (cpack) // override -g flag if we're using centers
1487 geom=packData.hes;
1488
1489 // geometry not yet reset?
1490 if (geom==100) {
1491 if (uP.rtnFlag==1 || uP.rtnFlag==2) { // eucl: unit square or 2D
1492 geom=0;
1493 }
1494 else if (uP.rtnFlag==3) { // sphere
1495 geom=1;
1496 }
1497 else
1498 throw new ParserException("confusion about geometry");
1499 }
1500
1501 N=pts.size();
1502 if (geom==1 && uP.rtnFlag==1) { // unit square pts? (theta,phi) form
1503 for (int i=0;i<N;i++) {
1504 Complex pz=pts.get(i);
1505 pz.x=2.0*Math.PI*pz.x;
1506 pz.y=Math.acos(2.0*(pz.y-.5));
1507 pts.set(i,pz);
1508 }
1509 }
1510
1511 Triangulation Tri=Triangulation.pts2triangulation(geom, pts);
1512 PackData randPack=Triangulation.tri_to_Complex(Tri,geom);
1513// if (randPack==null) {
1514// throw new CombException("'tri_to_Complex' failed");
1515// }
1516 // put new packing in place
1517 randPack.fileName=new String("Delaunay"+N);
1518 int pnum=packData.packNum;
1519 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(randPack,pnum,false);
1520 packData.chooseAlpha();
1521 packData.chooseGamma();
1522 packData.set_aim_default();
1523 packData.set_rad_default();
1524 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++)
1525 packData.setPlotFlag(v,1);
1526 return N;
1527 } // end of 'delaunay'
1528
1529 else if (cmd.startsWith("debug")) {
1530 char flag='d'; // default
1531 try {
1532 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0)))
1533 flag=items.get(0).charAt(1);
1534 else
1535 flag=items.get(0).charAt(0);
1536 } catch(Exception ex) {
1537 flag='d';
1538 }
1539
1540 switch(flag) {
1541 case 's': // print stackbox sizes
1542 {
1543 System.err.println("Here's the current script layout info:");
1544 System.err.println("* stackArea size w,h = "+
1545 PackControl.scriptHover.stackArea.getWidth()+" "+
1546 PackControl.scriptHover.stackArea.getHeight());
1547 System.err.println("* stackScroll size w,h = "+
1548 PackControl.scriptHover.stackScroll.getWidth()+" "+
1549 PackControl.scriptHover.stackScroll.getHeight());
1550 PackControl.scriptManager.cpScriptNode.debugSize();
1551 PackControl.scriptManager.debugLayoutRecurse(
1552 PackControl.scriptManager.cpScriptNode);
1553 PackControl.scriptManager.cpDataNode.debugSize();
1554 PackControl.scriptManager.debugLayoutRecurse(
1555 PackControl.scriptManager.cpDataNode);
1556 System.err.println("end of stackbox info\n");
1557 return 1;
1558 }
1559 case 'e': // send each command to stderr before executing
1560 {
1561 CPBase.cmdDebug=true;
1562 return 1;
1563 }
1564 case 'x': // turn 'e' off
1565 {
1566 CPBase.cmdDebug=false;
1567 return 1;
1568 }
1569 } // end of switch
1570 return 0;
1571 }
1572 else if (cmd.startsWith("dela")) { // delay
1573 double dy=0.001;
1574 try {
1575 items=flagSegs.get(0);
1576 dy=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
1577 Thread.sleep((long) (dy * 1000.0));
1578 } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
1579 throw new ParserException("usage: delay <seconds>");
1580 }
1581 return 1;
1582 }
1583 break;
1584 } // end of 'd'
1585 case 'e':
1586 {
1587 // ============ erf_ftn =========
1588 if (cmd.startsWith("erf_ftn")) {
1589 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // just pnum, qnum, n
1590 int p1num=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
1591 int p2num=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(1));
1592 int n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(2));
1593 if (p1num<0 || p1num>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS || p2num<0
1594 || p2num==p1num || p2num>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS
1595 || n<1 || n>3) {
1596 throw new ParserException("improper call");
1597 }
1598 PackData p=Erf_function.erf_ftn(CPBase.packings[p1num],n);
1599 if (p==null)
1600 return 0;
1601 CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(p,p2num,false); // install as new pack[p2num]
1602 return p.nodeCount;
1603 }
1604
1605 // ============= extender ===========
1606 else if (cmd.startsWith("extender")) {
1607 String str=null;
1608 int returnVal=0;
1609
1610 Iterator<Vector<String>> fgsg=flagSegs.iterator();
1611 while (fgsg.hasNext()) {
1612 items=fgsg.next();
1613 String stg=(String)items.get(0);
1614
1615 // for listing existing extenders (then return)
1616 if (stg!=null && stg.startsWith("?")) {
1617 if (packData.packExtensions.size()==0) {
1618 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1619 " has no existing extender");
1620 }
1621 Iterator<PackExtender> pXs=packData.packExtensions.iterator();
1622 while (pXs.hasNext()) {
1623 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+" has "+
1624 pXs.next().extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1625 }
1626 return 1;
1627 }
1628
1629 // kill sign?? (then return)
1630 else if (stg!=null && stg.startsWith("-x")) {
1631 items.remove(0);
1632 if (packData.packExtensions.size()==0) {
1633 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("Pack "+
1634 packData.packNum+" has no extensions");
1635 return 1;
1636 }
1637 if (items.size()==0) { // kill all extensions
1638 // TODO: need confirmation popup
1639 while (packData.packExtensions.size()>0)
1640 packData.packExtensions.get(0).killMe();
1641 packData.packExtensions=new Vector<PackExtender>(2);
1642 return 1;
1643 }
1644 else {
1645 str=(String)items.get(0);
1646 PackExtender px=null;
1647 while ((px=packData.findXbyAbbrev(str))!=null) {
1648 px.killMe();
1649 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+
1650 packData.packNum+": kill "+str+" extension");
1651 px=null;
1652 }
1653 }
1654
1655 packData.cpDrawing.updateXtenders();
1656 return 1;
1657 }
1658
1659 // restart (i.e., kill and then restart)
1660 else if (stg!=null && stg.startsWith("-r")) {
1661 items.remove(0);
1662 if (items.size()>0) {
1663 str=(String)items.get(0);
1664 PackExtender px=null;
1665 while ((px=packData.findXbyAbbrev(str))!=null) {
1666 px.killMe();
1667 }
1668 }
1669 packData.cpDrawing.updateXtenders();
1670 }
1671
1672 // may be no flag, just the abbreviation
1673 else if (stg!=null && stg.charAt(0)!='-') {
1674 str=stg;
1675 }
1676
1677 } // end of while for flags
1678
1679 // ************ hard coded abbreviations ***********
1680 if (str!=null) {
1681 if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("bvp")) {
1682 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1683 return 0;
1684 BoundaryValueProblems px=new BoundaryValueProblems(packData);
1685 if (px.running) {
1686 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1687 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1688 px.StartUpMsg();
1689 returnVal=1;
1690 }
1691 }
1692 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("bf")) {
1693 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1694 return 0;
1695 BeurlingFlow px=new BeurlingFlow(packData);
1696 if (px.running) {
1697 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1698 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1699 px.StartUpMsg();
1700 returnVal=1;
1701 }
1702 }
1703
1704 // developing this.
1705 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("mg")) {
1706 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1707 return 0;
1708 if (items.size()<=2) { // there must be a -s or -q flag
1709 try {
1710 items=flagSegs.get(1);
1711 } catch(Exception ex) {
1712 throw new ParserException(
1713 "'extender' mg call needs packing or "
1714 +"file info");
1715 }
1716 }
1717 String srpt=items.get(0);
1718 boolean script_flag=false;
1719 if (srpt.equals("-s")) {
1720 script_flag=true;
1721
1722 MicroGrid px=new MicroGrid(packData,
1723 items.get(1),items.get(2),script_flag);
1724 if (px.running) {
1725 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1726 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+
1727 " extender, mode 1");
1728 px.StartUpMsg();
1729 returnVal=1;
1730 }
1731 }
1732 // TODO: mode 2 is new (2/2020) and under development
1733 else if (StringUtil.qFlagParse(srpt)>=0) {
1734 script_flag=true;
1735 int qnum=StringUtil.qFlagParse(srpt);
1736
1737 MicroGrid px=new MicroGrid(packData,
1738 CPBase.cpDrawing[qnum].getPackData(),null,script_flag);
1739 if (px.running) {
1740 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1741 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+
1742 " extender, mode 2");
1743 px.StartUpMsg();
1744 returnVal=1;
1745 }
1746 }
1747 }
1748 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("rh")) {
1749 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1750 return 0;
1751 PackExtender px=new RiemHilbert(packData);
1752 if (px.running) {
1753 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1754 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1755 px.StartUpMsg();
1756 returnVal=1;
1757 }
1758 }
1759 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("gp")) {
1760 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1761 return 0;
1762 Graphene px=new Graphene(packData);
1763 if (px.running) {
1764 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1765 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1766 px.StartUpMsg();
1767 returnVal=1;
1768 }
1769 }
1770 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("pb")) {
1771 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1772 return 0;
1773 PolyBranching px=new PolyBranching(packData);
1774 if (px.running) {
1775 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1776 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1777 px.StartUpMsg();
1778 returnVal=1;
1779 }
1780 }
1781 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("tc")) {
1782 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1783 return 0;
1784 TileColoring px=new TileColoring(packData);
1785 if (px.running) {
1786 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1787 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1788 px.StartUpMsg();
1789 returnVal=1;
1790 }
1791 }
1792 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("cf")) {
1793 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1794 return 0;
1795 CurvFlow px=new CurvFlow(packData);
1796 if (px.running) {
1797 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1798 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1799 px.StartUpMsg();
1800 returnVal=1;
1801 }
1802 }
1803 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("ct")) {
1804 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1805 return 0;
1806 ConformalTiling px=new ConformalTiling(packData);
1807 if (px.running) {
1808 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1809 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1810 px.StartUpMsg();
1811 returnVal=1;
1812 }
1813
1814 }
1815 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("TE")) {
1816 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1817 return 0;
1818 TorusEnergy px=new TorusEnergy(packData);
1819 if (px.running) {
1820 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1821 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1822 px.StartUpMsg();
1823 returnVal=1;
1824 }
1825 }
1826 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("JP")) {
1827 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1828 return 0;
1829 JammedPack px=new JammedPack(packData);
1830 if (px.running) {
1831 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1832 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1833 px.StartUpMsg();
1834 returnVal=1;
1835 }
1836 }
1837 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("PR")) {
1838 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1839 return 0;
1840 Percolation px=new Percolation(packData);
1841 if (px.running) {
1842 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1843 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1844 px.StartUpMsg();
1845 returnVal=1;
1846 }
1847 }
1848 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("mc") || str.equalsIgnoreCase("mmc")) {
1849 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1850 return 0;
1851 MeanMove px=new MeanMove(packData);
1852 if (px.running) {
1853 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1854 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1855 px.StartUpMsg();
1856 returnVal=1;
1857 }
1858 }
1859 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("ca")) {
1860 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1861 return 0;
1862 ComplexAnalysis px=new ComplexAnalysis(packData);
1863 if (px.running) {
1864 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1865 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1866 px.StartUpMsg();
1867 returnVal=1;
1868 }
1869 }
1870 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("cs")) {
1871 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1872 return 0;
1873 CylinderSpheres px=new CylinderSpheres(packData);
1874 if (px.running) {
1875 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1876 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1877 px.StartUpMsg();
1878 returnVal=1;
1879 }
1880 }
1881 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("ps")) {
1882 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1883 return 0;
1884 ProjStruct px=new ProjStruct(packData);
1885 if (px.running) {
1886 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1887 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1888 px.StartUpMsg();
1889 returnVal=1;
1890 }
1891 }
1892 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("ap") || str.equalsIgnoreCase("ss")) {
1893 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1894 return 0;
1895 AffinePack px=new AffinePack(packData);
1896 if (px.running) {
1897 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1898 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1899 px.StartUpMsg();
1900 returnVal=1;
1901 }
1902 }
1903 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("sm")) {
1904 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1905 return 0;
1906 SchwarzMap px=new SchwarzMap(packData);
1907 if (px.running) {
1908 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1909 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1910 px.StartUpMsg();
1911 returnVal=1;
1912 }
1913 }
1914 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("gb")) {
1915 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1916 return 0;
1917 GenModBranching px=new GenModBranching(packData);
1918 if (px.running) {
1919 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1920 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1921 px.StartUpMsg();
1922 returnVal=1;
1923 }
1924 }
1925 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("nk")) {
1926 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1927 return 0;
1928 Necklace px=new Necklace(packData);
1929 if (px.running) {
1930 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1931 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1932 px.StartUpMsg();
1933 returnVal=1;
1934 }
1935 }
1936 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("fs")) {
1937 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1938 return 0;
1939 FlipStrategy px=new FlipStrategy(packData);
1940 if (px.running) {
1941 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1942 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1943 px.StartUpMsg();
1944 returnVal=1;
1945 }
1946 }
1947 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("IG")) {
1948 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1949 return 0;
1950 iGame px=new iGame(packData);
1951 if (px.running) {
1952 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1953 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1954 px.StartUpMsg();
1955 returnVal=1;
1956 }
1957 }
1958 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("rm")) {
1959 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1960 return 0;
1961 RationalMap px=new RationalMap(packData);
1962 if (px.running) {
1963 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1964 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1965 px.StartUpMsg();
1966 returnVal=1;
1967 }
1968 }
1969 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("sp")) {
1970 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount==0)
1971 return 0;
1972 SchwarzPack px=new SchwarzPack(packData);
1973 if (px.running) {
1974 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1975 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1976 px.StartUpMsg();
1977 returnVal=1;
1978 }
1979 }
1980// OBE: old experiments for John Velling, VellingPants removed from
1981// repository, 6/2015.
1982// else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("VP")) {
1983// VellingPants px=new VellingPants(packData);
1984// if (px.running) {
1985// CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1986// ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1987// px.StartUpMsg();
1988// returnVal=1;
1989// }
1990// }
1991 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("SS")) {
1992 ShapeShifter px=new ShapeShifter(packData);
1993 if (px.running) {
1994 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
1995 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
1996 px.StartUpMsg();
1997 returnVal=1;
1998 }
1999 }
2000 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("WW")) {
2001 WordWalker px=new WordWalker(packData);
2002 if (px.running) {
2003 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
2004 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
2005 px.StartUpMsg();
2006 returnVal=1;
2007 }
2008 }
2009 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("fk")) {
2010 FeedBack px=new FeedBack(packData);
2011 if (px.running) {
2012 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
2013 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
2014 px.StartUpMsg();
2015 returnVal=1;
2016 }
2017 }
2018 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("bq")) {
2019 BrooksQuad px=new BrooksQuad(packData);
2020 if (px.running) {
2021 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
2022 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
2023 px.StartUpMsg();
2024 returnVal=1;
2025 }
2026 }
2027 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("bl")) {
2028 BeltramiFlips px=new BeltramiFlips(packData);
2029 if (px.running) {
2030 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
2031 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
2032 px.StartUpMsg();
2033 returnVal=1;
2034 }
2035 }
2036 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("hd")) {
2037 HypDensity px=new HypDensity(packData);
2038 if (px.running) {
2039 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
2040 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
2041 px.StartUpMsg();
2042 returnVal=1;
2043 }
2044 }
2045 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("sl")) {
2046 SphereLayout px=new SphereLayout(packData);
2047 if (px.running) {
2048 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
2049 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
2050 px.StartUpMsg();
2051 returnVal=1;
2052 }
2053 }
2054 else if (str.equalsIgnoreCase("cw")) {
2055 WeldManager px=new WeldManager(packData);
2056 if (px.running) {
2057 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
2058 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
2059 px.StartUpMsg();
2060 returnVal=1;
2061 }
2062 }
2063
2064 if (returnVal==1)
2065 packData.cpDrawing.updateXtenders();
2066
2067 } // end of hard-coded cases
2068
2069 // if nothing yet found, get from dialog
2070 if (str==null || returnVal==0) {
2071 PackExtender px=null;
2072 File extFile=FileDialogs.loadDialog(FileDialogs.EXTENDER,true);
2073 if (extFile!=null) {
2074 try {
2075 @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
2076 Class<PackExtender> extClass = (Class<PackExtender>)
2077 new circlePack.PackExtenderLoader().loadClass(extFile.
2078 getCanonicalPath());
2079
2080 // start the new class.
2081 // TODO: questions: how do I send an argument 'packData'?
2082 px= extClass.getConstructor(packing.PackData.class).
2083 newInstance(packData);
2084 } catch (IOException e) {
2085 e.printStackTrace();
2086 } catch (ClassNotFoundException e) {
2087 e.printStackTrace();
2088 } catch (InstantiationException e) {
2089 e.printStackTrace();
2090 } catch (IllegalAccessException e) {
2091 e.printStackTrace();
2092 } catch (InvocationTargetException e) {
2093 e.printStackTrace();
2094 } catch (NoSuchMethodException e) {
2095 e.printStackTrace();
2096 }
2097 }
2098
2099 if(px!=null && px.running) {
2100 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Pack "+packData.packNum+
2101 ": started "+px.extensionAbbrev+" extender");
2102 px.StartUpMsg();
2103 packData.cpDrawing.updateXtenders();
2104 returnVal=1;
2105 }
2106 }
2107
2108 return returnVal;
2109 }
2110
2111 // ============= exit ===========
2112 else if (cmd.equals("exit")) {
2113 // AF: Query user to exit CirclePack.
2114 ((PackControl) CirclePack.cpb).queryUserForQuit();
2115 // AF: If we haven't exited, return 0.
2116 return 0;
2117 }
2118
2119 // ============ evalp ============
2120 else if (cmd.startsWith("evalp")) {
2121 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0)
2122 throw new ParserException("usage: evalp <t>, "
2123 + "expects double argument");
2124 double t;
2125 try {
2126 t=Double.parseDouble(flagSegs.get(0).get(0));
2127 } catch(Exception ex) {
2128 throw new ParserException("usage: evalp <t> failed");
2129 }
2130 com.jimrolf.complex.Complex jrz=new com.jimrolf.complex.Complex(t,0.0);
2131 com.jimrolf.complex.Complex jrw=
2132 CirclePack.cpb.ParamParser.evalFunc(jrz);
2133 Complex w=new Complex(jrw.re(),jrw.im());
2134 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Path value at t="+t+" is "+w.toString());
2135 return 1;
2136 }
2137
2138 // ========== eval ===================
2139 else if (cmd.startsWith("eval")) {
2140 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0)
2141 throw new ParserException("usage: eval <z>, "
2142 + "expects complex argument");
2143 String zstr=StringUtil.reconItem(flagSegs.get(0));
2144 Complex z=Complex.string2Complex(zstr);
2145 com.jimrolf.complex.Complex jrz=
2146 new com.jimrolf.complex.Complex(z.x,z.y);
2147 com.jimrolf.complex.Complex jrw=
2148 CirclePack.cpb.FtnParser.evalFunc(jrz);
2149 if (jrw==null) {
2150 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("evaluation failed, "
2151 + "check function specification");
2152 return 0;
2153 }
2154 Complex w=new Complex(jrw.re(),jrw.im());
2155 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Function value at z="+z.toString()+
2156 " is "+w.toString());
2157 return 1;
2158 }
2159
2160 break;
2161 } // end of 'e'
2162 case 'f':
2163 {
2164
2165 // ============ fexec =============
2166 if (cmd.startsWith("fexec")) {
2167 BufferedReader fp=CPFileManager.openReadTail(flagSegs);
2168 String line=null;
2169 try {
2170
2171 // NOTE: this does not stop if an error occurs, it keeps
2172 // trying the next line.
2173 // Also, it works in the main thread, so there can be
2174 // delays.
2175 while((line=StringUtil.ourNextLine(fp))!=null) {
2176 // apply commands to the active pack
2177 ResultPacket rP=new ResultPacket(CirclePack.cpb.
2178 getActivePackData(),line);
2179 CPBase.trafficCenter.parseCmdSeq(rP,0,null);
2180 count+=Integer.valueOf(rP.cmdCount);
2181 }
2182 fp.close();
2183 } catch (Exception ex) {
2184 throw new ParserException("error in 'fexec' processing: "+
2185 ex.getMessage());
2186 }
2187 return count;
2188 }
2189 break;
2190 } // end of 'f'
2191 case 'g': // fall through
2192 case 'G':
2193 {
2194
2195 // =========== get_func ===========
2196 if (cmd.startsWith("get_fun")) {
2197 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Function expression: "+
2198 CirclePack.cpb.FtnSpecification.toString()+"\n");
2199 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Parametric expression: "+
2200 CirclePack.cpb.ParamSpecification.toString()+"\n");
2201 }
2202
2203 // NOTE: this is not operational now (3/2022), as the JNI
2204 // calls to C code have been removed.
2205 // flags: s=start, r=restart, c=continue, g=get rad/cent, q=quality
2206 else if (cmd.startsWith("GOpack")) {
2207 count=0;
2208 GOpacker goPack;
2209
2210 // first, check for -v {v..} flag specifying which vertices are
2211 // treated as "interior". If this is found, then new GOPacker is
2212 // initiated and other flags are ignored --- user must make
2213 // separate calls to us the GOpacker.
2214 Iterator<Vector<String>> fsq=flagSegs.iterator();
2215 while (fsq.hasNext()) {
2216 Vector<String> itms=fsq.next();
2217 if (itms.size()>0 && itms.get(0).startsWith("-v")) {
2218 itms.remove(0);
2219 NodeLink v_int=new NodeLink(packData,itms);
2220 if (v_int==null || v_int.size()<1)
2221 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage: GOpack "
2222 + "-v {v..}");
2223 goPack=new GOpacker(packData,v_int);
2224 packData.rePacker=goPack;
2225 CirclePack.cpb.msg("GOpack started for subcomplex");
2226 return 1;
2227 }
2228 }
2229
2230 // otherwise, normal processing
2231 int defaultPasses=10;
2232 int passes=-1;
2233 char c='s'; // default to "start" only
2234 char gotc='s'; // exclusive flag
2235 boolean gotflag=false; // some flags are exclusive
2236
2237 // start the persistent 'RePacker' if not already running
2238 if (packData.rePacker==null ||
2239 !(packData.rePacker instanceof GOpacker) ||
2240 packData.rePacker.p==null ||
2241 packData.rePacker.p!= packData ||
2242 packData.nodeCount!=((GOpacker)packData.rePacker).
2243 getOrigNodeCount()) {
2244 goPack=new GOpacker(packData,passes);
2245 packData.rePacker=goPack;
2246 }
2247 else {
2248 goPack=(GOpacker)packData.rePacker;
2249 c='c'; // default to "continue"
2250 gotc=c;
2251 }
2252
2253 // default: continue with whatever was going on
2254 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
2255 int ct=goPack.continueRiffle(defaultPasses);
2256 CirclePack.cpb.msg("GOpacker: did "+ct+
2257 " passes, l2-error = "+goPack.myPLiteError);
2258 return ct;
2259 }
2260
2261 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagSegs.iterator();
2262 while (its.hasNext()) {
2263 items=its.next();
2264 String str=items.get(0);
2265 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
2266 items.remove(0);
2267 c=str.charAt(1);
2268 switch(c) {
2269
2270 // specified "interior" (versus default to usual interior)
2271 case 'v':
2272 {
2273 if (goPack.mode!=GOpacker.NOT_YET_SET) {
2274 CirclePack.cpb.msg("GOpack can set vertices "
2275 + "only on initialization");
2276 return 0;
2277 }
2278
2279 }
2280
2281 // set all radii to 1, do no riffles yet
2282 case 's':
2283 {
2284 goPack.startRiffle();
2285 CirclePack.cpb.msg("GOpack is initialized, "
2286 + "constant radii, no cycles yet");
2287 return 1;
2288 }
2289
2290 // continue with another batch of repacking, 'n' passes
2291 case 'c':
2292 {
2293 if (gotflag)
2294 break;
2295 gotflag=true;
2296 gotc=c;
2297 if (items.size()>0) { // passes specified?
2298 try {
2299 passes=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
2300 } catch (Exception ex) {
2301 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage: "
2302 + "-n {n}, n iterations");
2303 }
2304 }
2305 break;
2306 }
2307
2308 // 'restart', meaning start with the parent radii
2309 case 'r':
2310 {
2311 if (gotflag)
2312 break;
2313 gotflag=true;
2314 gotc=c;
2315 if (items.size()>0) { // passes specified?
2316 try {
2317 passes=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
2318 } catch (Exception ex) {
2319 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage: "
2320 + "-n {n}, n iterations");
2321 }
2322 }
2323 break;
2324 }
2325
2326 // max packing
2327 case 'm':
2328 {
2329 if (gotflag) // preempted?
2330 break;
2331 gotflag=true;
2332 gotc=c;
2333 goPack.setCorners(null,null); // null corner info; mode to MAX_PACK
2334 goPack.setMode(GOpacker.MAX_PACK); // default
2335
2336 // Is this a sphere? then handled with a punctured face
2337 // set bdry rad/centers (if there are 3 bdry verts)
2338 if (goPack.setSphBdry()>0)
2339 goPack.setMode(GOpacker.FIXED_BDRY);
2340
2341 if (items.size()>0) { // passes specified?
2342 try {
2343 passes=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
2344 } catch (Exception ex) {
2345 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage: "
2346 + "-n {n}, n iterations");
2347 }
2348 }
2349 break;
2350 }
2351
2352 // harmonic layout, i.e., fixed boundary radii/centers
2353 case 'h':
2354 {
2355 if (gotflag) // preempted?
2356 break;
2357 if (packData.hes!=0)
2358 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage: "
2359 + "-h is only for euclidean packings");
2360 gotflag=true;
2361 gotc=c;
2362 goPack.setMode(GOpacker.FIXED_BDRY);
2363
2364 if (items.size()>0) { // passes specified?
2365 try {
2366 passes=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
2367 } catch (Exception ex) {
2368 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage: "
2369 + "-n {n}, n iterations");
2370 }
2371 }
2372 break;
2373 }
2374 // give 3 or more corners for polygonal packing;
2375 // get 'passes' via -n flag
2376 case 'b':
2377 {
2378 int n=0;
2379 try {
2380 n=Integer.parseInt(str.substring(2));
2381 if (n<3)
2382 throw new ParserException("GOpack: usage "
2383 + "-c {v1 v2 v3 ..}. Must be at least 3 "
2384 + "corner verts");
2385 int []pCorners=new int[n];
2386 double []pAngles=null;
2387 int m=items.size();
2388 NodeLink crns=null;
2389 if (m==1) { // must be something like 'Vlist'
2390 crns=new NodeLink(packData,items);
2391 if (crns!=null) {
2392 m=crns.size();
2393 if (m!=n)
2394 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage: "
2395 + "corner specification error");
2396 for (int i=0;i<m;i++)
2397 pCorners[i]=crns.get(i);
2398 }
2399 }
2400 else if (m<n)
2401 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage -c problem");
2402
2403 else { // read n corner vertices and (possibly) n angles
2404
2405 for (int i=0;i<n;i++)
2406 pCorners[i]=Integer.parseInt(items.get(i));
2407 // read n corner interior angles theta/pi
2408 // (default to pi-2pi/n)
2409 if (m>n) {
2410 if (m<2*n)
2411 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage "
2412 + "-c problem");
2413 pAngles=new double[n];
2414 for (int i=0;i<n;i++)
2415 pAngles[i]=Double.parseDouble(items.get(n+i));
2416 }
2417 }
2418
2419 // set corner data up, mode to POLY_PACK
2420 count +=goPack.setCorners(pCorners,pAngles);
2421
2422 } catch (Exception ex) {
2423 throw new ParserException("GOpack: usage -c, "
2424 + "failure to read corner vert");
2425 }
2426 count++;
2427 break;
2428 }
2429
2430 case 'l': // testing bdry layout
2431 {
2432 if (gotflag)
2433 break;
2434 gotflag=true;
2435 gotc=c;
2436 break;
2437 }
2438 // get 'passes'
2439 case 'n':
2440 {
2441 try {
2442 passes=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
2443 } catch (Exception ex) {
2444 throw new ParserException("GOpack usage: "
2445 + "-n {n}, n iterations");
2446 }
2447 count++;
2448 break;
2449 }
2450
2451 // print the l2 quality
2452 case 'q':
2453 {
2454 double results=goPack.l2quality(.001);
2455 CirclePack.cpb.msg("GOpack quality result: "+results);
2456 count++;
2457 break;
2458 }
2459
2460 // close the GOpacker
2461 case 'x':
2462 {
2463 if (packData.rePacker!=null) {
2464 double results=goPack.l2quality(.001);
2465 CirclePack.cpb.msg("exiting 'GOpack', last "
2466 + "quality reading: "+results);
2467 packData.rePacker=null;
2468 }
2469 return 1;
2470 }
2471
2472 // status of packer?
2473 case '?':
2474 {
2475 CirclePack.cpb.msg(goPack.getStatus());
2476 break;
2477 }
2478
2479 } // end switch
2480 }
2481
2482 else { // no flags, only thing here should be 'passes'
2483
2484 try {
2485 passes=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
2486 } catch(Exception ex) {
2487 passes=defaultPasses;
2488 }
2489 }
2490
2491 } // end of while through flag sequences
2492
2493 if (gotflag) {
2494 switch(gotc) {
2495 case 'r':
2496 {
2497 count+=goPack.reStartRiffle(passes);
2498 CirclePack.cpb.msg("GOpack restarted using data "
2499 + "from the packing, "+count+" cycles");
2500 break;
2501 }
2502 case 'm':
2503 {
2504 count+=goPack.continueRiffle(passes);
2505 CirclePack.cpb.msg("GOpack continued for max packing, "+
2506 count+" cycles");
2507 break;
2508 }
2509 case 'c':
2510 {
2511 count+=goPack.continueRiffle(passes);
2512 CirclePack.cpb.msg("GOpack continued with its own data, "+count+" cycles");
2513 break;
2514 }
2515 case 'h': // do harmonic layout
2516 {
2517 count += goPack.layoutCenters();
2518 CirclePack.cpb.msg("GOpack: harmonic layout of local "
2519 + "'centers' based on bdry and 'radii'");
2520 break;
2521 }
2522 case 'l': // layout boundary only
2523 {
2524 count +=goPack.layoutBdry();
2525 goPack.reapResults();
2526 break;
2527 }
2528 } // end of switch
2529 }
2530
2531 return count;
2532 }
2533 break;
2534 } // end of 'g'
2535 case 'h':
2536 {
2537 // =========== h_g_bar ===========
2538 if (cmd.startsWith("h_g_bar")) {
2539 PackData Hp=CPBase.cpDrawing[0].getPackData();
2540 PackData Gp=CPBase.cpDrawing[1].getPackData();
2541
2542 // check: status? euclidean? same size?
2543 if (HarmonicMap.ck_size(Hp,Gp)==0) {
2544 return 0;
2545 }
2546
2547 // TODO: may want options to enforce these properties
2548 /*
2549 KData []HK_ptr=Hp.kData;
2550 RData []HR_ptr=Hp.rData;
2551 RData []GR_ptr=Gp.rData;
2552
2553 for (j=1;(j<=Hp.nodeCount && hit==0);j++) {
2554 // bdry radii must be larger in Hp
2555 if (HK_ptr[j].bdryFlag!=0) {
2556 if (GR_ptr[j].rad>HR_ptr[j].rad) hit++;
2557 }
2558 // Hp should be locally univalent
2559 else if (Math.abs(HR_ptr[j].curv-2.0*Math.PI)>.0001) {
2560 hit++;
2561 }
2562 }
2563 if (hit>0) // problem data
2564 CirclePack.cpb.msg("h_g_bar: failure: either radii of "+
2565 "p1 not all less than p0 or else p0 is not locally univalent\n");
2566 */
2567
2568 // duplicate p0 in p2, then update centers/radii
2569 int holdPNum=packData.packNum;
2570 PackData tmpPD=Hp.copyPackTo();
2571 CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(tmpPD,2,false);
2572 if (holdPNum==2)
2573 packData=CPBase.cpDrawing[2].getPackData();
2574
2575 for (int v=1;v<=tmpPD.nodeCount;v++) {
2576 packData.setCenter(v,Hp.getCenter(v).add(Gp.getCenter(v).conj()));
2577 }
2578
2579 jexecute(CPBase.packings[2],"set_screen -a");
2580 CirclePack.cpb.msg("h_g_bar: p2 contains the data for h+conj(g)");
2581 return 1;
2582 }
2583
2584 // =========== h_g_add ===========
2585 if (cmd.startsWith("h_g_add")) {
2586 PackData Hp=CPBase.cpDrawing[0].getPackData();
2587 PackData Gp=CPBase.cpDrawing[1].getPackData();
2588
2589 // check: status? euclidean? same size?
2590 if (HarmonicMap.ck_size(Hp,Gp)==0) {
2591 return 0;
2592 }
2593
2594 // duplicate p0 in p2, then update centers/redii
2595 int holdPNum=packData.packNum;
2596 PackData tmpPD=Hp.copyPackTo();
2597 CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(tmpPD,2,false);
2598 if (holdPNum==2)
2599 packData=CPBase.packings[2];
2600
2601 // TODO: only want rad/center
2602 for (int v=1;v<=tmpPD.nodeCount;v++) {
2603 tmpPD.setRadius(v,Hp.getRadius(v)+Gp.getRadius(v));
2604 tmpPD.setCenter(v,Hp.getCenter(v).add(Gp.getCenter(v)));
2605 }
2606
2607 jexecute(CPBase.packings[2],"set_screen -a");
2608 CirclePack.cpb.msg("h_g_add: p2 contains the data for h+conj(g)");
2609 return 1;
2610 }
2611 break;
2612 } // end of 'h'
2613 case 'i':
2614 {
2615 break;
2616 } // end of 'i'
2617 case 'j':
2618 {
2619 // =========== j_ftn ==============
2620 // OBE: call "create j_ftn ..."
2621 if (cmd.startsWith("j_ftn")) {
2622 StringBuilder strbld=new StringBuilder("create j_ftn ");
2623 Iterator<String> sis=items.iterator();
2624 while (sis.hasNext()) {
2625 strbld.append(sis.next()+" ");
2626 }
2627 return jexecute(packData,strbld.toString());
2628 }
2629 break;
2630 } // end of 'j'
2631 case 'k':
2632 {
2633 break;
2634 } // end of 'k'
2635 case 'l':
2636 {
2637 // ============== load_pack =======
2638 if (cmd.startsWith("load_pac")) {
2639 File theFile;
2640 boolean swdir=true;
2641 // '-f' flag means do not change directory
2642 try {
2643// items=flagSegs.get(0);
2644 if (items.get(0).startsWith("-f"))
2645 swdir=false;
2646 } catch (Exception ex) {
2647 }
2648 if ((theFile=FileDialogs.loadDialog(FileDialogs.FILE,swdir))!=null) {
2649 try {
2650 jexecute(packData,"disp -w");
2651 jexecute(packData,"Read " + theFile);
2652 packData.setName(theFile.getName());
2653 packData.cpDrawing.repaint();
2654 } catch (Exception ex) {
2655 throw new ParserException("failed in loading file: "+ex.getMessage());
2656 }
2657 count++;
2658 return packData.nodeCount;
2659 }
2660 return 0;
2661 }
2662 break;
2663 } // end of 'l'
2664 case 'm':
2665 {
2666 // ============ map ====================
2667 if (cmd.startsWith("map")) {
2668 if (packData.vertexMap==null || packData.vertexMap.size()==0) {
2669 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(
2670 "usage 'map': packing has no 'vertexMap'");
2671 return 0;
2672 }
2673
2674 // check for/remove 'reverse' flag -r
2675 boolean reverse=false;
2676 String str=items.get(0);
2677 if (str.startsWith("-r")) {
2678 reverse=true;
2679 items.remove(0);
2680 if (items.size()==0) { // there must be later flags
2681 flagSegs.remove(0);
2682 }
2683 }
2684
2685 // there should be one action to process
2686 items=flagSegs.get(0);
2687 str=items.get(0);
2688
2689 // faces?
2690 if (str.startsWith("-f")) {
2691 items.remove(0);
2692 boolean trans2q=false;
2693 int qnum=-1;
2694 if (items.size()==0) { // must be -q flag
2695 items=flagSegs.get(1);
2696 if ((qnum=StringUtil.qItemParse(items))>=0 &&
2697 qnum<CPBase.NUM_PACKS &&
2698 CPBase.packings[qnum].status) {
2699 trans2q=true;
2700 items.remove(0);
2701 }
2702 else {
2703 throw new ParserException(
2704 "usage: 'map -f -q{p} {f..}' parsing failure");
2705 }
2706 }
2707
2708 FaceLink flink=new FaceLink(packData,items);
2709 if (trans2q) {
2710 PackData qdata=CPBase.packings[qnum];
2711 CPBase.Flink=new FaceLink(packData);
2712 Iterator<Integer> fis=flink.iterator();
2713 while (fis.hasNext()) {
2714 int f=fis.next();
2715 HalfEdge he=packData.packDCEL.faces[f].edge;
2716 int wa=-1;
2717 int wb=-1;
2718 if (reverse) {
2719 wa=packData.vertexMap.findV(he.origin.vertIndx);
2720 wb=packData.vertexMap.findV(he.twin.origin.vertIndx);
2721 }
2722 else {
2723 wa=packData.vertexMap.findW(he.origin.vertIndx);
2724 wb=packData.vertexMap.findW(he.twin.origin.vertIndx);
2725 }
2726 HalfEdge qedge=qdata.packDCEL.findHalfEdge(wa,wb);
2727 if (qedge!=null) {
2728 CPBase.Flink.add(qedge.face.faceIndx);
2729 count++;
2730 }
2731 }
2732 }
2733 else {
2734 CPBase.Flink=flink;
2735 count += flink.size();
2736 }
2737 return count;
2738 } // done with face case
2739
2740 // reaching here, must be vertices w or w/o flag
2741 if (str.startsWith("-v") || str.startsWith("-c")) {
2742 items.remove(0); // shuck this flag
2743 if (items.size()==0)
2744 throw new ParserException(
2745 "usage 'map': no vertices listed");
2746 }
2747
2748 NodeLink vlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
2749 CPBase.Vlink=new NodeLink();
2750 Iterator<Integer> vis=vlist.iterator();
2751 while (vis.hasNext()) {
2752 int v=vis.next();
2753 int w=-1;
2754 if (reverse) {
2755 w=packData.vertexMap.findV(v);
2756 }
2757 else
2758 w=packData.vertexMap.findW(v);
2759 if (w>0) {
2760 CPBase.Vlink.add(w);
2761 count++;
2762 }
2763 }
2764 return count;
2765 }
2766
2767
2768
2769 // ============ mode_change =============
2770 else if (cmd.startsWith("mode_chan")) {
2771 String str=null;
2772 try {
2773 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.remove(0);
2774 str=items.get(0);
2775 for (int j=0;j<CursorCtrl.scriptModes.size();j++) {
2776 MyCanvasMode mcm=CursorCtrl.scriptModes.get(j);
2777 if (str.equals(mcm.nameString)) {
2778 PackControl.activeFrame.mainToolHandler.setCanvasMode(mcm);
2779 return 1;
2780 }
2781 }
2782 } catch(Exception ex) {} // go to default
2783 PackControl.activeFrame.mainToolHandler.setCanvasMode(ActiveWrapper.defaultMode);
2784 return 1;
2785 }
2786 // ============ msg =============
2787 else if (cmd.startsWith("msg") ||
2788 cmd.startsWith("messa")) {
2789 if (flagSegs.size()>0) {
2790 StringBuilder strbld=
2791 new StringBuilder(); items=flagSegs.get(0);
2792 for (int j=0;j<items.size();j++) {
2793 strbld.append(items.get(j));
2794 strbld.append(" ");
2795 }
2796
2797 CirclePack.cpb.msg(strbld.toString());
2798 return 1;
2799 }
2800 return 0;
2801 }
2802
2803 break;
2804 }
2805 case 'M':
2806 {
2807// if (cmd.startsWith("mlhistodegree")) {
2808// MatLabActions.DegreeHistoPlot(packData);
2809// }
2810 // =========== Map ============
2811 if (cmd.startsWith("Map")) { // expect p q [flagged options]
2812 PackData p=null,q=null;
2813 int pnm,qnm;
2814
2815 // first check for options not requiring p q.
2816 try {
2817 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.remove(0);
2818 String str=(String)items.remove(0);
2819 if (str.startsWith("-x")) {
2820 PackControl.mapCanvasAction(false);
2821 return 1;
2822 }
2823 if (str.startsWith("-o")) { // open with current packings
2824 PackControl.mapCanvasAction(true);
2825 return 1;
2826 }
2827 if (str.startsWith(("-t"))) { // teleTool
2828 if (str.startsWith("-tNO")) {
2829 PackControl.mapPairFrame.setTeleState(false);
2830 }
2831 else if (str.startsWith("-tYES")) {
2832 PackControl.mapPairFrame.setTeleState(true);
2833 }
2834 return 1;
2835 }
2836
2837 // otherwise, find the specified p and q
2838 pnm=Integer.parseInt(str);
2839 qnm=Integer.parseInt((String)items.remove(0));
2840 if (pnm<0 || pnm>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS || qnm<0 || qnm>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS)
2841 throw new ParserException();
2842 p=CPBase.cpDrawing[pnm].getPackData();
2843 q=CPBase.cpDrawing[qnm].getPackData();
2844 } catch (Exception ex) {
2845 throw new ParserException("usage: Map p q [options]");
2846 }
2847
2848 // no other data? default to open (if not open) or resetting pack numbers
2849 if (flagSegs.size()==0) {
2850 PackControl.openMap(pnm,qnm);
2851 return 1;
2852 }
2853
2854 // otherwise, parse remaining data.
2855 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagSegs.iterator();
2856 String str=null;
2857 while (its.hasNext()) {
2858 items=(Vector<String>)its.next();
2859 str=(String)items.remove(0);
2860 switch(str.charAt(1)) {
2861 case 'x': // close map windows
2862 {
2863 PackControl.mapCanvasAction(false);
2864 return 1;
2865 }
2866 case 'o': // open map windows
2867 {
2868 PackControl.mapPairFrame.setDomainNum(pnm);
2869 PackControl.mapPairFrame.setRangeNum(qnm);
2870 PackControl.mapCanvasAction(true);
2871 count++;
2872 break;
2873 }
2874 // NOTE: these don't effect 'PairedFrame' or its packings
2875 case 'f': // faces
2876 {
2877 FaceLink facelist=new FaceLink(p,items);
2878 Iterator<Integer> flist=facelist.iterator();
2879 int f;
2880 while (flist.hasNext()) {
2881 f=(Integer)flist.next();
2882 count+=p.face_map_action(q,f,true);
2883 }
2884 break;
2885 }
2886 case 'c': // circles
2887 case 'v': // circles
2888 {
2889 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(p,items);
2890 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
2891 int v;
2892 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
2893 v=(Integer)vlist.next();
2894 count+=p.circle_map_action(q,v,true);
2895 }
2896 break;
2897 }
2898 } // end of switch
2899 } // end of while
2900 return count;
2901 }
2902 // ============ mode_change =============
2903 else if (cmd.startsWith("mode_chan")) {
2904 String str=null;
2905 try {
2906 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.remove(0);
2907 str=items.get(0);
2908 for (int j=0;j<CursorCtrl.scriptModes.size();j++) {
2909 MyCanvasMode mcm=CursorCtrl.scriptModes.get(j);
2910 if (str.equals(mcm.nameString)) {
2911 PackControl.activeFrame.mainToolHandler.setCanvasMode(mcm);
2912 return 1;
2913 }
2914 }
2915 } catch(Exception ex) {} // go to default
