2916 PackControl.activeFrame.mainToolHandler.setCanvasMode(ActiveWrapper.defaultMode);
2917 return 1;
2918 }
2919 break;
2920 } // end of 'm' and 'M'
2921 case 'n': // fall through
2922 {
2923 // ============ necklace ============
2924 if (cmd.startsWith("neckl")) {
2925// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); //
2926 int n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
2927
2928 // TODO: set up flags to designate mode 1. Currently
2929 // default to mode 2 (original two-end construction)
2930 // Note: Integer is for debugging seed.
2931 PackData pdata=PackCreation.randNecklace(n,2,(Integer)null);
2932
2933 if (pdata!=null) {
2934 int pnum=packData.packNum;
2935 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(pdata,pnum,false);
2936 return 1;
2937 }
2938 return 0;
2939 }
2940 break;
2941 }
2942 case 'N':
2943 {
2944 break;
2945 } // end of 'n' and 'N'
2946 case 'o':
2947 {
2948 // ========== open ===========
2949 if (cmd.startsWith("open") && CPBase.GUImode!=0) {
2950 // default to 'active'
2951 if (items==null || items.size()==0) {
2952 PackControl.mapCanvasAction(true);
2953 PackControl.activeFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
2954 count++;
2955 }
2956 Iterator<String> ws=items.iterator();
2957 while (ws.hasNext()) {
2958 String windStr=ws.next().toLowerCase();
2959
2960 if (windStr.startsWith("adv")) {
2961 if (PackControl.frame.getState() == JFrame.ICONIFIED)
2962 PackControl.frame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
2963 PackControl.frame.setVisible(true);
2964 }
2965 else if (windStr.startsWith("act")) { // active packing single window mode
2966 PackControl.mapCanvasAction(false);
2967 PackControl.activeFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
2968 }
2969 else if (windStr.startsWith("pair") || windStr.startsWith("map")) { // dual screen mode
2970 PackControl.mapCanvasAction(true);
2971 PackControl.mapPairFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
2972 }
2973 else if (windStr.startsWith("hel")) { // help frame
2974 PackControl.helpHover.lockframe();
2975 PackControl.helpHover.hoverFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
2976 }
2977 else if (windStr.startsWith("inf")) { // info frame
2978 PackControl.packDataHover.setLocked(true);
2979 PackControl.packDataHover.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
2980 }
2981 else if (windStr.startsWith("scre")) { // Screen frame; must preceed 'scr'
2982 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.setTab(1); // show screen shots
2983 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.setVisible(true);
2984 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
2985 }
2986 else if (windStr.startsWith("mes") || windStr.startsWith("msg")) {
2987 // if iconified, bring it up
2988 if (PackControl.msgHover.isLocked() &&
2989 PackControl.msgHover.lockedFrame.getState() == JFrame.ICONIFIED)
2990 PackControl.msgHover.lockedFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
2991 PackControl.msgHover.lockframe();
2992 }
2993 else if (windStr.startsWith("conf")) {
2994 PackControl.prefFrame=PackControl.preferences.displayPreferencesWindow();
2995 PackControl.prefFrame.setVisible(true);
2996 }
2997 else if (windStr.startsWith("scr")) {
2998 // if iconified, bring it up
2999 if (PackControl.scriptHover.isLocked() &&
3000 PackControl.scriptHover.lockedFrame.getState() == JFrame.ICONIFIED)
3001 PackControl.scriptHover.lockedFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
3002 else {
3003 PackControl.scriptHover.lockframe();
3004 PackControl.scriptHover.locked = true;
3005 }
3006 }
3007 else if (windStr.startsWith("fun")) {
3008 PackControl.newftnFrame.setVisible(true);
3009 PackControl.newftnFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
3010 }
3011 else if (windStr.startsWith("mob")) {
3012 PackControl.mobiusFrame.setVisible(true);
3013 PackControl.mobiusFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
3014 }
3015 // TODO: suspend until browser is fixed
3016// else if (windStr.startsWith("www") || windStr.startsWith("bro")) {
3017// PackControl.browserFrame.setVisible(true);
3018// PackControl.browserFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
3019// }
3020 else if (windStr.startsWith("abo")) {
3021 PackControl.aboutFrame.openAbout();
3022 }
3023 else if (windStr.startsWith("sav")) { // save frame
3024 PackControl.outputFrame.setVisible(true);
3025 PackControl.outputFrame.setState(Frame.NORMAL);
3026 }
3027
3028 } // end of while
3029 return 1;
3030 }
3031
3032 // ========== overlay ========
3033 else if (cmd.startsWith("overla")) {
3034
3035 PackData qackData=null;
3036 CPdrawing qCPS=null;
3037 try { // try to read (and remove) -q{p} flag
3038 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
3039 if (items.size()==1)
3040 flagSegs.remove(0);
3041 else
3042 items.remove(0);
3043 String st=(String)items.get(0);
3044 qackData=PackControl.
3045 cpDrawing[StringUtil.qFlagParse(st)].
3046 getPackData();
3047 qCPS=qackData.cpDrawing;
3048 if (qackData==null || qCPS==null)
3049 throw new ParserException();
3050 } catch (Exception ex) {
3051 throw new ParserException("'overlay' failed");
3052 }
3053
3054 items=flagSegs.get(0);
3055 // -w and -w are removed, no effect
3056 String fs=items.get(0);
3057 if (fs.startsWith("-w")) {
3058 flagSegs.remove(0);
3059 }
3060
3061 // No flag strings? use dispOptions
3062 // (DisplayPanel (checkboxes or tailored string))
3063 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
3064 Vector<String> all=StringUtil.
3065 string2vec(packData.cpDrawing.
3066 dispOptions.toString(),false);
3067 Vector<Vector<String>> flgseg=StringUtil.
3068 flagSeg(all);
3069 count +=DisplayParser.
3070 dispParse(packData,qCPS,flgseg);
3071 }
3072
3073 // send for parsing/execution
3074 else {
3075 count +=DisplayParser.
3076 dispParse(packData,qCPS,flagSegs);
3077 }
3078 if (count>0)
3079 PackControl.canvasRedrawer.
3080 paintMyCanvasses(qackData,false);
3081 return count;
3082 }
3083 break;
3084 } // end of 'o'
3085 case 'p':
3086 {
3087 // ============ path_Mobius ============
3088 if (cmd.startsWith("path_Mob") || cmd.startsWith("path_mob")) {
3089 CPBase.ClosedPath=Mobius.path_Mobius(CPBase.Mob,
3090 CPBase.ClosedPath,true);
3091 return 1;
3092 }
3093
3094 // =============== pave ================
3095 if (cmd.startsWith("pave")) {
3096
3097 // get the seed tile barycenter vertex
3098 int V=-1;
3099 try {
3100 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
3101 V=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,items.get(0));
3102 } catch (Exception ex) {
3103 V=packData.activeNode;
3104 }
3105 if (V<1 || V>packData.nodeCount)
3106 V=packData.getAlpha();
3107
3108 TileData td=TileData.paveMe(packData,V);
3109 if (td==null)
3110 return 0;
3111 td.setParent(packData);
3112 packData.tileData=td;
3113 return td.tileCount;
3114 }
3115
3116 // ============ perronDown ============
3117 if (cmd.startsWith("perron")) {
3118 if (packData.hes>0 || packData.haveInvDistances()) {
3119 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("'perron' methods only apply "+
3120 "to eucl/hyp packings without overlaps");
3121 return 0;
3122 }
3123
3124 int passes=2000;
3125 int direction=0;
3126 items=null;
3127 Iterator<Vector<String>> fsegs=flagSegs.iterator();
3128 while (fsegs.hasNext()) {
3129 items=fsegs.next();
3130 String str=items.get(0);
3131 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
3132 items.remove(0);
3133 char c=str.charAt(1);
3134 switch(c) {
3135 case 'd': // downward only
3136 {
3137 direction=-1;
3138 break;
3139 }
3140 case 'D': // down/up (usual "upward" Perron, a la Beardon/Stephenson)
3141 {
3142 direction=-2;
3143 break;
3144 }
3145 case 'u': // upward only
3146 {
3147 direction=1;
3148 break;
3149 }
3150 case 'U': // up/down (usual "downward" Perron, a la Bowers)
3151 {
3152 direction=2;
3153 break;
3154 }
3155 } // end of switch
3156 }
3157 }
3158
3159 // item should still contain 'passes', if given
3160 try {
3161 passes=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
3162 } catch(Exception ex) {
3163 passes=2000;
3164 }
3165
3166 double []perronResults=new double[4];
3167
3168
3169 if (packData.hes<0)
3170 perronResults=HypPacker.hypPerron(packData,direction, passes);
3171
3172 else
3173 perronResults=EuclPacker.euclPerron(packData,direction, passes);
3174
3175 if (perronResults[0]<0) {
3176 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Perron failed: deficiencies: \n"+
3177 "up "+perronResults[1]+", down "+perronResults[2]+", error "+perronResults[3]);
3178 return 0;
3179 }
3180 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Perron count = "+(int)perronResults[0]+": deficiencies: \n"+
3181 "up "+perronResults[1]+", down "+perronResults[2]+", error "+perronResults[3]);
3182 return 1;
3183 }
3184
3185 // ============= pdata ==================
3186 else if (cmd.startsWith("pdat")) {
3187 PackControl.packDataHover.update(packData);
3188 return 1;
3189 }
3190
3191 // ============= polypack =============
3192 else if (cmd.startsWith("polyp")) {
3193 int ccount=0;
3194 boolean useC=true;
3195 if (items.get(0).equals("-o"))
3196 useC=false;
3197 NodeLink clink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
3198 try {
3199 Iterator<Integer> clk=clink.iterator();
3200 while (clk.hasNext()) {
3201 if (!packData.isBdry(clk.next()))
3202 throw new DataException();
3203 ccount++;
3204 }
3205 if (ccount<3)
3206 throw new DataException();
3207 } catch(Exception ex) {
3208 throw new DataException();
3209 }
3210
3211 // repack/layout/display
3212 return EuclPacker.polyPack(packData,clink,useC);
3213 }
3214
3215 // ========== pwd =============
3216 else if (cmd.startsWith("pwd")) {
3217 try {
3218 CirclePack.cpb.msg(CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.getCanonicalPath());
3219 } catch (IOException iox) {
3220 throw new ParserException("failed to get working directory.");
3221 }
3222 return 1;
3223 }
3224 break;
3225 } // end of 'p'
3226 case 'q': // fall through
3227 case 'Q':
3228 {
3229 // ============ quit ===============
3230 if (cmd.equals("quit")) {
3231 // AF: Changed to use exit function.
3232 ((PackControl) CirclePack.cpb).queryUserForQuit();
3233 }
3234 break;
3235 } // end of 'q' and 'Q'
3236 case 'r': // fall through
3237 case 'R':
3238 {
3239 // =========== rand_pt_read =======
3240 if (cmd.startsWith("rand_pt_r")) {
3241// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
3242 String filename=StringUtil.reconItem(items);
3243 File dir=CPFileManager.PackingDirectory;
3244 BufferedReader fp=
3245 CPFileManager.openReadFP(dir,filename,false);
3246 if (fp==null) {
3247 throw new InOutException("failed to open "+filename+
3248 ", directory "+dir.toString());
3249 }
3250 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
3251 RandomTriangulation.readPoints(fp,uP);
3252 if (uP.errval<0)
3253 throw new ParserException("failed to read points");
3254 int hes=0;
3255 if (uP.rtnFlag==3) // points should be (theta,phi)
3256 hes=1;
3257
3258 DelaunayData dData=null;
3259 try {
3260 dData=new DelaunayData(hes,uP.z_vec);
3261 if (hes>0)
3262 ProcessDelaunay.sphDelaunay(dData);
3263 else
3264 ProcessDelaunay.planeDelaunay(dData);
3265 } catch (Exception ex) {
3266 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("randomHypTriangulation failed: "
3267 +ex.getMessage());
3268 return 0;
3269 }
3270
3271 // ============= create the triangulation
3272 Triangulation Tri = dData.getTriangulation();
3273 int heS=dData.geometry;
3274 PackData randPack=Triangulation.tri_to_Complex(Tri,heS);
3275 if (randPack==null) {
3276 throw new CombException("'tri_to_Complex' failed");
3277 }
3278
3279 // put new packing in place
3280 randPack.fileName=new String(filename);
3281 int pnum=packData.packNum;
3282 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(randPack,pnum,false);
3283 packData.hes=heS;
3284 packData.chooseAlpha();
3285 packData.chooseGamma();
3286 packData.set_aim_default();
3287 packData.set_rad_default();
3288 return packData.nodeCount;
3289 }
3290
3291 // =========== rand_tri =========
3292 if (cmd.startsWith("rand_tri") || cmd.startsWith("random_tri")) {
3293 boolean seed1=false; // true for debug so random seed is not called
3294 int randN=200;
3295 int heS=0; // default geometry to set
3296 Vector<Vector<String>> newFS=null;
3297
3298 // these are turned off by default; flags can activate one or more
3299 double aspect=0.0; // not set
3300 Path2D.Double Gamma=null;
3301 Complex Tau=null;
3302
3303 // check for (and remove) "-d" flag: seed=(long)1 for debugging
3304 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0) {
3305 // create a replacement vector of flag sequences
3306 newFS=new Vector<Vector<String>>(flagSegs.size());
3307 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagSegs.iterator();
3308 while (its.hasNext()) {
3309 items=(Vector<String>)its.next();
3310 String str=(String)items.get(0);
3311 if (str.startsWith("-d")) {
3312 seed1=true;
3313 items.remove(0);
3314 }
3315 if (items.size()>0)
3316 newFS.add(items);
3317 }
3318 if (newFS.size()==0)
3319 newFS=null;
3320 }
3321
3322 // having removed any -d flag, check for others
3323 flagSegs=newFS;
3324 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0) {
3325 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagSegs.iterator();
3326 while (its.hasNext()) {
3327 items=(Vector<String>)its.next();
3328 String str=(String)items.remove(0);
3329 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
3330 switch (str.charAt(1)) {
3331 case 'd': // debug; should have been handled
3332 {
3333 break;
3334 }
3335 case 'A': // given aspect ratio
3336 {
3337 aspect=1.0; // default
3338 try {
3339 aspect=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
3340 } catch (Exception ex) {
3341 throw new ParserException("usage: -A <a>");
3342 }
3343 break;
3344 }
3345 case 'g': // using a path: either default or 'filename'
3346 {
3347 if (CPBase.ClosedPath!=null)
3348 Gamma=CPBase.ClosedPath;
3349 try {
3350 if (str.length()>2 && str.charAt(2)=='s') // from script
3351 Gamma=PathManager.readpath(StringUtil.reconItem(items),true);
3352 else
3353 Gamma=PathManager.readpath(StringUtil.reconItem(items),false);
3354 } catch (Exception ex) {
3355 }
3356 if (Gamma==null) {
3357 throw new ParserException("usage: -g[s] <filename>");
3358 }
3359 break;
3360 }
3361 case 'S': // Sphere
3362 {
3363 int n=200;
3364 try {
3365 n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
3366 } catch (Exception ex) {
3367 throw new ParserException("usage: -S <n>");
3368 }
3369 if (n<12) n=12;
3370 randN=n;
3371 heS=1;
3372 break;
3373 }
3374 case 'T': // torus, read Tau (eventually as COMPLEX) or default
3375 {
3376 Tau=new Complex(.5,Math.sqrt(2.0)); // default
3377 if (items.size()>1) {
3378 try {
3379 Tau.x=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(0));
3380 Tau.y=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(1));
3381 } catch (Exception ex) {
3382 throw new ParserException("usage: -T z.x z.y");
3383 }
3384 }
3385 break;
3386 }
3387 case 'u': // unit disc
3388 {
3389 Gamma=PathUtil.getCirclePath(1.0,new Complex(0.0),128);
3390 break;
3391 }
3392 case 'N': // number of interior random points; default 200
3393 {
3394 int n=200;
3395 try {
3396 n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
3397 } catch (Exception ex) {
3398 throw new ParserException("usage: -N <n>");
3399 }
3400 if (n<12) n=12;
3401 randN=n;
3402 break;
3403 }
3404 case 'Z': // zigzag method
3405 {
3406 if (CPBase.ClosedPath==null)
3407 throw new ParserException(
3408 "usage: there must be a current path");
3409 int n=200;
3410 try {
3411 n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
3412 } catch (Exception ex) {
3413 throw new ParserException("usage: -Z <n>");
3414 }
3415 if (n<12) n=12;
3416 randN=n;
3417 break;
3418 }
3419 } // end of switch
3420 }
3421 } // end of while
3422 } // end of checking flags
3423
3424 PackData randPack=null;
3425 // default case?
3426 if (heS<=0 && aspect<=0 && Tau==null && Gamma==null) {
3427 randPack=RandomTriangulation.randomHypKomplex(randN,seed1);
3428 if (randPack==null) {
3429 throw new CombException(
3430 "Random disc packing has failed");
3431 }
3432 heS=-1;
3433 }
3434 else {
3435 Triangulation Tri=RandomTriangulation.random_Triangulation(randN,seed1,
3436 heS,aspect,Gamma,Tau);
3437 if (Tri==null) {
3438 throw new CombException("random_Triangulation failed");
3439 }
3440
3441 try {
3442 randPack=Triangulation.tri_to_Complex(Tri,heS);
3443 if (randPack==null) {
3444 throw new CombException("'tri_to_Complex' failed");
3445 }
3446
3447 // "prune" the packing
3448 CombDCEL.pruneDCEL(randPack.packDCEL);
3449 randPack.packDCEL.fixDCEL(randPack);
3450 } catch (Exception ex) {
3451 throw new DataException("tri_to_Complex failed: "+ex.getMessage());
3452 }
3453 }
3454
3455 // put new packing in place
3456 randPack.fileName=new String("rand_pack");
3457 int pnum=packData.packNum;
3458 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(randPack,pnum,false);
3459 packData.hes=heS;
3460
3461 // for rectangles, 1,2,3,4 are to be the corners
3462 if (aspect>0.0 && Tau==null && Gamma==null) {
3463 double a2=aspect*aspect;
3464 double Asp_x=Math.sqrt((a2)/(a2+1.0));
3465 double Asp_y=Math.sqrt(1.0/(a2+1.0));
3466 Complex []corner=new Complex[5];
3467 corner[1]=new Complex(-Asp_x,Asp_y);
3468 corner[2]=new Complex(-Asp_x,-Asp_y);
3469 corner[3]=new Complex(Asp_x,-Asp_y);
3470 corner[4]=new Complex(Asp_x,Asp_y);
3471 int v1=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,"c "+corner[1].x+" "+corner[1].y+" b");
3472 int v2=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,"c "+corner[2].x+" "+corner[2].y+" b");
3473 int v3=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,"c "+corner[3].x+" "+corner[3].y+" b");
3474 int v4=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,"c "+corner[4].x+" "+corner[4].y+" b");
3475 if (v1>0 && v2>0 && v3>0 && v4>0) {
3476 packData.packDCEL.swapNodes(v1,1);
3477 packData.packDCEL.swapNodes(v2,2);
3478 packData.packDCEL.swapNodes(v3,3);
3479 packData.packDCEL.swapNodes(v4,4);
3480 }
3481 }
3482
3483 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
3484 packData.set_aim_default();
3485 packData.set_rad_default();
3486 packData.fillcurves();
3487 packData.set_plotFlags(); // set all to 1
3488
3489 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Created a random packing with "+packData.nodeCount+
3490 " vertices");
3491 return packData.nodeCount;
3492 }
3493
3494 // =========== random_pack =======
3495 if (cmd.startsWith("random_pack")) { // random hyperbolic packing
3496 boolean seed1=false;
3497 int randN=200;
3498 try { // see if count is given
3499// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
3500 String str=(String)items.get(0);
3501 if (str.startsWith("-d")) {
3502 seed1=true;
3503 items.remove(0);
3504 str=items.get(0);
3505 }
3506 randN=Integer.parseInt(str);
3507 if (randN<4)
3508 randN=200;
3509 } catch (Exception ex) {
3510 randN=200;
3511 }
3512
3513 PackData randPack=null;
3514 for (int j=0;j<12;j++) {
3515 try {
3516 if ((randPack=RandomTriangulation.randomHypKomplex(
3517 randN,seed1))!=null) {
3518
3519 // choose alpha far from boundary
3520 int da=randPack.gen_mark(new NodeLink(randPack,"b"),-1,false);
3521 if (da>0)
3522 randPack.setAlpha(da);
3523
3524 // put new packing in place
3525 int pnum=packData.packNum;
3526 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(randPack,pnum,false);
3527 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
3528 jexecute(packData,"max_pack 2000");
3529
3530 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Created a random packing in the disc with "+packData.nodeCount
3531 +" vertices");
3532 return packData.nodeCount;
3533 }
3534 } catch (Exception ex) {}
3535 } // end of for loop
3536
3537 // failed several times?
3538 throw new ParserException("Random triangulation failed 12 times; try more vertices.");
3539 }
3540
3541 // =========== ring (OBE: see ======
3542 else if (cmd.startsWith("ring")) {
3543 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("The 'ring' command has been replaced by 'frackMe'");
3544 return 0;
3545 }
3546
3547 // =========== rld =======
3548 else if (cmd.startsWith("rld")) { // repack, layout, disp
3549 jexecute(packData,"repack");
3550 jexecute(packData,"layout");
3551 jexecute(packData,"disp -wr");
3552 return 1;
3553 }
3554
3555 // =========== rlsd =======
3556 else if (cmd.startsWith("rlsd")) { // repack, layout, disp
3557 if (packData.hes<0) {
3558 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Layout using schwarzians is not "
3559 + "yet allowed in the hyp setting");
3560 return 0;
3561 }
3562 jexecute(packData,"repack");
3563 jexecute(packData,"set_sch");
3564 jexecute(packData,"layout -s");
3565 jexecute(packData,"disp -wr");
3566 return 1;
3567 }
3568
3569 break;
3570 } // end of 'r' and 'R'
3571 case 's':
3572 {
3573
3574 // ============== sch_data ============
3575 if (cmd.startsWith("sch_data")) {
3576
3577 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
3578 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: sch_data d N -f <filename>");
3579 return 0;
3580 }
3581 boolean randdegree=false;
3582 boolean randcenter=false;
3583
3584 StringBuilder header=
3585 new StringBuilder(StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs));
3586
3587 // get filename first
3588 if (!StringUtil.ckTrailingFileName(flagSegs)) {
3589 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("sch_data: missing the file name");
3590 return 0;
3591 }
3592 StringBuilder strbuf=new StringBuilder("");
3593 int code=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs, strbuf);
3594 File file=new File(strbuf.toString());
3595 boolean append=false;
3596 if ((code & 02) == 02) // append
3597 append=true;
3598 BufferedWriter fp=CPFileManager.openWriteFP(
3599 (File)CPFileManager.PackingDirectory,append,
3600 file.getName(),false);
3601
3602 items=flagSegs.get(0);
3603 int d=6;
3604
3605 // catch randomize flag
3606 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
3607 if (items.get(0).contains("r"))
3608 randdegree=true;
3609 if (items.get(0).contains("c"))
3610 randcenter=true;
3611 }
3612
3613 // else d format
3614 else {
3615 try {
3616 d=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
3617 } catch(Exception ex) {
3618 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: sch_data d ...");
3619 return 0;
3620 }
3621 if (d<3) {
3622 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: sch_data d>=3");
3623 return 0;
3624 }
3625 }
3626
3627 // get N
3628 int N=0;
3629 try {
3630 N=Integer.parseInt(items.get(1));
3631 } catch (Exception ex) {
3632 N=0;
3633 }
3634 if (N==0) {
3635 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: sch_data deg N");
3636 N=12;
3637 }
3638
3639 // put in header
3640 try {
3641 fp.write(header.toString());
3642 fp.write("\n\n");
3643 } catch(Exception ex) {}
3644
3645 // run the trials on temp packing
3646 PackData tmpPack=new PackData(null);
3647 if (!randdegree)
3648 jexecute(tmpPack,"seed "+d);
3649 for (int n=1;n<=N;n++) {
3650 if (randdegree) { // reset d in [3,15]
3651 d=util.DegreeDistribution.getRandDegree();
3652 tmpPack=PackCreation.seed(d,0);
3653 }
3654
3655 jexecute(tmpPack,"set_rand -.3 3.0 b");
3656 if (!randcenter)
3657 jexecute(tmpPack,"repack");
3658 jexecute(tmpPack,"set_sch");
3659
3660 HalfEdge he=tmpPack.packDCEL.vertices[1].halfedge;
3661 try {
3662 do {
3663 fp.write(he.getSchwarzian()+" ");
3664 he=he.prev.twin; // cclw
3665 } while (he!=tmpPack.packDCEL.vertices[1].halfedge);
3666 fp.write("\n\n");
3667 } catch (Exception ex) {}
3668 count++;
3669 }
3670 try {
3671 fp.flush();
3672 fp.close();
3673 } catch(Exception ex) {
3674 try{
3675 fp.flush();
3676 fp.close();
3677 } catch(Exception iox) {}
3678 throw new InOutException("failed writing sch_data file");
3679 }
3680
3681 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Wrote schwarzian data to "+
3682 CPFileManager.PackingDirectory+File.separator+
3683 file.getName());
3684
3685 return count;
3686 }
3687
3688 // ============== screendump ============
3689 else if (cmd.startsWith("screend")) {
3690 boolean doCanvas=true;
3691
3692 // if a flag(s) is given, then don't do a screendump, must call again
3693 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0) {
3694 Iterator<Vector<String>> fseg=flagSegs.iterator();
3695 while (fseg.hasNext()) {
3696 items=fseg.next();
3697 String str=items.remove(0);
3698 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
3699 try {
3700 switch(str.charAt(1)) {
3701 case 'm': // flag to do Map pair instead of active
3702 {
3703 doCanvas=false;
3704 break;
3705 }
3706 case 'd': // set directory
3707 {
3708 String newdir=items.get(0);
3709 if (newdir.startsWith("~")) {
3710 String pl=null;
3711 if (newdir.length()>1)
3712 pl=newdir.substring(1);
3713 else pl="";
3714 try {
3715 newdir=new String(CPFileManager.HomeDirectory.getCanonicalPath()+
3716 File.separator+pl);
3717 } catch(Exception ex) {
3718 newdir=new String(System.getProperty("java.io.tmpdir"));
3719 }
3720 }
3721 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.imagePanel.setDirectory(newdir);
3722 break;
3723 }
3724 case 'b': // set file name root
3725 {
3726 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.imagePanel.setNameField(items.get(0));
3727 break;
3728 }
3729 case 'n': // set slide counter (caution: may end up overwriting)
3730 {
3731 double nbr=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
3732 ScreenShotPanel.imageCount=(int)Math.abs(nbr);
3733 break;
3734 }
3735 } // end of switch
3736 } catch (Exception ex) {
3737 throw new ParserException("error in flags");
3738 }
3739 }
3740
3741 } // end of while for flags
3742
3743 // if 'm' flag was present
3744 if (!doCanvas)
3745 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.imagePanel.storeCPImage(null);
3746 return 1;
3747 } // end of flag processing
3748
3749 // if no flags, then do screen dump; null indicates to use mappair frame
3750 if (packData.status && PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.imagePanel.storeCPImage(packData))
3751 return 1;
3752 return 0;
3753 }
3754
3755 // =========== scroll fix ===========
3756 else if (cmd.startsWith("scrol")) {
3757 PackControl.scriptHover.stackScroll.getViewport().revalidate();
3758 PackControl.scriptHover.stackScroll.getViewport().setViewPosition(new Point(0,0));
3759 PackControl.scriptHover.repaint();
3760 }
3761
3762 // =============== script =========
3763 else if (cmd.startsWith("script")) {
3764 String filename=null;
3765 try {
3766// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
3767 filename=(String)items.get(0);
3768 } catch (Exception ex) {}
3769
3770 // note: filename==null means that a dialog will pop up.
3771 int n=CPBase.scriptManager.getScript(filename,filename,true);
3772 if (n>0) {
3773 TrafficCenter.cmdGUI("scroll");
3774 ScriptBundle.m_locator.setSuccess();
3775 }
3776 else
3777 ScriptBundle.m_locator.setFailure();
3778 return n;
3779 }
3780
3781 // =========== seed =========
3782 if (cmd.startsWith("seed")) {
3783 int hes=0;
3784 int n=6;
3785 int item_index=0;
3786 boolean swap=false;
3787 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag=flagSegs.iterator();
3788 while (nextFlag.hasNext() && (items=nextFlag.next()).size()>0) {
3789 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
3790 item_index=1;
3791 switch(items.get(0).charAt(1)) {
3792
3793 // flags for geometry (default is eucl): -h, -s, -e
3794 case 'h': {
3795 hes=-1;
3796 break;
3797 }
3798 case 'e': {
3799 hes=0;
3800 break;
3801 }
3802 case 's': {
3803 hes=1;
3804 break;
3805 }
3806 case 'm': { // swap 1 and M
3807 swap=true;
3808 break;
3809 }
3810 } // end of flag switch
3811 }
3812 // unflagged or fall-through: read 'n', number of petals (default 6)
3813 if (items.size()>item_index) {
3814 try {
3815 n=Double.valueOf(items.get(item_index)).intValue();
3816 if (n<3)
3817 n=3;
3818 if (n>1000) {
3819 throw new ParserException(
3820 "'seed' petal count limited to 1000");
3821 }
3822 } catch (Exception ex) {n=6;}
3823 }
3824 } // end of while
3825
3826 try{ // have to hold this; packData get's replaced
3827 int pnum=packData.packNum;
3828 PackData newData=PackCreation.seed(n,hes);
3829 if (newData==null)
3830 throw new CombException("seed has failed");
3831 newData.intNodeCount=1;
3832 packData=CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(newData,pnum,false);
3833 jexecute(packData,"disp -w -c");
3834 } catch(Exception ex) {
3835 throw new ParserException(" "+ex.getMessage());
3836 }
3837
3838 // Shall we swap so center is index M,
3839 // flower starts with 1, alpha=n+1,
3840 // gamma =1; redo layout
3841
3842 if (swap) {
3843 packData.swap_nodes(1, n+1);
3844 for (int j=1;j<n;j++)
3845 packData.swap_nodes(j, j+1);
3846 packData.setAlpha(n+1);
3847 packData.setGamma(1);
3848 jexecute(packData,"layout");
3849 }
3850
3851 return packData.nodeCount;
3852 } // end of 'seed'
3853
3854 // ========= set =========
3855 if (cmd.startsWith("set_")) {
3856 cmd=cmd.substring(4);
3857
3858 // ========= set_accur =========
3859 if (cmd.startsWith("accur")) {
3860 double accur=StringUtil.getOneDouble(flagSegs);
3861 if (accur>.01) accur=.01;
3862 if (accur<0.0000000000000001) accur=0.0000000000000001;
3863 // represents max of about 15 decimal accur
3864 PackData.TOLER=accur;
3865 if (PackData.OKERR>(.01)*PackData.TOLER) PackData.OKERR = (.01)*PackData.TOLER;
3866 return 1;
3867 }
3868
3869 // =========== set_dump_format =====
3870 if (cmd.startsWith("dump_")) {
3871 return CirclePack.cpb.setIMG(items.get(0));
3872 }
3873
3874 // =========== set_display == (full computer screen)
3875 if (cmd.startsWith("displ") && CPBase.GUImode!=0) {
3876 double fracMax=-1.0;
3877 try {
3878
3879 // set relative to screen maximum
3880 if (items.get(0).startsWith("-m")) {
3881 try {
3882 fracMax=Double.parseDouble(items.get(1));
3883 } catch(Exception ex) {
3884 fracMax=1.0; // full max
3885 }
3886 }
3887
3888 // TODO: other options?
3889 } catch(Exception e){}
3890 PackControl pc=(PackControl)CirclePack.cpb;
3891 pc.resetDisplay(fracMax);
3892 return 1;
3893 }
3894
3895 // =========== set_ratio ========
3896 /* Boundary radii of p2 are set using boundary radii of p1
3897 multiplied by values from function specified in "Function" panel. */
3898 if (cmd.startsWith("ratio")) {
3899// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // one segment
3900 PackData p1=CPBase.cpDrawing[Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0))].getPackData();
3901 NodeLink blist=new NodeLink(p1,"b");
3902 PackData p2=CPBase.cpDrawing[Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(1))].getPackData();
3903 if (!p1.status || !p2.status || p1.hes>0 || p2.hes!=0
3904 || blist==null || blist.size()<=0) {
3905 throw new ParserException("need two appropriate packings.");
3906 }
3907 if (CirclePack.cpb.FtnParser.funcHasError()) {
3908 throw new ParserException("function specification is not valid");
3909 }
3910 Iterator<Integer> bl=blist.iterator();
3911 int v;
3912 while (bl.hasNext()) {
3913 v=(Integer)bl.next();
3914 Complex ctr=p1.getCenter(v);
3915 double rad=p1.getRadius(v);
3916 if (p1.hes<0) {
3917 CircleSimple sc=
3918 HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(p1.getCenter(v),p1.getRadius(v));
3919 ctr=sc.center;
3920 rad=sc.rad;
3921 }
3922 Complex w=CirclePack.cpb.getFtnValue(ctr);
3923 p2.setRadius(v,w.abs()*rad);
3924 count++;
3925 }
3926 return count;
3927 }
3928
3929 // ========= set_brush ============
3930 if (cmd.startsWith("brush")) {
3931 int n=1;
3932 if (items!=null && items.size()>0) {
3933 try {
3934// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); //
3935 String str=(String)items.get(0);
3936 n=Integer.parseInt(str);
3937 } catch(ParserException pex) {}
3938 }
3939 if (n<0 || n>24) n=1; // 0-25 are values for LineThick slider in ScreenPanel.
3940 packData.cpDrawing.setLineThickness(n+1);
3941 if (CPBase.GUImode!=0)
3942 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.screenPanel.setLine(n+1);
3943 return 1;
3944 }
3945
3946 // ========= set_ps_brush ======== (goes in postscript file, if open)
3947 if (cmd.startsWith("ps_brush")) {
3948 int n=1;
3949 try {
3950// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); //
3951 String str=(String)items.get(0);
3952 n=Integer.parseInt(str);
3953 } catch(ParserException pex) {}
3954 if (n<0 || n>12) n=1; // 0-12 are values for LineThick slider in SupportFrame
3955 try {
3956 pF.postLineThickness(n);
3957 } catch(Exception ex) {
3958 throw new DataException("'PostFactory' not open?");
3959 }
3960 return 1;
3961 }
3962
3963
3964 // ========= set_mobius (set_Mobius) ==============
3965 if (cmd.trim().equalsIgnoreCase("mobius")) {
3966 Mobius mob=null;
3967
3968 String str=items.get(0);
3969 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
3970
3971 // map 3 complex points to 3 other complex points
3972 if (str.equals("-xyzXYZ")) {
3973 items.remove(0);
3974
3975 Iterator<String> its=items.iterator();
3976
3977 // read 6 complex numbers
3978 try {
3979 Complex x=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
3980 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
3981 Complex y=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
3982 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
3983 Complex z=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
3984 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
3985 Complex X=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
3986 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
3987 Complex Y=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
3988 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
3989 Complex Z=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
3990 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
3991 CPBase.Mob=Mobius.mob_xyzXYZ(x, y, z, X, Y, Z,0,0);
3992 } catch (Exception ex) {
3993 throw new MobException("Mobius flag -xyzXYZ format error");
3994 }
3995
3996 return 1;
3997 }
3998
3999 // otherwise, send flags to define 'HalfLink'
4000 else {
4001 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items);
4002 CPBase.Mob=PackData.holonomyMobius(packData,hlink);
4003 return 1;
4004 }
4005 }
4006
4007 // default is 8 doubles, plus perhaps one integer
4008 else {
4009
4010 Iterator<String> its=items.iterator();
4011
4012 try {
4013 Complex a=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
4014 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
4015 Complex b=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
4016 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
4017 Complex c=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
4018 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
4019 Complex d=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()),
4020 Double.parseDouble((String)its.next()));
4021 mob=new Mobius(a,b,c,d);
4022 } catch(Exception ex) {
4023 throw new MobException("Mobius format error");
4024 }
4025
4026 try {
4027 int flip=Integer.parseInt((String)its.next());
4028 if (flip!=0) mob.oriented=false;
4029 } catch(Exception ex) {} // this integer may not be present
4030 CPBase.Mob=mob;
4031 return 1;
4032 }
4033
4034 }
4035
4036 // ========= set_cycles ============
4037 if (cmd.startsWith("cycle")) {
4038// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
4039 try {
4040 int n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
4041 if (n>0 && n<1000001)
4042 CPBase.RIFFLE_COUNT=n;
4043 } catch(Exception ex) {return 0;}
4044 return 1;
4045 }
4046
4047 // ========== set_sv (set_sphere_view) =======
4048 if (cmd.startsWith("sphere_vi") || cmd.startsWith("sv")) {
4049 boolean inc_flag=false;
4050 double xang=0.0;
4051 double yang=0.0;
4052 double zang=0.0;
4053 try {
4054// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.elementAt(0); // should be just one flag string
4055 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
4056 String sub_cmd=(String)items.elementAt(0);
4057 char c=sub_cmd.charAt(1);
4058 items.remove(0);
4059 if (c=='d') { // default
4060 packData.cpDrawing.sphView.defaultView();
4061 return 1;
4062 }
4063 if (c=='t') { // set or set and update
4064 try {
4065 Matrix3D mat3d=new Matrix3D(
4066 Double.parseDouble(items.get(0)),Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)),
4067 Double.parseDouble(items.get(2)),Double.parseDouble(items.get(3)),
4068 Double.parseDouble(items.get(4)),Double.parseDouble(items.get(5)),
4069 Double.parseDouble(items.get(6)),Double.parseDouble(items.get(7)),
4070 Double.parseDouble(items.get(8)));
4071 if (!Matrix3D.isNaN(mat3d))
4072 packData.cpDrawing.sphView.viewMatrix=mat3d;
4073 else return 0;
4074 } catch (Exception ex) {
4075 throw new ParserException("error setting 'viewMatrix'");
4076 }
4077 return 1;
4078 }
4079 if (c=='N') { // look directly at the origin, the north pole
4080 packData.cpDrawing.sphView.viewMatrix=
4081 Matrix3D.FromEulerAnglesXYZ(0.0,0.5*Math.PI,0.5*Math.PI);
4082 return 1;
4083 }
4084 else if (c=='S') { // look directly at infinity, the south pole
4085 packData.cpDrawing.sphView.viewMatrix=
4086 Matrix3D.FromEulerAnglesXYZ(0.0,-0.5*Math.PI,0.5*Math.PI);
4087 return 1;
4088 }
4089 else if (c=='i') // incremental, increments should be given
4090 inc_flag=true;
4091 }
4092 xang=Double.parseDouble(items.elementAt(0))*Math.PI;
4093 yang=Double.parseDouble(items.elementAt(1))*Math.PI;
4094 zang=Double.parseDouble(items.elementAt(2))*Math.PI;
4095 } catch(Exception ex) {
4096 throw new ParserException("error in sph_view data");
4097 }
4098 Matrix3D trans=Matrix3D.FromEulerAnglesXYZ(xang,yang,zang);
4099 if (!Matrix3D.isNaN(trans)) {
4100 if (inc_flag) packData.cpDrawing.sphView.viewMatrix =
4101 Matrix3D.times(trans,packData.cpDrawing.sphView.viewMatrix);
4102 else
4103 packData.cpDrawing.sphView.viewMatrix=trans;
4104 return 1;
4105 }
4106 throw new DataException("nan error in setting 'sphView'");
4107 }
4108
4109 // =============== set_screen =====
4110 // Note: if 'packData.status' is true, parsing takes place in other routine
4111 if (cmd.startsWith("screen")) {
4112 ViewBox vbox=packData.cpDrawing.realBox;
4113 Complex utilz=new Complex(0.0);
4114 char c;
4115
4116 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
4117 throw new ParserException("usage: set_screen ...");
4118 }
4119
4120 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag=flagSegs.iterator();
4121
4122 while (nextFlag.hasNext() && (items=nextFlag.next()).size()>0) {
4123 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
4124 c=items.get(0).charAt(1);
4125 switch(c) {
4126 case 'b': // set real box (lx,ly), (rx,ry)
4127 // TODO: need tailored versions for speed, change 'CPDrawing.update' too
4128 {
4129 double []corners=new double[4];
4130 try {
4131 for (int i=0;i<4;i++)
4132 corners[i]=Double.parseDouble(items.get(i+1));
4133 packData.cpDrawing.realBox.setView(new Complex(corners[0],corners[1]),
4134 new Complex(corners[2],corners[3]));
4135 } catch (Exception ex) {
4136 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("'"+cmd+"' parsing error.");
4137 return count;
4138 }
4139 count++;
4140 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
4141 break;
4142 }
4143 case 'd': // default canvas size, sphView
4144 {
4145 vbox.reset();
4146 count++;
4147 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
4148 break;
4149 }
4150 case 'f': // scale by given factor
4151 {
4152 try {
4153 count += packData.cpDrawing.realBox.
4154 scaleView(Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)));
4155 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
4156 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
4157 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("usage: set_screen -f <x>: "+
4158 nfe.getMessage());
4159 }
4160 break;
4161 }
4162 case 'i': // incremental moves (typically from mouse click)
4163 {
4164 try {
4165 utilz=new Complex(Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)),
4166 Double.parseDouble(items.get(2)));
4167 count +=vbox.transView(utilz);
4168 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
4169 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("usage: set_screen -i <x> <y>: "+
4170 nfe.getMessage());
4171 }
4172 break;
4173 }
4174 case 'h': // height (or fall through for width)
4175 {}
4176 case 'w': // width
4177 {
4178 try {
4179 double f=Double.parseDouble(items.get(1));
4180 count += packData.cpDrawing.realBox.
4181 scaleView(f/vbox.getWidth());
4182 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
4183 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
4184 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("usage: set_screen -w(or h) <x>: "+
4185 nfe.getMessage());
4186 }
4187 break;
4188 }
4189 } // end of flag switch
4190 } // done handling a given flag
4191 else { // no flags? default to default screen
4192 vbox.reset();
4193 count++;
4194 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
4195 }
4196 } // end of while
4197 return count;
4198 }// done with 'set_screen' (with 'status' false)
4199
4200 // ========= set_disp_flags (dep: disp_text) ==
4201 if (cmd.startsWith("disp_fla") || cmd.startsWith("disp_tex")) {
4202 /* CirclePack sends a string to put in DispOptions of
4203 * designated packing; if this is the active pack, the
4204 * string is displayed as 'dispText' and checkbox is set.
4205 */
4206 // Reconstitute the string from flag segments, with
4207 // separating spaces
4208 String flagstr=StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs);
4209 if (flagstr==null)
4210 return 0;
4211 packData.cpDrawing.dispOptions.usetext=true;
4212 packData.cpDrawing.dispOptions.tailored=flagstr;
4213 if (CPBase.GUImode!=0 &&
4214 packData.packNum==CirclePack.cpb.getActivePackNum()) {
4215 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.displayPanel.flagField.setText(
4216 packData.cpDrawing.dispOptions.tailored);
4217 PackControl.screenCtrlFrame.displayPanel.setFlagBox(true);
4218 }
4219 return 1;
4220 }
4221
4222 // ========= set_function_text ===============
4223 if (cmd.startsWith("fun") || cmd.startsWith("ftn")) {
4224 String ftntext=StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs);
4225 if (!CirclePack.cpb.setFtnSpec(ftntext)) {
4226 throw new ParserException(
4227 "Error in function expression: "+
4228 CirclePack.cpb.FtnParser.getFuncErrorInfo());
4229 }
4230 else {
4231 CirclePack.cpb.FtnSpecification=new StringBuilder(ftntext);
4232 }
4233 if (CPBase.GUImode!=0)
4234 PackControl.newftnFrame.setFunctionText();
4235 return 1;
4236 }
4237
4238 // ========= set_path_text ===============
4239 if (cmd.startsWith("path_tex")) {
4240 String pathtext=StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs);
4241 if (!CirclePack.cpb.setParamSpec(pathtext)) {
4242 throw new ParserException(
4243 "Error in path expression: "+
4244 CirclePack.cpb.ParamParser.getFuncErrorInfo());
4245 }
4246 else {
4247 CirclePack.cpb.ParamSpecification=new StringBuilder(pathtext);
4248 }
4249 if (CPBase.GUImode!=0)
4250 PackControl.newftnFrame.setPathText();
4251 return 1;
4252 }
4253
4254 // ======== set_path ===============
4255 else if (cmd.startsWith("path")) {
4256 // no optional string? use Function panel "Utility Path" string
4257 String ftnstr;
4258 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()!=0)
4259 ftnstr=StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs);
4260 else
4261 ftnstr=CirclePack.cpb.ParamParser.getFuncInput();
4262 Path2D.Double newpath=PathUtil.path_from_text(ftnstr);
4263 if (newpath!=null)
4264 CPBase.ClosedPath=newpath;
4265 return 1;
4266 }
4267
4268 // ========= set_grid ============
4269 if (cmd.startsWith("grid")) {
4270 int mode=0; // 0=circle, 1=rectangle
4271 int lineCount=8;
4272 Complex cent=new Complex(0.0);
4273 double rad=1.0;
4274 Complex lowl=new Complex(-1.0,-1.0);
4275 Complex upr=new Complex(1.0,1.0);
4276
4277 // get flags
4278 try {
4279 for (int j=0;j<flagSegs.size();j++) {
4280 items=flagSegs.get(j);
4281 String str=items.remove(0);
4282 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
4283 switch(str.charAt((1))) {
4284 case 'c': // circle
4285 {
4286 mode=0;
4287 try{
4288 cent=new Complex(Double.parseDouble(items.get(0)),
4289 Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)));
4290 rad=Double.parseDouble(items.get(2));
4291 } catch (Exception ex) {
4292 cent=new Complex(0.0);
4293 rad=1.0;
4294 }
4295 break;
4296 }
4297 case 'r': // rectangle
4298 {
4299 mode=1;
4300 try{
4301 lowl=new Complex(Double.parseDouble(items.get(0)),
4302 Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)));
4303 upr=new Complex(Double.parseDouble(items.get(2)),
4304 Double.parseDouble(items.get(3)));
4305 } catch (Exception ex) {
4306 lowl=new Complex(-1.0,-1.0);
4307 upr=new Complex(1.0,1.0);
4308 }
4309 break;
4310 }
4311 case 'g': // current path
4312 {
4313 if (CPBase.ClosedPath==null)
4314 break;
4315 CPBase.gridLines=new Vector<BaryCoordLink>(2*lineCount+2);
4316 CPBase.gridLines.addAll(PathBaryUtil.fromPath(packData,
4317 CPBase.ClosedPath));
4318 return 1;
4319 }
4320 case 'N': // drop through
4321 case 'n': // count, default to 8
4322 {
4323 try{
4324 lineCount=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
4325 if (lineCount<4) lineCount=4;
4326 } catch (Exception ex) {
4327 lineCount=8;
4328 }
4329 break;
4330 }
4331 } // end of switch
4332 } // done with flags
4333
4334 } // end of for loop
4335 } catch (Exception ex) {
4336 // use default: circle/spoke pattern, lineCount=8
4337 }
4338
4339 // now call routine
4340 if (mode==0) // circle
4341 return packData.makeGrid(cent,rad,lineCount);
4342 else if (mode==1) // rectangle
4343 return packData.makeGrid(lowl,upr,lineCount);
4344 }
4345
4346 // ========= set_custom =============
4347 if (cmd.startsWith("custom")) {
4348 try {
4349 packData.cpDrawing.customPS=(String)flagSegs.get(0).get(0);
4350 } catch(Exception ex) {
4351 throw new InOutException("set_custom failed;"+ex.getMessage());
4352 }
4353 return 1;
4354 }
4355
4356 // ========== set_fill_opacity =======
4357 if (cmd.startsWith("fill_op")) {
4358 int opacity=CPBase.DEFAULT_FILL_OPACITY;
4359 try {
4360 opacity=Integer.parseInt(flagSegs.get(0).get(0));
4361 } catch(Exception ex) {
4362 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("set_fill_opacity failed: "+ex.getMessage());
4363 }
4364 packData.cpDrawing.setFillOpacity(opacity);
4365 return 1;
4366 }
4367
4368 // ========== set_sph_opacity =======
4369 if (cmd.startsWith("sph_op")) {
4370 int opacity=CPBase.DEFAULT_SPHERE_OPACITY;
4371 try {
4372 opacity=Integer.parseInt(flagSegs.get(0).get(0));
4373 } catch(Exception ex) {
4374 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("set_sph_opacity failed: "+ex.getMessage());
4375 }
4376 packData.cpDrawing.setSphereOpacity(opacity);
4377 return 1;
4378 }
4379
4380 // ========== set_variable ================
4381 // NOTE: may be constructed from ":=" command,
4382 // see 'TrafficCenter'
4383
4384 // TODO: two forms, vname:=?querystring and
4385 // vname:={..cmd..} should trigger calls
4386 // to commands returning values, as in
4387 // 'valueExecute'.
4388 if (cmd.startsWith("var")) {
4389 String vname=null;
4390 try { // only letters/digits allowed in name
4391 StringBuilder nbld=
4392 new StringBuilder(items.remove(0));
4393 for (int j=0;j<nbld.length();j++) {
4394 if (!Character.isLetterOrDigit(nbld.charAt(j)))
4395 throw new ParserException("");
4396 }
4397 vname=nbld.toString();
4398 } catch (Exception ex) {
4399 throw new ParserException("problem getting variable name");
4400 }
4401
4402 // Note: there should be more either in 'items' or 'flagSegs'
4403 if (vname.length()==0 || (items.size()==0 && flagSegs.size()==1)) {
4404 throw new ParserException("problem parsing 'set_variable'");
4405 }
4406 // if items is empty, get rid of it
4407 if (items.size()==0)
4408 flagSegs.remove(0);
4409 if (!CPBase.varControl.putVariable(packData,vname,flagSegs))
4410 return 0;
4411 return 1;
4412 }
4413
4414 // ========== set_vertexMap ===============
4415 if (cmd.startsWith("vertex")) {
4416 try { // just one flag sequence
4417 if (!items.get(0).contains("-a")) // no append, so clear
4418 packData.vertexMap=new VertexMap();
4419 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.elementAt(0);
4420 if (items.size()==0) items=(Vector<String>)null;
4421 } catch(Exception ex){
4422 items=(Vector<String>)null;
4423 }
4424
4425 }
4426
4427 // ========== set_dir ===================
4428 if (cmd.startsWith("dir")) {
4429 // TODO: want to be able to change the 'PackingDirectory'
4430 }
4431
4432 // ========== set_?list (VEFGTDZ only) =========
4433 if (cmd.substring(1).startsWith("list")) {
4434 char c=cmd.charAt(0);
4435 try { // just one flag sequence
4436// items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.elementAt(0);
4437 if (items.size()==0) items=(Vector<String>)null;
4438 } catch(Exception ex){
4439 items=(Vector<String>)null;
4440 }
4441 switch(c) {
4442 case 'V':
4443 {
4444 if (items==null) {
4445 CPBase.Vlink=null;
4446 count=1;
4447 }
4448 else {
4449 CPBase.Vlink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
4450 count=CPBase.Vlink.size();
4451 }
4452 break;
4453 }
4454 case 'E':
4455 {
4456 if (items==null) {
4457 CPBase.Elink=null;
4458 count=1;
4459 }
4460 else {
4461 CPBase.Elink=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
4462 count=CPBase.Elink.size();
4463 }
4464 break;
4465 }
4466 case 'F':
4467 {
4468 if (items==null) {
4469 CPBase.Flink=null;
4470 count=1;
4471 }
4472 else {
4473 CPBase.Flink=new FaceLink(packData,items);
4474 count=CPBase.Flink.size();
4475 }
4476 break;
4477 }
4478 case 'T': // tiles in 'tileData' only
4479 {
4480 if (items==null) {
4481 CPBase.Tlink=null;
4482 count=1;
4483 }
4484 else {
4485 CPBase.Tlink=new TileLink(packData.tileData,items);
4486 count=CPBase.Tlink.size();
4487 }
4488 break;
4489 }
4490 case 'G':
4491 {
4492 if (items==null) {
4493 CPBase.Glink=null;
4494 count=1;
4495 }
4496 else {
4497 CPBase.Glink=new GraphLink(packData,items);
4498 count=CPBase.Glink.size();
4499 }
4500 break;
4501 }
4502 case 'D': // linked list of Doubles
4503 {
4504 if (items==null) {
4505 CPBase.Dlink=null;
4506 count=1;
4507 }
4508 else {
4509 CPBase.Dlink=new DoubleLink(items);
4510 count=CPBase.Dlink.size();
4511 }
4512 break;
4513 }
4514 case 'Z':
4515 {
4516 if (items==null) {
4517 CPBase.Zlink=null;
4518 count=1;
4519 }
4520 else {
4521 CPBase.Zlink=new PointLink(items);
4522 count=CPBase.Zlink.size();
4523 }
4524 break;
4525 }
4526 case 'B':
4527 {
4528 if (items==null) {
4529 CPBase.Blink=null;
4530 count=1;
4531 }
4532 else {
4533 CPBase.Blink=new BaryLink(packData,items);
4534 count=CPBase.Blink.size();
4535 }
4536 break;
4537 }
4538 } // end of switch
4539
4540 return count;
4541 }
4542
4543 } // done with all 'set_' commands
4544
4545 // ============= smooth =========
4546 if (cmd.startsWith("smoo")) {
4547 // Note: if smoother is to work in concert with a 'MicroGrid',
4548 // then it is initiated in that 'MicroGrid'.
4549 if (packData.smoother==null) { // try to create
4550 // start the smoother
4551 packData.smoother=new Smoother(packData,null); // no 'MicroGrid' attached
4552 if (packData.smoother==null) {
4553 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(
4554 "error: smoother failed to start for pack "+
4555 packData.packNum);
4556 return 0;
4557 }
4558 }
4559 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0)
4560 return 1;
4561
4562 // parse the various flags
4563 Iterator<Vector<String>> fst=flagSegs.iterator();
4564 while (fst.hasNext()) {
4565 items=fst.next();
4566 String str=items.get(0);
4567 if (str.startsWith("-q")) // toss, redundant (or wrong)
4568 continue;
4569 if (!StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
4570 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: smoother "+
4571 "-q{n} -a -b {b} -c {n] -d {flags} "+
4572 "-r -s {x} -x");
4573 return 0;
4574 }
4575 items.remove(0); // toss the flag, there may be other stuff
4576 char c=str.charAt(1);
4577 switch(c) {
4578 case 'a': // accept adjustments
4579 {
4580 count +=packData.smoother.acceptNewData();
4581 break;
4582 }
4583 case 'b': // set balance
4584 {
4585 try {
4586 double value=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
4587 count += packData.smoother.setRadPressure(value);
4588 } catch(Exception ex) {
4589 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: smoother -b {b}");
4590 }
4591 break;
4592 }
4593 case 'c': // cycles to run
4594 {
4595 try {
4596 int cycles=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
4597 count += packData.smoother.computeCycles(cycles);
4598 } catch(Exception ex) {
4599 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: smoother -c {n}");
4600 }
4601 break;
4602 }
4603 case 'd': // display
4604 {
4605 packData.smoother.dispNewData(flagSegs);
4606 break;
4607 }
4608 case 'r':
4609 {
4610 packData.smoother.reset();
4611 break;
4612 }
4613 case 's':
4614 {
4615 try {
4616 double value=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
4617 count += packData.smoother.setSpeed(value);
4618 } catch(Exception ex) {
4619 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: smoother -s {s}");
4620 }
4621 break;
4622 }
4623 case 'x': // kill the smoother
4624 {
4625 count +=packData.smoother.exit();
4626 break;
4627 }
4628 } // end of switch
4629 return count;
4630 } // end of while
4631 }
4632
4633 // ========= socketServer =========
4634 if (cmd.startsWith("socketS")) {
4635 if (CPBase.cpMultiServer!=null)
4636 throw new InOutException("Socket serve already exists: host "+
4637 CPBase.cpSocketHost+" port "+CPBase.cpSocketPort);
4638 int port=0;
4639 try {
4640 port=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
4641 } catch (Exception ex) {
4642 if (CPBase.cpSocketPort>0)
4643 port=CPBase.cpSocketPort;
4644 else
4645 port=3736;
4646 }
4647 return PackControl.startCPSocketServer(port);
4648 }
4649
4650 // ========= split_edge ==============
4651 if (cmd.startsWith("split_edg")) {
4652 items=flagSegs.elementAt(0); // should be only one segment
4653 EdgeLink edgeLink=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
4654
4655 if (edgeLink==null || edgeLink.size()==0)
4656 return 0;
4657 Iterator<EdgeSimple> elst=edgeLink.iterator();
4658 while (elst.hasNext()) {
4659 EdgeSimple edge=elst.next();
4660 HalfEdge he=packData.packDCEL.findHalfEdge(edge);
4661 if (he==null)
4662 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(
4663 "{"+edge.v+" "+edge.w+"} is not an edge");
4664 else {
4665 // TODO: have to update this routine
4666 RawManip.splitEdge_raw(packData.packDCEL,he);
4667 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
4668 count++;
4669 }
4670 }
4671 return count;
4672 }
4673
4674 // ========= split_flower =============
4675 if (cmd.startsWith("split_flo")) {
4676 int v,w;
4677 int u=0;
4678 try {
4679 // should have 2 or 3 integers
4680 v=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
4681 w=Integer.parseInt(items.get(1));
4682 try {
4683 u=Integer.parseInt(items.get(2));
4684 if (u==w || u==v || w==v)
4685 throw new ParserException();
4686 } catch (Exception ex) {}; // u remains 0
4687 } catch(Exception ex) {
4688 throw new ParserException("usage: v w [u]");
4689 }
4690
4691 HalfEdge newEdge;
4692 HalfEdge wedge=packData.packDCEL.findHalfEdge(new EdgeSimple(v,w));
4693 // bdry case
4694 if (packData.isBdry(v)) {
4695 if (wedge==null || packData.isBdry(w))
4696 throw new ParserException("usage: v w when v bdry, w interior");
4697 newEdge=RawManip.splitFlower_raw(packData.packDCEL, wedge,null);
4698 }
4699 // interior case
4700 else {
4701 if (u==0) {
4702 throw new ParserException("usage: v w u when v is interior");
4703 }
4704 HalfEdge uedge=packData.packDCEL.findHalfEdge(new EdgeSimple(v,u));
4705 if (wedge==null || uedge==null)
4706 throw new ParserException("usage: v w u; w & u must be nghbs of v");
4707 newEdge=RawManip.splitFlower_raw(packData.packDCEL, wedge,uedge);
4708 }
4709 if (newEdge==null)
4710 return 0;
4711 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
4712 int newindx=newEdge.origin.vertIndx;
4713 // a,b are ref vertices; for debug, center new vert between a,b.
4714 int a=newEdge.twin.origin.vertIndx;
4715 int b=newEdge.next.twin.origin.vertIndx;
4716 Complex za=packData.getCenter(a);
4717 Complex zb=packData.getCenter(b);
4718 packData.setCenter(newindx,za.plus(zb).divide(2.0));
4719 packData.setRadius(newindx,packData.getRadius(a));
4720 return newindx;
4721 }
4722 break;
4723 } // end of 's'
4724 case 'T': // "test" routines, meant to be temporary, developmental
4725 {
4726
4727 // ======= T_islandSurround ====
4728 if (cmd.startsWith("T_isl")) {
4729 NodeLink beach=null;
4730 try {
4731 beach=new NodeLink(packData,flagSegs.get(0));
4732 } catch(Exception ex) {
4733 throw new ParserException("usage; T_islandSurround {v..}");
4734 }
4735 ArrayList<HalfLink> hllist=
4736 RawManip.islandSurround(packData.packDCEL,beach);
4737 if (hllist==null) {
4738 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("RawManip.islandSurround failed");
4739 return 0;
4740 }
4741 Iterator<HalfLink> his=hllist.iterator();
4742 while (his.hasNext()) {
4743 packData.hlist=his.next();
4744 CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData,"disp -ff hlist");
4745 }
4746 return 1;
4747 }
4748
4749 // Propogate across an edge based on intrinsic Schwarzian
4750 else if (cmd.startsWith("T_s_prop")) {
4751 items=flagSegs.get(0);
4752 double s=0;
4753 HalfEdge he=null;
4754 try {
4755 s=Double.parseDouble(items.remove(0));
4756 he=HalfLink.grab_one_edge(packData,flagSegs);
4757 } catch(Exception ex) {
4758 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: T_s_prop <s> <halfedge>");
4759 return 0;
4760 }
4761 if (he==null || he.face.faceIndx<0) {
4762 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("T_s_prop needs an interior edge");
4763 return 0;
4764 }
4765
4766 // get the 'TriAspect
4767 TriAspect ftri=new TriAspect(packData.packDCEL,he.face);
4768 TriAspect gtri=new TriAspect(packData.packDCEL,he.twin.face);
4769 int ans=0;
4770 try {
4771 ans=workshops.LayoutShop.schwPropogate(ftri,gtri,he,s,1);
4772 } catch(Exception ex) {
4773 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("T_s_prop, sch propogate failed.");
4774 return 0;
4775 }
4776 if (ans<0)
4777 return 0;
4778
4779 // store results
4780 int oppV=he.twin.prev.origin.vertIndx;
4781 int j=gtri.vertIndex(oppV);
4782 Complex oppCenter=gtri.getCenter(j);
4783 double oppRad=gtri.getRadius(j);
4784 packData.packDCEL.setCent4Edge(he.twin.prev, oppCenter);
4785 packData.packDCEL.setRad4Edge(he.twin.prev, oppRad);
4786 return 1;
4787 }
4788
4789 // ========= layout =============
4790 else if (cmd.startsWith("T_layout")) {
4791
4792 }
4793
4794 //
4795 else if (cmd.startsWith("T_bary")) {
4796 int origNodeCount=packData.nodeCount;
4797 ArrayList<combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace> farray=
4798 new ArrayList<combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace>();
4799 for (int f=1;f<=packData.packDCEL.intFaceCount;f++)
4800 farray.add(packData.packDCEL.faces[f]);
4801 int ans=RawManip.addBaryCents_raw(packData.packDCEL,farray);
4802 if (ans==0) {
4803 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("Failed to add barycenters to faces");
4804 return 0;
4805 }
4806 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
4807 for (int j=origNodeCount+1;j<=packData.nodeCount;j++)
4808 packData.setAim(j,2.0*Math.PI);
4809 return ans;
4810 }
4811
4812 break;
4813 } // end of 'T'
4814 case 't':
4815 {
4816
4817 // =========== torpack ===========
4818 if(cmd.startsWith("torpack")) {
4819 // 1 or 2 doubles as side-pairing factors
4820 double[] factors=new double[2];
4821 factors[0]=1.0;
4822 factors[1]=1.0;
4823 ArrayList<Double> ftrs=new ArrayList<Double>();
4824 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0) {
4825 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
4826 try {
4827 while (items.size()>0) {
4828 ftrs.add(Double.parseDouble(items.remove(0)));
4829 }
4830 } catch(Exception ex) {
4831 throw new ParserException("Usage: torpack [A B]");
4832 }
4833 }
4834 int n=ftrs.size();
4835 if (n>=1)
4836 factors[0]=ftrs.get(0);
4837 if (n>=2)
4838 factors[1]=ftrs.get(1);
4839
4840 // now try the affine packing
4841 if (!ProjStruct.affineSet(packData,null,factors[0],factors[1]))
4842 throw new ParserException("torpack failed");
4843
4844 EuclPacker e_packer=new EuclPacker(packData,-1);
4845 EuclPacker.affinePack(packData,-1);
4846
4847 // store results as radii
4848 NodeLink vlist=new NodeLink();
4849 for (int i=0;i<e_packer.aimnum;i++) {
4850 vlist.add(e_packer.index[i]);
4851 }
4852
4853 e_packer.reapResults();
4854 return packData.packDCEL.layoutPacking();
4855 }
4856
4857 // ========= timer ==========
4858 else if (cmd.startsWith("timer")) {
4859
4860 // at most one flag: check for -s or -x
4861 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()!=0) {
4862 items=flagSegs.get(0);
4863 if (items.size()>0) {
4864 String str=items.get(0);
4865 if (str.contains("x")) {
4866 PackControl.cpTimer.reset();
4867 return 1;
4868 }
4869 else if (str.contains("s"))
4870 PackControl.cpTimer.reset();
4871 }
4872 }
4873 CirclePack.cpb.msg(PackControl.cpTimer.singleTime());
4874 return 1;
4875 }
4876
4877
4878 // ========= torus_t ========
4879 if (cmd.startsWith("torus_t")) {
4880 TorusData torusData;
4881 try {
4882 torusData=new TorusData(packData);
4883 } catch (Exception ex) {
4884 throw new DataException("failed to get 'TorusData'");
4885 }
4886
4887 // display both 'tau' and '1/tau'
4888 CirclePack.cpb.msg("torus_tau: modulus = "+torusData.tau);
4889 Complex taurecip=torusData.tau.reciprocal();
4890 CirclePack.cpb.msg(" (and 1/modulus = "+taurecip+")");
4891 return 1;
4892 }
4893
4894 // ========= triG ===========
4895 // also see "create tri_gr" and "create j_ftn"
4896 if (cmd.startsWith("triG")) {
4897 StringBuilder strbld=new StringBuilder("create tri_gr ");
4898 strbld.append(StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs));
4899 count +=jexecute(packData,strbld.toString());
4900 }
4901 break;
4902 } // end of 't'
4903 case 'w': // fall through
4904 case 'W':
4905 {
4906 // ========= write_custom ======
4907
4908 if (cmd.startsWith("write_cus") || cmd.startsWith("Write_cus")) {
4909 // make sure a filename is specified in -f or -a format
4910 try {
4911 String filestr=flagSegs.lastElement().get(0);
4912 if (!filestr.startsWith("-f") && !filestr.startsWith("-a"))
4913 throw new InOutException(
4914 "usage: write_custom ... -[fa] {filename}");
4915 StringBuilder strbuf=new StringBuilder("");
4916 int code=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs, strbuf);
4917 File file=new File(strbuf.toString());
4918 String dir=file.getParent();
4919 if (dir==null && cmd.charAt(0)=='W')
4920 dir=CPFileManager.HomeDirectory.toString();
4921 else if (dir==null)
4922 dir=CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.toString();
4923 boolean script_flag=((code & 04)==04);
4924 boolean append_flag=((code & 02)==02);
4925 BufferedWriter fp=CPFileManager.openWriteFP(new File(dir),
4926 append_flag,file.getName(),script_flag);
4927 if (fp==null)
4928 throw new InOutException("Failed to open '"+
4929 file.toString()+"' for custom writing");
4930
4931 // there must be a flag indicating type of data
4932 items=flagSegs.get(0);
4933 if (items==null || items.size()==0 ||
4934 !StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0)))
4935 throw new InOutException("'write_custom' "+
4936 "must have a flag for type of output");
4937 char c=items.remove(0).charAt(1);
4938 switch(c) {
4939 case 'G': // grid (meaning dual graph):
4940 // for 3D printing grid output 11/2019
4941 // TODO: only do euclidean case now
4942 {
4943 if (packData.hes!=0)
4944 throw new InOutException("'write_custom -G' "+
4945 "currently for euclidean only");
4946 // based on vertices (dual faces), defaults to all
4947 // TODO: for now, only for interior dual faces.
4948 // Create non-redundant list of edges from these vertices
4949 NodeLink nlink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
4950 int []vhits=new int[packData.nodeCount+1];
4951 int []fhits=new int[packData.faceCount+1];
4952 EdgeLink elink=new EdgeLink(packData);
4953 Iterator<Integer> nlk=nlink.iterator();
4954 while (nlk.hasNext()) {
4955 int v=nlk.next();
4956 if (!packData.isBdry(v)) {
4957 int[] flower=packData.getFlower(v);
4958 for (int j=0;j<packData.countFaces(v);j++) {
4959 int w=flower[j];
4960 if (vhits[w]==0) { // new edge?
4961 elink.add(new EdgeSimple(v,w));
4962 }
4963 }
4964 vhits[v]=1;
4965 }
4966 }
4967
4968 // get list of dual edges and index faces encountered
4969 GraphLink dualedges = packData.dualEdges(elink);
4970
4971 // have to index the faces that occur for later
4972 int tick=0;
4973 FaceLink findx=new FaceLink(packData);
4974 if (dualedges != null && dualedges.size() > 0) {
4975 EdgeSimple edge = null;
4976 Iterator<EdgeSimple> dedges = dualedges.iterator();
4977 while (dedges.hasNext()) {
4978 edge = (EdgeSimple) dedges.next();
4979 if (fhits[edge.v]==0) {
4980 fhits[edge.v]=tick++;
4981 findx.add(edge.v);
4982 }
4983 if (fhits[edge.w]==0) {
4984 fhits[edge.w]=tick++;
4985 findx.add(edge.w);
4986 }
4987 }
4988 }
4989
4990 // now we can write the face centers in indexed order
4991 fp.append("Nodes: \n");
4992 Iterator<Integer> fdex=findx.iterator();
4993 while (fdex.hasNext()) {
4994 Complex fcent=packData.getFaceCenter(fdex.next());
4995 fp.append(String.format("%.6f",fcent.x)+
4996 " "+String.format("%.6f",fcent.y)+"\n");
4997 }
4998
4999 // now write the order pairs of indices, using new values
5000 fp.append("\nEdge pairs: \n");
5001 Iterator<EdgeSimple> dedges = dualedges.iterator();
5002 while (dedges.hasNext()) {
5003 EdgeSimple edge = (EdgeSimple) dedges.next();
5004 fp.append(fhits[edge.v]+" "+fhits[edge.w]+"\n");
5005 }
5006
5007 fp.flush();
5008 fp.close();
5009 count++;
5010 }
5011 } // end of switch
5012
5013 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Wrote custom -"+c+" to "+dir+
5014 File.separator+file.getName());
5015
5016 } catch (Exception ex) {
5017 throw new InOutException("write_custom failed: "+
5018 ex.getMessage());
5019 }
5020 }
5021
5022 // ========= write_path ========
5023 else if (cmd.startsWith("write_path") ||
5024 cmd.startsWith("Write_path")) {
5025 StringBuilder strbuf=new StringBuilder("");
5026 int code=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs, strbuf);
5027 File file=new File(strbuf.toString());
5028 String dir=file.getParent();
5029 if (dir==null && cmd.charAt(0)=='W')
5030 dir=CPFileManager.HomeDirectory.toString();
5031 else if (dir==null)
5032 dir=CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.toString();
5033 boolean script_flag=((code & 04)==04);
5034 boolean append_flag=((code & 02)==02);
5035 BufferedWriter fp=CPFileManager.openWriteFP(new File(dir),
5036 append_flag,file.getName(),script_flag);
5037 if (fp==null)
5038 throw new InOutException("Failed to open '"+
5039 file.toString()+"' for writing");
5040 try {
5041 PathManager.writepath(fp,CPBase.ClosedPath);
5042 } catch (Exception ex) {
5043 throw new InOutException("write failed: "+ex.getMessage());
5044 }
5045 if (script_flag) {
5046 CPBase.scriptManager.includeNewFile(file.getName());
5047 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Wrote global path to "+
5048 file.getName()+" in the script");
5049 return 1;
5050 }
5051 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Wrote global path to "+
5052 CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory+
5053 File.separator+file.getName());
5054 return 1;
5055 }
5056
5057 // ========= write_tiling ========
5058 else if (cmd.startsWith("write_til") ||
5059 cmd.startsWith("Write_til")) {
5060 if (packData.tileData==null || packData.tileData.tileCount<=0)
5061 throw new DataException("this packing "+
5062 "does not have tiling data");
5063 StringBuilder strbuf=new StringBuilder("");
5064 int code=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs, strbuf);
5065 File file=new File(strbuf.toString());
5066 String dir=file.getParent();
5067 if (dir==null && cmd.charAt(0)=='W')
5068 dir=CPFileManager.HomeDirectory.toString();
5069 else if (dir==null)
5070 dir=CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.toString();
5071 boolean script_flag=((code & 04)==04);
5072 boolean append_flag=((code & 02)==02);
5073 BufferedWriter fp=CPFileManager.openWriteFP(new File(dir),
5074 append_flag,file.getName(),script_flag);
5075 if (fp==null)
5076 throw new InOutException("Failed to open '"+
5077 file.toString()+"' for writing");
5078 try {
5079 int act=020000;
5080 ReadWrite.writePack(fp,packData,act,script_flag);
5081 } catch (Exception ex) {
5082 throw new InOutException("write tiling failed: "+
5083 ex.getMessage());
5084 }
5085 if (script_flag) {
5086 CPBase.scriptManager.includeNewFile(file.getName());
5087 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Wrote tiling to "+
5088 file.getName()+" in the script");
5089 return 1;
5090 }
5091 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Wrote tiling to "+
5092 CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory+
5093 File.separator+file.getName());
5094 return 1;
5095 }
5096
5097 break;
5098 } // end of 'w'
5099 default: // no command found, merely flash message
5100 {
5101 if (PackControl.consoleCmd!=null)
5102 PackControl.consoleCmd.dispConsoleMsg(
5103 "Command '"+cmd+"' not found");
5104 count=0;
5105 }
5106 } // end of main switch for jexecute
5107 return count;
5108 } // end of jexecute
5109
5110
5120 private static int packExecute(PackData packData,String cmd,
5121 Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs) {
5122 int count=0;
5123 Vector<String> items;
5124 if (!packData.status)
5125 return 0;
5126
5127 // ============ get_data/put_data ===========
5128 if (cmd.startsWith("get_data") || cmd.startsWith("put_data")) {
5129 // need to pick off the source/target packing -q{p}
5130 // and -t flag for 'translate', if it is there.
5131 // Rest is parsed in 'dataPutGet'
5132 try {
5133 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.remove(0);
5134 } catch(Exception ex){
5135 return 0;
5136 }
5137 String str=(String)items.get(0);
5138 int qnum=StringUtil.qFlagParse(str);
5139 PackData q=null;
5140 if (qnum<0 || (q=CPBase.cpDrawing[qnum].getPackData())==null ||
5141 !q.status) {
5142 throw new ParserException("usage: get_/put_data "+
5143 "must start with '-q{k}' indicating the "+
5144 "other packing");
5145 }
5146 if (flagSegs.size()==0) {
5147 throw new ParserException("usage: get_/put_data; "+
5148 "check formating of data to pass");
5149 }
5150
5151 // next must be '-t' if translation is desired
5152 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
5153 str=(String)items.get(0);
5154 boolean translate=false;
5155 if (str.startsWith("-t")) {
5156 translate=true;
5157 flagSegs.remove(0);
5158 }
5159
5160 // no data flags?
5161 if (flagSegs.size()==0) {
5162 throw new ParserException("usage: get_/put_data; "+
5163 "check formating of data to pass");
5164 }
5165
5166 // put or get?
5167 boolean putget=true;
5168 if (cmd.startsWith("get"))
5169 putget=false;
5170
5171 // parse the request
5172 return packData.dataPutGet(q,flagSegs,putget,translate);
5173 }
5174
5175 // ============ Mobius ===============
5176 if (cmd.startsWith("Mobius") || cmd.startsWith("inv_Mobius") ||
5177 cmd.startsWith("mobiu") || cmd.startsWith("inv_mobiu")) {
5178 String str=null;
5179 if (flagSegs.size()==0 ||
5180 (items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.remove(0))==null ||
5181 items.size()==0) { // default to "all"
5182 items=new Vector<String>(1);
5183 str=new String("a");
5184 items.add(str);
5185 }
5186 else {
5187 str=(String)items.get(0);
5188 }
5189
5190 // orientation??
5191 boolean oriented=true;
5192 if (cmd.contains("inv")) oriented=false;
5193
5194 // look for sidepair flag
5195 boolean do_pairs=true;
5196 if (str.startsWith("-s")) { // suppress modifying side-pairs
5197 do_pairs=false;
5198 items.remove(0);
5199 }
5200 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5201 return packData.apply_Mobius(CPBase.Mob,
5202 vertlist,oriented,do_pairs);
5203 }
5204
5205 /* ================ main switch ============== */
5206 switch (cmd.charAt(0)) {
5207 case 'a':
5208 {
5209 // =========== alpha ============
5210 if (cmd.startsWith("alpha")) {
5211 int a=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,flagSegs);
5212 return packData.packDCEL.setAlpha(a,null,true);
5213 }
5214
5215 // ============ appMob ==========
5216 if (cmd.startsWith("appMob")) { // apply Mobius
5217 Mobius mob=new Mobius();
5218 try {
5219 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // one string
5220 Iterator<String> its=items.iterator();
5221 mob.a.x=Double.parseDouble((String)its.next());
5222 mob.a.y=Double.parseDouble((String)its.next());
5223 mob.b.x=Double.parseDouble((String)its.next());
5224 mob.b.y=Double.parseDouble((String)its.next());
5225 mob.c.x=Double.parseDouble((String)its.next());
5226 mob.c.y=Double.parseDouble((String)its.next());
5227 mob.d.x=Double.parseDouble((String)its.next());
5228 mob.d.y=Double.parseDouble((String)its.next());
5229 if (its.hasNext()) {
5230 double tmp=Double.parseDouble((String)its.next());
5231 if (tmp<0) mob.oriented=false;
5232 }
5233 } catch (Exception ex) {
5234 throw new ParserException("usage: appMob .... ");
5235 }
5236 return packData.apply_Mobius(mob, new NodeLink(packData,"a"));
5237 }
5238
5239 // =========== adjust_rad =======
5240 if (cmd.startsWith("adjust_rad")) {
5241 double factor=1.0;
5242 try {
5243 // just one sequence: {x} {v..}
5244 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
5245 factor=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(0));
5246 items.remove(0);
5247 } catch (Exception ex) {
5248 throw new ParserException("usage: {x} {v..}");
5249 }
5250 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5251 if (factor<=0.0 || vertlist==null || vertlist.size()==0)
5252 return count;
5253 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
5254
5255 while (vlist.hasNext())
5256 count +=packData.adjust_rad(
5257 (Integer)vlist.next(), factor);
5258 if (count<=0) {
5259 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("adjust_radii: "+
5260 "no radii were adjusted.");
5261 return 0;
5262 }
5263 packData.fillcurves();
5264 return count;
5265 }
5266
5267 // =========== adjust_sch =======
5268 if (cmd.startsWith("adjust_sch")) {
5269 double factor=1.0;
5270 try {
5271 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
5272 factor=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(0));
5273 items.remove(0);
5274 } catch (Exception ex) {
5275 throw new ParserException("usage: {x} {v w ..}");
5276 }
5277 HalfLink edgelist=new HalfLink(packData,items);
5278 if (factor<=0.0 || edgelist==null || edgelist.size()==0)
5279 return count;
5280 Iterator<HalfEdge> elist=edgelist.iterator();
5281
5282 while (elist.hasNext())
5283 count +=packData.adjust_uzian(
5284 (HalfEdge)elist.next(), factor);
5285 if (count<=0) {
5286 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("adjust_sch: "+
5287 "no schwarzians were adjusted.");
5288 return 0;
5289 }
5290 packData.fillcurves();
5291 return count;
5292 }
5293
5294 // =========== add_ideal =========
5295 else if (cmd.startsWith("add_ideal")) {
5296
5297 // no boundary? return 0
5298 if (packData.getBdryCompCount()<=0)
5299 return 0;
5300
5301 boolean addVert=true; // default
5302 NodeLink vertlist=null;
5303
5304 // default to add_ideal vertex to every bdry component
5305 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
5306 // all boundary starts
5307 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,"B");
5308 return packData.add_ideal(vertlist);
5309 }
5310
5311 // first, look for '-f' flag
5312 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // one segment
5313 String str=(String)items.get(0);
5314 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
5315 char c=str.charAt(1);
5316 switch(c) {
5317 case 'f': // face
5318 {
5319 items.remove(0);
5320 addVert=false;
5321 break;
5322 }
5323 default:
5324 {
5325 addVert=true;
5326 }
5327 } // end of switch
5328 }
5329
5330 // in vertex mode?? (default, look for further flags)
5331 if (addVert) {
5332 try {
5333 int v,w;
5334 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag=flagSegs.iterator();
5335
5336 // look for flags -b and/or -s first
5337 while (nextFlag.hasNext() &&
5338 (items=nextFlag.next()).size()>0) {
5339 str=(String)items.get(0);
5340 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
5341 items.remove(0);
5342 char c=str.charAt(1);
5343 switch (c) {
5344 case 'b': // selected full bdry components
5345 {
5346 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5347 count += packData.add_ideal(vertlist);
5348 break;
5349 }
5350 case 's': // given pair v,w, on same bdry,
5351 // new vert attaches to vertices
5352 // from v to w
5353 {
5354 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5355 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
5356 v=(Integer)vlist.next();
5357 w=(Integer)vlist.next();
5358 if (!packData.onSameBdryComp(v,w))
5359 throw new CombException(v+" and "+
5360 w+" aren't on the same "+
5361 "bdry component");
5362 try {
5363 count=RawManip.addIdeal_raw(
5364 packData.packDCEL, v, w);
5365 if (count==0)
5366 throw new CombException(
5367 "add failed");
5368 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(
5369 packData);
5370 } catch(Exception ex) {
5371 throw new DCELException(
5372 "addIdeal failed: "+
5373 ex.getMessage());
5374 }
5375 packData.xyzpoint=null;
5376 return count;
5377 }
5378 default: // not a legal flag
5379 {
5380 throw new ParserException();
5381 }
5382 } // end of switch
5383 }
5384 else { // no flag, just use vertices
5385 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5386 count += packData.add_ideal(vertlist);
5387 // DCELdebug.redConsistency(packData.packDCEL);
5388 return count;
5389 }
5390 } // end of while
5391 } catch(Exception ex){
5392 throw new ParserException(
5393 "add_ideal: error added vertices; "+
5394 "perhaps an undefined flag");
5395 }
5396 return count;
5397 } // done with ideal vertex case
5398
5399
5400 // now handle ideal faces
5401 // '-f' flag is gone, check for list of vertices,
5402 // else default to all bdry components
5403 if (flagSegs.get(0).size()==0) {
5404 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,"B"); // all boundary starts
5405 }
5406 else
5407 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,flagSegs.get(0));
5408
5409 Iterator<Integer> vlst=vertlist.iterator();
5410 while (vlst.hasNext()) {
5411 Vertex vert=packData.packDCEL.vertices[vlst.next()];
5412 if (vert.bdryFlag!=0) {
5413 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace newface=
5414 new combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace(
5415 packData.packDCEL.faceCount+1);
5416 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge.twin;
5417 newface.edge=he;
5418 if (he.next.next.next==he) { // 3-sided?
5419 do {
5420 he.face=newface;
5421 he.origin.bdryFlag=0;
5422 he.origin.redFlag=false;
5423 he=he.next;
5424 } while (he!=vert.halfedge.twin);
5425 count++;
5426 }
5427 }
5428 }
5429 if (count>0)
5430 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
5431 return count;
5432 }
5433
5434 // =========== add_cir =========
5435 else if (cmd.startsWith("add_cir")) {
5436 try {
5437 items=flagSegs.elementAt(0); // should be only one segment
5438 } catch(Exception ex) {
5439 return 0;
5440 }
5441 HalfLink addedEdges=new HalfLink(); // for setting cent/rad
5442 NodeLink nodeLink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5443 Iterator<Integer> vlist=nodeLink.iterator();
5444 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
5445 Vertex V=packData.packDCEL.vertices[vlist.next()];
5446 if (V.bdryFlag==0)
5447 continue;
5448 HalfEdge he=V.halfedge.twin.next;
5449 Vertex vert=RawManip.addVert_raw(packData.packDCEL,he);
5450 if (vert!=null) {
5451 count++;
5452 addedEdges.add(he);
5453 }
5454 }
5455 // process new edges to set cent/rad
5456 if (count>0) {
5457 packData.packDCEL.addedVertData(addedEdges);
5458 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
5459 }
5460 return count;
5461 }
5462
5463 // =========== add_edge =========
5464 else if (cmd.startsWith("add_e")) {
5465 items=flagSegs.elementAt(0); // should be only one segment
5466 NodeLink nodeLink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5467
5468 if (nodeLink==null || nodeLink.size()<2)
5469 return 0;
5470
5471 // proceed while we get successive pairs that work
5472 Iterator<Integer> vlist=nodeLink.iterator();
5473 boolean ehit=true;
5474
5475 while (vlist.hasNext() && ehit) {
5476 ehit=false;
5477 int v=vlist.next();
5478 if (!vlist.hasNext())
5479 return count;
5480 int w=vlist.next();
5481
5482 if (!packData.isBdry(v) || !packData.isBdry(w)) {
5483 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: "+
5484 "add_edge v w, vertices must "+
5485 "be on boundary");
5486 break;
5487 }
5488
5489 // is {v w} already an edge?
5490 if (packData.areNghbs(v,w)) {
5491 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("<"+v+" "+w+"> "+
5492 "is already an edge");
5493 break;
5494 }
5495
5496 int u=-1;
5497 HalfEdge he=packData.packDCEL.vertices[v].halfedge;
5498 if (he.twin.prev.origin.vertIndx==w)
5499 u=he.twin.origin.vertIndx; // v,u,w is cclw
5500 else if (he.twin.next.next.twin.origin.vertIndx==w)
5501 u=he.twin.next.next.origin.vertIndx; // w,u,v is cclw
5502 else {
5503 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(
5504 "v = "+v+" and w = "+w+" don't have common nghb");
5505 break;
5506 }
5507
5508 RawManip.enfold_raw(packData.packDCEL,u);
5509 packData.setAim(u,2*Math.PI);
5510 count++;
5511 ehit=true;
5512 } // end of while
5513
5514 if (count>0) {
5515 packData.xyzpoint=null;
5516 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
5517 packData.fillcurves();
5518 }
5519 return count;
5520 }
5521
5522 // ========= add_barycenter ========
5523 // ========= add_face_triple =======
5524 else if (cmd.startsWith("add_b") ||
5525 cmd.startsWith("add_face_t")) {
5526 boolean baryOpt=true; // add_barycenter
5527 // add face triple
5528 if (cmd.charAt(4)=='f')
5529 baryOpt=false;
5530 int f;
5531
5532 // should be only one segment
5533 items=flagSegs.elementAt(0);
5534 FaceLink faceLink=new FaceLink(packData,items);
5535 if (faceLink==null || faceLink.size()<1)
5536 return 0;
5537
5538 Iterator<Integer> flist=faceLink.iterator();
5539 // avoid duplication
5540 int []xdup=new int[packData.faceCount+1];
5541
5542 if (!baryOpt)
5543 // TODO: add this option
5544 throw new ParserException("'face_triple' "+
5545 "call is not yet available for dcel case.");
5546
5547 while (flist.hasNext()) {
5548 f=(Integer)flist.next();
5549 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace
5550 face=packData.packDCEL.faces[f];
5551
5552 boolean debug=false;
5553 if (debug) { // debug=true;
5554 HalfEdge hef=face.edge;
5555 if (hef.origin.vertIndx==11 ||
5556 hef.next.origin.vertIndx==11 ||
5557 hef.next.next.origin.vertIndx==11)
5558 System.out.println("face "+f+", "+face);
5559 }
5560
5561 if (xdup[f]==0) {
5562 int ans;
5563 ans=RawManip.addBary_raw(
5564 packData.packDCEL,face.edge,false);
5565 xdup[f]=1;
5566 if (ans!=0 && face.faceIndx<0)
5567 packData.packDCEL.redChain=null; // redo red
5568 count += ans;
5569 }
5570 }
5571
5572 if (count==0)
5573 return 0;
5574
5575 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
5576 return count;
5577 }
5578
5579 // ========= aspect ====== (formerly 'rect_ratio')
5580 else if (cmd.startsWith("aspect")) {
5581 CallPacket cP=CommandStrParser.valueExecute(
5582 packData,cmd,flagSegs);
5583 if (cP.error) {
5584 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("aspect call failed");
5585 return 0;
5586 }
5587 StringBuilder strb=new StringBuilder(
5588 "Log(Aspect) (log(width/height)) of p"+
5589 packData.packNum+", corners [");
5590 for (int j=0;j<4;j++)
5591 strb.append(cP.int_vec.get(j)+" ");
5592 strb.append("] is "+cP.double_vec.get(0));
5593 CirclePack.cpb.msg(strb.toString());
5594 return 1;
5595 }
5596
5597 // =============== add_layer
5598 else if (cmd.startsWith("add_lay")) {
5599 int mode=CPBase.TENT; // default
5600 int degree=3; // default
5601 int v1,v2;
5602
5603 if (packData.getBdryCompCount()==0 || flagSegs.size()==0) {
5604 throw new ParserException("perhaps packing "+
5605 "has no boundary?");
5606 }
5607
5608 // should have only one segment
5609 items=flagSegs.elementAt(0);
5610 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
5611 char c=items.elementAt(0).charAt(1);
