5612 items.remove(0);
5613
5614 // Two flags; process rest in following
5615 switch(c) {
5616 case 't': //
5617 {
5618 mode=CPBase.TENT;
5619 break;
5620 }
5621 case 'd': //
5622 {
5623 mode=CPBase.DUPLICATE;
5624 break;
5625 }
5626 default:
5627 {
5628 throw new ParserException("undefined flag");
5629 }
5630 } // end of flag switch
5631 } // done handling the flag
5632
5633 // no flag and three numbers, should be 'N v w' form
5634 else if (items.size()==3)
5635 mode=CPBase.DEGREE;
5636
5637 // TENT/DUPLICATE modes take 2 arguments, v1 v2;
5638 // DEGREE has <d> also (at end)
5639 if ((mode==CPBase.DEGREE && items.size()!=3) ||
5640 (mode!=CPBase.DEGREE && items.size()!=2)) {
5641 throw new DataException("usage: -[dt] {d} v1 v2.");
5642 }
5643 if (mode==CPBase.DEGREE) {
5644 try {
5645 degree=Integer.parseInt(items.elementAt(0));
5646 if (degree<4 || degree>PackData.MAX_PETALS) {
5647 throw new ParserException("improper degree "+
5648 degree);
5649 }
5650 items.remove(0);
5651 } catch(NumberFormatException nfe) {
5652 throw new ParserException(nfe.getMessage());
5653 }
5654 }
5655
5656 // Should get two vertices, v1, v2
5657 // (let add_layer check validity)
5658 try {
5659 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5660 v1=(Integer)vertlist.get(0);
5661 v2=(Integer)vertlist.get(1);
5662 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
5663 throw new DataException("bad data.");
5664 } catch (CombException cex) {
5665 throw new CombException(cex.getMessage());
5666 }
5667
5668 PackDCEL pdcel=packData.packDCEL;
5669 int ans= CombDCEL.addlayer(pdcel,mode,degree,v1,v2);
5670 if (ans<=0)
5671 return 0;
5672 pdcel.fixDCEL(packData);
5673 return ans;
5674 }
5675
5676 // =============== add_gen
5677 else if (cmd.startsWith("add_gen")) {
5678 int mode=CPBase.TENT; // default
5679 int degree=6;
5680 int numGens=1; // default
5681 NodeLink bdrylist=null;
5682 boolean b_flag=false;
5683
5684 if (packData.getBdryCompCount()==0 || flagSegs.size()==0) {
5685 throw new CombException("packing has no boundary");
5686 }
5687
5688 try {
5689 items=flagSegs.remove(0);
5690 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0)))
5691 throw new ParserException("usage: add_gen {n} ...");
5692 numGens=Integer.parseInt(items.remove(0));
5693 if (items.size()>0) {
5694 degree=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
5695 mode=CPBase.DEGREE;
5696 }
5697 else
5698 mode=CPBase.TENT;
5699
5700 // checked for/handled -b flag (must be last flag)
5701 int lastf=flagSegs.size()-1;
5702 if (lastf>=0) {
5703 items=flagSegs.get(lastf);
5704 if (!b_flag && items.get(0).startsWith("-b")) {
5705 items.remove(0);
5706 // for now, do all
5707 bdrylist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5708 if (bdrylist.size()>0) b_flag=true;
5709 flagSegs.remove(lastf);
5710 }
5711 }
5712
5713 // now for other flags
5714 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag=flagSegs.iterator();
5715 while (nextFlag.hasNext() &&
5716 (items=nextFlag.next()).size()>0) {
5717 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
5718 char c=items.get(0).charAt(1);
5719 items.remove(0);
5720
5721 // Two flags; process rest in following
5722 switch(c) {
5723 case 'd':
5724 {
5725 mode=CPBase.DUPLICATE;
5726 break;
5727 }
5728 case 'b': // already handled
5729 {
5730 break;
5731 }
5732 default:
5733 {
5734 mode=CPBase.TENT;
5735 }
5736 } // end of flag switch
5737 }
5738 }
5739 } catch (Exception ex) {
5740 throw new ParserException("usage: "+
5741 "add_gen {n} [{d}] [-dt] [-b {v..}]");
5742 }
5743
5744 // Finally, calls to addLayer for each boundary component
5745 int v1,v2;
5746 PackDCEL pdcel=packData.packDCEL;
5747 if (!b_flag) { // just one boundary component
5748 for (int n=1;n<=numGens;n++) {
5749 v1=v2=pdcel.idealFaces[1].edge.origin.vertIndx;
5750 count += CombDCEL.addlayer(pdcel,
5751 mode, degree, v1, v2);
5752 pdcel.fixDCEL(packData);
5753 }
5754 }
5755 // Note: have to adjust v1, v2 each time
5756 // because there'a a new start
5757 else if (bdrylist.size()>0) {
5758 Iterator<Integer> Bverts=bdrylist.iterator();
5759 while (Bverts.hasNext()) {
5760 int b=(Integer)Bverts.next();
5761 for (int n=1;n<=numGens;n++) {
5762 v1=v2=pdcel.idealFaces[b].
5763 edge.origin.vertIndx;
5764 count += CombDCEL.addlayer(pdcel,
5765 mode, degree, v1, v2);
5766 pdcel.fixDCEL(packData);
5767 }
5768 }
5769 }
5770 return count;
5771 }
5772 break;
5773 } // end of 'a'
5774 case 'b': // fall through
5775 case 'B':
5776 {
5777 // ============= blend ===========
5778 if(cmd.startsWith("blend")) {
5779 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.remove(0); // -q{p} v n
5780 String str=(String)items.get(0);
5781 int qnum=StringUtil.qFlagParse(str);
5782 PackData qackData=null;
5783 int v,n;
5784 try {
5785 qackData=CPBase.cpDrawing[qnum].getPackData();
5786 if (qackData==null) throw new ParserException();
5787 v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(1));
5788 n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(2));
5789 } catch (Exception ex) {
5790 throw new ParserException("usage: blend -q{p} v n");
5791 }
5792 return packData.blend(qackData,v,n);
5793 }
5794
5795 // =========== bary_refine =======
5796 else if (cmd.startsWith("bary_refine")) {
5797 ArrayList<Integer> a=RawManip.hexBaryRefine_raw(
5798 packData.packDCEL,true);
5799 if (a==null)
5800 return 0;
5801 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
5802 // DCELdebug.printRedChain(packData.packDCEL.redChain);
5803 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Packing p"+packData.packNum+" has "+
5804 "been barycentrically refined");
5805 return 1;
5806 }
5807 } // end of 'b'
5808 case 'c':
5809 {
5810
5811 // =========== canonical ===========
5812 if (cmd.startsWith("canon")) {
5813
5814 // is it an multiply connected plane surface?
5815 if (packData.intrinsicGeom==0 &&
5816 packData.packDCEL.idealFaceCount>=2) {
5817
5818 // find shortest bdry and add ideal vertex
5819 int bnum=packData.getBdryCompCount();
5820 int[] bstarts=new int[bnum+1];
5821 int[] bcounts=new int[bnum+1];
5822 int bb=0;
5823 int bB=0;
5824 int bshort=packData.nodeCount;
5825 int blong=0;
5826 for (int i=1;i<=bnum;i++) {
5827 bstarts[i]=packData.getBdryStart(i);
5828 bcounts[i]=packData.bdry_comp_count(bstarts[i]);
5829 if (bcounts[i]>blong) {
5830 blong=bcounts[i];
5831 bB=i;
5832 }
5833 if (bcounts[i]<bshort) {
5834 bshort=bcounts[i];
5835 bb=i;
5836 }
5837 }
5838
5839 // add_ideal to all but bB and bb
5840 int node_hold=packData.nodeCount;
5841 for (int j=1;j<=bnum;j++) {
5842 if (j!=bb && j!=bB)
5843 jexecute(packData,"add_ideal "+bstarts[j]);
5844 }
5845
5846 // last added goes in smallest bdry comp
5847 jexecute(packData,"add_ideal "+bstarts[bb]);
5848 packData.packDCEL.setAlpha(packData.nodeCount,null,true);
5849
5850 // now a comb disc, so pack hyperbolically
5851 count=jexecute(packData,"max_pack");
5852
5853 // puncture added vertices
5854 for (int j=packData.nodeCount;j>node_hold;j--)
5855 packData.puncture_vert(packData.nodeCount);
5856
5857 // convert to euclidean
5858 packData.geom_to_e();
5859 packData.setGeometry(0);
5860 packData.set_aim_default();
5861
5862 return count;
5863 }
5864 // otherwise, usual max_pack
5865 else
5866 return jexecute(packData,"max_pack");
5867 } // done with 'canon'
5868
5869 // =========== cookie ===========
5870 if (cmd.startsWith("cookie")) {
5871
5872 // identify forbidden edges (and possibly new 'alpha')
5873 HalfLink hlink=CombDCEL.cookieData(packData,flagSegs);
5874
5875 // cookie out by forming new red chain
5876 CombDCEL.redchain_by_edge(
5877 packData.packDCEL,hlink,
5878 packData.packDCEL.alpha,true);
5879 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
5880 packData.set_aim_default();
5881 return packData.packDCEL.vertCount;
5882 }
5883
5884 // =========== cir_invert ===============
5885 else if (cmd.startsWith("cir_invert")) {
5886 double CPrad2=1.0;
5887 Complex ctr2=null;
5888 boolean u_flag=false;
5889
5890 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
5891 String str=(String)items.get(0);
5892 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
5893 if (!str.startsWith("-u"))
5894 throw new ParserException(
5895 "usage: only flag is -u");
5896 ctr2=new Complex(0.0);
5897 CPrad2=1.0;
5898 u_flag=true;
5899 items.remove(0);
5900 }
5901 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
5902 int v1=(Integer)vertlist.get(0);
5903 if (packData.hes<0)
5904 packData.geom_to_e();
5905 Complex ctr1=packData.getCenter(v1);
5906 double CPrad1=packData.getRadius(v1);
5907 if (packData.hes>0) {
5908 CircleSimple sc=SphericalMath.s_to_e_data(ctr1,CPrad1);
5909 ctr1=new Complex(sc.center);
5910 CPrad1=sc.rad;
5911 if (sc.flag==-1) {
5912 CPrad1 *=-1.0;
5913 }
5914 }
5915 if (!u_flag) { // use v2
5916 int v2=(Integer)vertlist.get(1); // not -u, so get w
5917 ctr2=packData.getCenter(v2);
5918 CPrad2=packData.getRadius(v2);
5919 if (packData.hes>0) {
5920 CircleSimple sc=SphericalMath.s_to_e_data(
5921 ctr2,CPrad2);
5922 ctr2=new Complex(sc.center);
5923 CPrad2=sc.rad;
5924 if (sc.flag==-1) {
5925 CPrad2 *=-1.0; // disc is outside of circle
5926 }
5927 }
5928 }
5929 Mobius mob=Mobius.cir_invert(ctr1,CPrad1,ctr2,CPrad2);
5930 packData.apply_Mobius(mob,new NodeLink(packData,"a"));
5931 return 1;
5932 }
5933
5934 // ============== count ==========
5935 else if (cmd.startsWith("count")) {
5936 CallPacket cP=CommandStrParser.valueExecute(
5937 packData,cmd,flagSegs);
5938 if (cP==null || cP.int_vec==null || cP.int_vec.size()==0)
5939 return 0; // failed
5940 return (int)cP.int_vec.get(0);
5941 }
5942
5943 // ========= copy ==============
5944 else if (cmd.startsWith("copy")) {
5945 // should be just the pack number
5946 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
5947 try {
5948 int qnum=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
5949 if (qnum==packData.packNum)
5950 return 1; // same packing
5951 PackData tmpPD=packData.copyPackTo();
5952 CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(tmpPD,qnum,false);
5953 return 1;
5954 } catch (Exception ex) {
5955 throw new ParserException("copy failed: "+ex.getMessage());
5956 }
5957 }
5958
5959 // ========= color ============
5960 else if (cmd.startsWith("color")) {
5961 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.elementAt(0);
5962 String str=(String)items.elementAt(0);
5963 // circles, faces, edges, tiles?
5964 if (str.startsWith("-c") || str.startsWith("-v")) {
5965 items.remove(0);
5966 if (items.size()==0)
5967 flagSegs.remove(0);
5968 packData.color_circles(flagSegs);
5969 return 1;
5970 }
5971 if(str.startsWith("-f")) {
5972 items.remove(0);
5973 if (items.size()==0)
5974 flagSegs.remove(0);
5975 packData.color_faces(flagSegs);
5976 return 1;
5977 }
5978 if(str.startsWith("-e")) {
5979 items.remove(0);
5980 if (items.size()==0)
5981 flagSegs.remove(0);
5982 packData.color_edges(flagSegs);
5983 return 1;
5984 }
5985 if (str.startsWith("-T") || str.startsWith("-D") ||
5986 str.startsWith("-Q") ) {
5987 char c=items.remove(0).charAt(1);
5988 int tmode=1; // default to -T, 'tile'
5989 if (c=='D')
5990 tmode=2;
5991 else if (c=='Q')
5992 tmode=3;
5993
5994 if (items.size()==0)
5995 flagSegs.remove(0);
5996 packData.color_tiles(tmode,flagSegs);
5997 return 1;
5998 }
5999 return 0;
6000 }
6001
6002 // ============== cir_aspect =========
6003 if (cmd.startsWith("cir_aspect")) {
6004 if (packData.hes!=0) {
6005 throw new ParserException("only for euclidean packings.");
6006 }
6007 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // one segment
6008 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
6009 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
6010 int tick=0;
6011 int v;
6012 String str=new String("Circle aspects:");
6013 while (tick<5 && vlist.hasNext()) {
6014 v=(Integer)vlist.next();
6015 double cabs=packData.getCenter(v).abs();
6016 if (packData.getRadius(v) >= cabs) {
6017 str=str.concat(" v "+v+": encloses origin\n");
6018 }
6019 else str=str.concat(" v "+v+" "+
6020 (double)(packData.getRadius(v)/cabs)+"\n");
6021 tick++;
6022 }
6023 return tick;
6024 }
6025
6026 // ========= center, center_vert/point =======
6027 else if (cmd.startsWith("center")) {
6028 // options: center_vert v, center_point x y,
6029 // center -v {v}, center -z {x y}
6030 Complex z=null;
6031 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
6032 String str=(String)items.get(0);
6033 int v=packData.activeNode;
6034 if (cmd.startsWith("center_vert")) {
6035 v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,str);
6036 z=packData.getCenter(v);
6037 }
6038 else if (cmd.startsWith("center_point")) {
6039 z=new Complex(Double.parseDouble(items.get(0)),
6040 Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)));
6041 }
6042 else {
6043 if (str.startsWith("-v")) {
6044 str=(String)items.get(1);
6045 v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,str);
6046 z=packData.getCenter(v);
6047 }
6048 else if (str.startsWith("-z")) {
6049 z=new Complex(Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)),
6050 Double.parseDouble(items.get(2)));
6051 }
6052 }
6053
6054 // should have 'z' now
6055 return packData.center_point(z);
6056 }
6057 break;
6058 } // end of 'c'
6059 case 'D': // fall through
6060 case 'd':
6061 {
6062
6063 // =============== dual_layout (replaced 'sch_layout')
6064 if (cmd.startsWith("dual_lay")) {
6065
6066 // always convert to spherical; if you
6067 // don't want this, make call via "layout -s".
6068 jexecute(packData,"geom_to_s");
6069 HalfEdge firsthe=packData.packDCEL.layoutOrder.get(0);
6070 double base_rad=.25;
6071
6072 // first face is an equilateral triangle
6073 packData.packDCEL.setRad4Edge(firsthe,base_rad);
6074 packData.packDCEL.setRad4Edge(firsthe.next,base_rad);
6075 packData.packDCEL.setRad4Edge(firsthe.next.next,base_rad);
6076
6077 // use 'layoutOrder' and use single edge,
6078 // not average across all available edges.
6079 int ans=packData.packDCEL.layoutPacking(
6080 packData.packDCEL.layoutOrder,true,true);
6081 return ans;
6082 }
6083
6084/* TODO: OBE have to redo this without a dual graph of the old style.
6085 *
6086 // =============== dual_layout (replaced 'sch_layout')
6087 if (cmd.startsWith("dual_lay")) {
6088 if (packData.hes < 0) {
6089 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: dual_layout "+
6090 "is not used for hyperbolic packings");
6091 return 0;
6092 }
6093 // look for list of face pairs; default to a spanning tree
6094 boolean debug = false;
6095 HalfLink hlink=null;
6096 boolean first=false; // first face first
6097 String cflags = null; // flags for drawing circles
6098 String fflags = null; // flags for drawing faces
6099 if (flagSegs != null && flagSegs.size() > 0 &&
6100 flagSegs.get(0).size() > 0) {
6101 Iterator<Vector<String>> its = flagSegs.iterator();
6102 items = null;
6103 // may have flags to see results -c{disp_ops}
6104 // and/or -f{disp_ops}
6105 while (its.hasNext()) {
6106 items = its.next();
6107 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
6108 String str = items.remove(0);
6109 char c = str.charAt(1);
6110 switch (c) {
6111 case 'v':
6112 case 'c': // draw as laid out
6113 {
6114 cflags = new String(str);
6115 break;
6116 }
6117 case 'f': // report and (if draw==true)
6118 // draw face labels
6119 {
6120 fflags = new String(str);
6121 break;
6122 }
6123 } // end of switch
6124 }
6125 }
6126
6127 // 'items' should be HalfEdge list,
6128 if (items != null && items.size() > 0)
6129 hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items);
6130 else { // use layoutOrder and layout first face
6131 hlink = packData.packDCEL.layoutOrder;
6132 first=true;
6133 }
6134 } else { // no flags or list?
6135 hlink = packData.packDCEL.layoutOrder;
6136 first=true;
6137 }
6138
6139 // TODO: how to signify this using hlink???
6140
6141 // Do we need to place the first face? Only if
6142 // we start with a "root".
6143
6144 HalfEdge edge = hlink.remove(0);
6145
6146 // yes, place base equilateral, zero out 'curv's
6147 if (edge==packData.packDCEL.alpha) {
6148
6149 // zero out the curvatures
6150 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++)
6151 packData.setCurv(v,0.0);
6152
6153 // note that we reset rad/center of 'baseface'
6154 int[] verts=packData.faces[baseface].vert;
6155 Complex[] Z=new Complex[3];
6156 Z[0]=new Complex(1.0,-CPBase.sqrt3);
6157 Z[1]=new Complex(1.0,CPBase.sqrt3);
6158 Z[2]=new Complex(-2.0);
6159 if (packData.hes>0) {
6160 for (int j=0;j<3;j++) {
6161 CircleSimple cS=SphericalMath.
6162 e_to_s_data(Z[j],CPBase.sqrt3);
6163 packData.setCenter(
6164 verts[j],new Complex(cS.center));
6165 packData.setRadius(
6166 verts[j],cS.rad);
6167 packData.setCurv(verts[j],
6168 packData.getCurv(verts[j])+Math.PI);
6169 }
6170 }
6171 else {
6172 for (int j=0;j<3;j++) {
6173 packData.setCenter(verts[j],Z[j]);
6174 packData.setRadius(verts[j],CPBase.sqrt3);
6175 packData.setRadius(verts[j],
6176 packData.getRadius(verts[j])+
6177 Math.PI/3.0);
6178 }
6179 }
6180
6181 // TODO: layout problems can occur if not
6182 // in sph geometry, but should figure
6183 // out check and just warn user.
6184// if (packData.hes <= 0) {
6185// packData.geom_to_s();
6186// packData.fillcurves();
6187// packData.setGeometry(packData.hes);
6188// if (cpS != null)
6189// cpS.setPackName();
6190// jexecute(packData, "disp -w");
6191// }
6192
6193 if (cflags != null) {
6194 StringBuilder strbld = new StringBuilder(
6195 "disp " + cflags);
6196 // show all three circles
6197 for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
6198 strbld.append(" " +
6199 packData.faces[baseface].vert[j]);
6200 }
6201 jexecute(packData, strbld.toString());
6202 }
6203 if (fflags != null) {
6204 StringBuilder strbld = new StringBuilder(
6205 "disp " + fflags + " " + baseface);
6206 jexecute(packData, strbld.toString());
6207 }
6208 count++;
6209 }
6210
6211 // TODO: layout problems can occur if we don't
6212 // convert to sph geometry, but instead of
6213 // automatically converting, I should check
6214 // to outcome for problems and just send a
6215 // message to the user.
6216// if (packData.hes <= 0) {
6217// packData.geom_to_s();
6218// packData.fillcurves();
6219// packData.setGeometry(packData.hes);
6220// if (cpS != null)
6221// cpS.setPackName();
6222// jexecute(packData, "disp -w");
6223// }
6224
6225 // now progress through edges <f,g> of 'graph'
6226 Iterator<EdgeSimple> gst = graph.iterator();
6227 while (gst.hasNext()) {
6228 EdgeSimple dedge = gst.next();
6229 int f = dedge.v;
6230 int g = dedge.w;
6231 if (f == 0) // root should have been handled
6232 break;
6233 int j = packData.face_nghb(g, f);
6234
6235 // to get s, need edge <v,w>, f on its left
6236 int[] verts=new int[3];
6237 verts[0] = packData.faces[f].vert[j];
6238 verts[1] = packData.faces[f].vert[(j + 1) % 3];
6239 double s=packData.getSchwarzian(
6240 new EdgeSimple(verts[0],verts[1]));
6241
6242 int m = packData.face_nghb(f, g);
6243 int target = packData.faces[g].vert[(m + 2) % 3];
6244
6245 // assume circles of f are in place, need
6246 // only compute the third circle of g,
6247 // 'target' (across the shared edge).
6248 try {
6249 // compute map from base equilateral
6250 Mobius bm_f = D_Schwarzian.faceBaseMob(packData, f);
6251
6252 // compute the target circle
6253 CircleSimple sC = D_Schwarzian.getThirdCircle(
6254 s, j, bm_f, packData.hes);
6255
6256 // debug info
6257 if (debug) {// debug=true;
6258 deBugging.DebugHelp.mob4matlab("bm_f", bm_f);
6259
6260 // display computed tangency points,
6261 // print cents/rads
6262 if (packData.hes > 0) {
6263 Complex[] tp = new Complex[3];
6264 int[] vert = packData.faces[f].vert;
6265 System.out.println("circles <" +
6266 vert[0] + " " + vert[1] +
6267 " " + vert[2]+
6268 "> :\nSchwarian is s =" + s);
6269 for (int jj = 0; jj < 3; jj++) {
6270 Complex zjj = packData.getCenter(vert[jj]);
6271 double rjj = packData.getRadius(vert[jj]);
6272 System.out.println("C(" + jj + ",:) = ["
6273 + zjj.x + " " + zjj.y + " " +
6274 rjj + "]");
6275 tp[jj] = SphericalMath.sph_tangency(zjj,
6276 packData.getCenter(vert[(jj + 1) % 3]),
6277 rjj, packData.getRadius(vert[(jj + 1) % 3]));
6278 String str = new String("disp -dpfc5 " +
6279 vert[jj] + " " + vert[(jj + 1) % 3]);
6280 // draw the tangency point
6281 CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData, str);
6282 }
6283 }
6284
6285 // the outcome circle
6286 System.out.println("new circles: cent = "+
6287 sC.center + "; r = " + sC.rad);
6288 debug = false;
6289 }
6290
6291 packData.setRadius(target,sC.rad);
6292 packData.setCenter(target,sC.center);
6293
6294 // compute and store angles
6295 verts[2]=target;
6296 double[] radii=new double[3];
6297 radii[0]=packData.getRadius(verts[0]);
6298 radii[1]=packData.getRadius(verts[1]);
6299 radii[2]=sC.rad;
6300
6301 for (int q=0;q<3;q++) {
6302 double ang=CommonMath.get_face_angle(
6303 radii[q],radii[(q+1)%3],
6304 radii[(q+2)%3],packData.hes);
6305 packData.setCurv(verts[q],
6306 packData.getCurv(verts[q])+ang);
6307 }
6308
6309 } catch (Exception ex) {
6310 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("problem applying "+
6311 "some schwarzian\n");
6312 }
6313 if (cflags != null) {
6314 StringBuilder strbld = new StringBuilder(
6315 "disp " + cflags + " " + target);
6316 jexecute(packData, strbld.toString());
6317 }
6318 if (fflags != null) {
6319 StringBuilder strbld = new StringBuilder(
6320 "disp " + fflags + " " + g);
6321 jexecute(packData, strbld.toString());
6322 }
6323
6324 count++;
6325 }
6326 return count;
6327 }
6328*/
6329
6330 // ========= doyle_point ========
6331 if (cmd.startsWith("doyle_point")) {
6332 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
6333 int f=FaceLink.grab_one_face(packData,(String)items.get(0));
6334 double r0,r1,r2;
6335 Complex z0,z1,z2;
6336
6337 if (packData.hes!=0 || f<1 || f>packData.faceCount)
6338 throw new ParserException("must specify face f of eucl packing");
6339
6340 int[] verts=packData.packDCEL.faces[f].getVerts();
6341 r0=packData.getRadius(verts[0]);
6342 r1=packData.getRadius(verts[1]);
6343 r2=packData.getRadius(verts[2]);
6344 z0=packData.getCenter(verts[0]);
6345 z1=packData.getCenter(verts[1]);
6346 z2=packData.getCenter(verts[2]);
6347 double []ans=new double[4];
6348 if (Exponential.doyle_point(packData,r0,r1,r2,z0,z1,z2,ans)==0)
6349 throw new ParserException("failed");
6350 CirclePack.cpb.msg("doyle_point for face "+f+", pt ="+
6351 ans[2]+" "+ans[3]+"i, parameters a="+ans[0]+
6352 " and b="+ans[1]);
6353 return 1;
6354 }
6355
6356 // ========= doyle_annulus =========
6357 else if (cmd.startsWith("doyle_ann")) {
6358 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // form: p q n
6359 int p,q,n;
6360 try {
6361 p=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
6362 q=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(1));
6363 n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(2));
6364 } catch (Exception ex) {
6365 throw new DataException("usage: p q n: "+ex.getMessage());
6366 }
6367 if (p>q) { // make sure q>=p
6368 int h=q;
6369 q=p;
6370 p=h;
6371 }
6372 // check parameters
6373
6374 if ((p==0 && q<3) || (p+q)<3 || n<1) {
6375 throw new ParserException("usage: Check legal values (p,q)");
6376 }
6377 throw new ParserException("'doyle_annulus' processing "+
6378 "appears to be unfinished.");
6379 }
6380
6381 // ============== double =============
6382 else if (cmd.startsWith("double")) {
6383
6384 boolean segment=false;
6385 NodeLink vertlist=null;
6386
6387 // tmp: to find symmetric alpha in the doubled result
6388 int sym_alp_tmp=packData.getAlpha()+packData.nodeCount;
6389 int alp_sym=0;
6390
6391 // first, get data: either list of verts, one for each
6392 // bdry comp (default to all), or one bdry component
6393 // segment of form "b(v,w)".
6394 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) { // no flag? do all
6395 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,"B");
6396 }
6397 else {
6398 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
6399 String str=(String)items.get(0);
6400 if (str.contains("b(")) { // should be form b(u v)
6401 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,str);
6402 segment=true;
6403 }
6404 else
6405 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
6406 }
6407 if (vertlist==null || vertlist.size()==0)
6408 throw new ParserException("usage: double v1 v2 [b(v,w)]");
6409
6410 int origVC=packData.packDCEL.vertCount;
6411 PackDCEL pdans=CombDCEL.doubleDCEL(packData.packDCEL,
6412 vertlist,segment);
6413 alp_sym=pdans.oldNew.findW(packData.getAlpha());
6414 if (alp_sym==0)
6415 alp_sym=sym_alp_tmp;
6416 pdans.redChain=null;
6417 VertexMap vmap=pdans.oldNew;
6418 pdans.fixDCEL(packData);
6419 packData.vertexMap=vmap;
6420
6421 // duplicate radii (ignore centers);
6422 if (packData.vertexMap!=null) {
6423 for (int v=origVC+1;v<=packData.packDCEL.vertCount;v++) {
6424 int orig_v=packData.vertexMap.findW(v);
6425 if (orig_v>0)
6426 packData.setRadius(v,packData.getRadius(orig_v));
6427 }
6428 }
6429 return 1;
6430 }
6431
6432 // ========= disp (and dISp) ========
6433 // 'dISp' is used internally: just paint active, not secondary canvasses
6434 if (cmd.startsWith("disp") || cmd.startsWith("Disp")
6435 || cmd.startsWith("dISp") || cmd.startsWith("DISp")) {
6436 String setText=null;
6437 if (cmd.charAt(0)=='D')
6438 setText=StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs);
6439 boolean dispLite=false; // disp only the active canvas?
6440 if (cmd.charAt(1)=='I') dispLite=true; // yes, only active
6441
6442 // No flag strings? Use dispOptions, else no action
6443 // (DisplayPanel (checkboxes or tailored string))
6444 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
6445 String tmpstr=packData.cpDrawing.dispOptions.toString().trim();
6446 if (tmpstr.length()==0)
6447 return 1; // no error, but no action
6448 StringBuilder strbld=new StringBuilder(cmd);
6449 strbld.append(" ");
6450 strbld.append(tmpstr);
6451 jexecute(packData,strbld.toString());
6452 if (setText!=null && !dispLite) // record as display text?
6453 jexecute(packData,new String("set_disp_flags "+setText));
6454 return 1;
6455 }
6456
6457 Vector<String> first_seg=flagSegs.get(0);
6458 // -w should be first; -wr redraws and exits
6459 String fs=first_seg.get(0).toString().trim();
6460 if (fs.startsWith("-w")) {
6461 packData.cpDrawing.clearCanvas(false);
6462 if (fs.startsWith("-wr")) {
6463 String tmpstr=packData.cpDrawing.dispOptions.toString().trim();
6464 if (tmpstr.equals("-w"))
6465 return jexecute(packData,cmd+" ");
6466 // remove redundant -w (or -wr)
6467 if (tmpstr.startsWith("-w"))
6468 tmpstr=tmpstr.substring(3);
6469 return jexecute(packData,cmd+" "+tmpstr);
6470 }
6471 count++;
6472 flagSegs.remove(0);
6473 fs=null;
6474 }
6475
6476 // there might be a -q flag as well
6477 if (fs==null && flagSegs.size()>0) {
6478 first_seg=flagSegs.get(0);
6479 fs=first_seg.get(0).toString().trim();
6480 }
6481
6482 // display in canvas of a different packing?
6483 if (fs!=null && fs.startsWith("-q")) {
6484 int qnum=StringUtil.qFlagParse(fs);
6485 if (qnum>=0) {
6486 CPdrawing qScreen=CPBase.cpDrawing[qnum];
6487 if (qScreen.getPackData().status) {
6488 flagSegs.remove(0); // dump this -q segment
6489 count +=DisplayParser.dispParse(
6490 packData,qScreen,flagSegs);
6491 if (count>0)
6492 PackControl.canvasRedrawer.
6493 paintMyCanvasses(qScreen.getPackData(),
6494 dispLite);
6495 return count;
6496 }
6497 }
6498 else // failed to get another pack
6499 return 0;
6500 }
6501
6502 // send for parsing/execution
6503 count +=DisplayParser.dispParse(packData,flagSegs);
6504 if (count>0)
6505 PackControl.canvasRedrawer.
6506 paintMyCanvasses(packData,dispLite);
6507 if (setText!=null && !dispLite) // record as display text?
6508 jexecute(packData,new String("set_disp_flags "+setText));
6509 return count;
6510 }
6511 break;
6512 } // end of 'd'
6513 case 'e':
6514 {
6515 // ========= elist_to_path =======
6516 if (cmd.startsWith("elist_to_pat")) {
6517 EdgeLink elink=null;
6518 try {
6519 elink=new EdgeLink(packData,flagSegs.get(0));
6520 } catch (Exception ex) {
6521 throw new CombException("failed to get edge list: "+
6522 ex.getMessage());
6523 }
6524 // NOTE: 'ClosePath' is reset
6525 Path2D.Double gpath=CPBase.ClosedPath=new Path2D.Double();
6526 Iterator<EdgeSimple> elt=elink.iterator();
6527 EdgeSimple edge=null;
6528 Complex z=null;
6529 if (elt.hasNext()) { // start
6530 edge=elt.next();
6531 z=packData.getCenter(edge.v);
6532 if (packData.hes>0) // spherical is moved to plane
6533 z=SphericalMath.s_pt_to_plane(z);
6534 gpath.moveTo(z.x,z.y);
6535 z=packData.getCenter(edge.w);
6536 if (packData.hes>0) // spherical is moved to plane
6537 z=SphericalMath.s_pt_to_plane(z);
6538 gpath.lineTo(z.x,z.y);
6539 }
6540 while(elt.hasNext()) { // add point
6541 edge=elt.next();
6542 z=packData.getCenter(edge.w);
6543 if (packData.hes>0) // spherical is moved to plane
6544 z=SphericalMath.s_pt_to_plane(z);
6545 gpath.lineTo(z.x,z.y);
6546 }
6547 gpath.closePath();
6548 count++;
6549 }
6550 // =========== enclose ============
6551 if (cmd.startsWith("enclose")) {
6552 boolean totalFlag=false;
6553 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // data: -[t] n {v..}
6554
6555 // easy to make error
6556 if (items.size()==1) {
6557 packData.flashError("usage: enclose -[t] n {v..}");
6558 return 0;
6559 }
6560 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
6561 if (!items.get(0).equals("-t"))
6562 throw new ParserException("illegal flag");
6563 totalFlag=true;
6564 items.remove(0);
6565 }
6566
6567 int overCount=0;
6568 int N=Integer.parseInt((String)items.remove(0));
6569 if (N<0 || N>(PackData.MAX_PETALS-3)) {
6570 throw new DataException("usage -[t] n {v..}; n>=0, n<"+
6571 (int)(PackData.MAX_PETALS-2));
6572 }
6573 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
6574 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
6575 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
6576 Vertex vert=packData.packDCEL.vertices[vlist.next()];
6577 int v=vert.vertIndx;
6578 if (vert.isBdry()) {
6579 int num=packData.countFaces(v);
6580 int n=N;
6581
6582 // reset n to get total degree N
6583 if (totalFlag) {
6584 if (N>=PackData.MAX_PETALS) {
6585 throw new ParserException("max degree limit "+
6586 PackData.MAX_PETALS);
6587 }
6588 n=N-(num+1);
6589 if (n<0) {
6590 overCount++;
6591 n=0;
6592 }
6593 }
6594
6595 // else adding n circles (up to limit)
6596 else {
6597 int m=PackData.MAX_PETALS-num-1;
6598 n=(n<m)? n:m;
6599 }
6600
6601 // add the n circles and close up
6602 HalfLink addedEdges=new HalfLink();
6603 int tick=0;
6604 for (int i=1;i<=n;i++) {
6605 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge.twin.next;
6606 Vertex newV=RawManip.addVert_raw(packData.packDCEL,he);
6607 if (newV==null)
6608 throw new CombException("failure in adding edge to "+
6609 vert.vertIndx);
6610 addedEdges.add(he);
6611 tick++;
6612 }
6613 if (tick>0) { // set successive cent/rad
6614 packData.packDCEL.addedVertData(addedEdges);
6615 }
6616 packData.enfold(v); // this call does 'fixDCEL'
6617 Complex z=packData.getCenter(
6618 packData.getFirstPetal(v));
6619 Complex w=packData.getCenter(
6620 packData.getLastPetal(v));
6621 packData.cpDrawing.drawEdge(z,w,new DispFlags(null));
6622 count++;
6623 }
6624 } // end of while
6625
6626 if (count>0) {
6627 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
6628 packData.fillcurves();
6629 }
6630 if (overCount>0) {
6631 CirclePack.cpb.msg("One or more circles "+
6632 "exceeded desired degree");
6633 }
6634 return count;
6635 }
6636
6637 // ============ embed ============
6638 else if (cmd.startsWith("embed")) {
6639 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // just one segment
6640 String str=(String)items.get(0);
6641 // must start with other packing number
6642 PackData q=null;
6643 try {
6644 if ((q=CPBase.cpDrawing[StringUtil.qFlagParse(str)].
6645 getPackData())==packData) {
6646 throw new ParserException();
6647 }
6648 } catch (Exception ex) {
6649 throw new ParserException("usage: embed: -q{q} a b A B");
6650 }
6651 int a=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(1));
6652 int b=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(2));
6653 int A=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(3));
6654 int B=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(4));
6655 VertexMap vMap=Embedder.embed(packData,q,a,b,A,B);
6656 count=vMap.size();
6657 if (count>0) {
6658 packData.vertexMap=vMap;
6659 if (count==packData.nodeCount)
6660 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Full embedding in the "+
6661 "complex of pack "+q.packNum+
6662 " succeeded, embedding stored in Vertex Map");
6663 else
6664 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Partial embedding, "+count+
6665 " vertices, in "+
6666 "the complex of pack "+
6667 q.packNum+", stored in Vertex Map");
6668 return count;
6669 }
6670 return 0;
6671 }
6672 break;
6673 } // end of 'e'
6674 case 'f':
6675 {
6676 // ========= flip ========
6677 if (cmd.startsWith("flip")) {
6678 PackDCEL pdc=packData.packDCEL;
6679 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0)
6680 return 0;
6681 items=flagSegs.elementAt(0); // should be one segment
6682 String fstr="v"; // default to listed vertices
6683 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0)))
6684 fstr=items.remove(0).substring(1);
6685
6686 // Check for 'h' flag first: project edge {v,w}
6687 // forward to next (half-hex) edge {w,u}, then
6688 // flip the edge at v clockwise from {v,w}.
6689 // The next edge {w,u} itself is stored in 'elist'
6690 // to prepare next call.
6691
6692 if (fstr.charAt(0)=='h') {
6693 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(packData,flagSegs.get(0));
6694 HalfEdge he=hlink.get(0); // only one edge
6695 HalfEdge[] fls=null;
6696 if (he!=null) {
6697 fls=RawManip.flipAdvance_raw(pdc,he);
6698 if (fls==null) {
6699 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(("usage: flip -h {v,w}"));
6700 return 0;
6701 }
6702
6703 // should have new edge; add it to 'elist'
6704 if (packData.elist==null)
6705 packData.elist=new EdgeLink(packData);
6706 packData.elist.add(new EdgeSimple(fls[0]));
6707
6708 // flipped edge as well?
6709 if (fls!=null && fls[1]!=null) {
6710 pdc.fixDCEL(packData);
6711 return 1;
6712 }
6713 else // only moved, no flip
6714 return -1;
6715 }
6716 else {
6717 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(("usage: flip -h {v,w}"));
6718 return 0;
6719 }
6720 } // end of 'h' flag case
6721
6722 // for the non-'h' cases, first collect the flips
6723/* // just a list of flips
6724 else {
6725 rslt=CombDCEL.flipEdgeList(pdc,hlink);
6726 if (rslt>0)
6727 pdc.fixDCEL(packData);
6728 return rslt;
6729 }
6730*/
6731 // one random, try up to 20 times
6732 if (fstr.contentEquals("r")) {
6733 Random rand=new Random();
6734 int safety=20;
6735 while (safety>0) {
6736 int v=Math.abs((
6737 rand.nextInt())%(packData.nodeCount))+1;
6738 // if boundary, try for next interior
6739 if (packData.isBdry(v)) {
6740 int j=1;
6741 while (j<=packData.nodeCount
6742 && packData.isBdry(
6743 (v=(v+j)%(packData.nodeCount)+1)))
6744 j++;
6745 if (packData.isBdry(v))
6746 return 0; // didn't find interior vert
6747 }
6748 HalfLink spokes=packData.packDCEL.
6749 vertices[v].getSpokes(null);
6750 int num=spokes.size();
6751 // pick a random spoke
6752 HalfEdge he=spokes.get(Math.abs((rand.nextInt())%(num)));
6753
6754 // try to flip
6755 if (RawManip.flipEdge_raw(packData.packDCEL,he)!=null) {
6756 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
6757 return 1;
6758 }
6759 }
6760 return 0;
6761 }
6762
6763 // For remaining cases, just build 'elink' of edges to flip, .
6764 EdgeLink elink=new EdgeLink();
6765 if (items.size()==0)
6766 return 0;
6767 EdgeLink origLink=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
6768 if (origLink==null || origLink.size()==0)
6769 return 0;
6770 Iterator<EdgeSimple> elist=origLink.iterator();
6771
6772 // -cc flag (deprecated -hh): for each edge, flip the next
6773 // counterclockwise edge.
6774 // (E.g., 'half-hex' path flips, see 'hh_path')
6775 if (fstr.startsWith("cc") || fstr.startsWith("hh")) {
6776 while (elist.hasNext()) {
6777 EdgeSimple edge=(EdgeSimple)elist.next();
6778 int indx=packData.nghb(edge.v,edge.w);
6779 // flip cclw edge
6780 if (indx>=0 && indx<packData.countFaces(edge.v)) {
6781 int w=packData.getPetal(edge.v,indx+1);
6782 elink.add(new EdgeSimple(edge.v,w));
6783 }
6784 }
6785 }
6786 // flip the clockwise edge (as along half-hex paths)
6787 else if (fstr.startsWith("cw")) {
6788 int w;
6789 while (elist.hasNext()) {
6790 EdgeSimple edge=(EdgeSimple)elist.next();
6791 int indx=packData.nghb(edge.v,edge.w);
6792 if (indx==0) { // must be interior
6793 w=packData.getPetal(edge.v,
6794 packData.countFaces(edge.v)-1);
6795 }
6796 else
6797 w=packData.getPetal(edge.v,indx-1);
6798 elink.add(new EdgeSimple(edge.v,w));
6799 }
6800 }
6801
6802 // reaching here, just flip edges in the list
6803 else {
6804 if (origLink==null || origLink.size()<1)
6805 return 0;
6806 elist=origLink.iterator();
6807
6808 while (elist.hasNext()) {
6809 elink.add((EdgeSimple)elist.next());
6810 }
6811 }
6812
6813 // done building list, so flip
6814 return packData.flipList(elink);
6815 }
6816
6817 // ============ flat_hex =========
6818 if (cmd.startsWith("flat_hex")) {
6819 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,
6820 (Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0));
6821 return packData.flat_hex(vertlist);
6822 }
6823 // ========= face_err ============
6824 else if (cmd.startsWith("face_err")) {
6825 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // just one
6826 double crit=Double.parseDouble((String)items.remove(0));
6827 if (crit<=1.0) {
6828 throw new ParserException("usage: x must exceed 1.0.");
6829 }
6830 FaceLink facelist=new FaceLink(packData,items);
6831 int hits=facelist.size();
6832 count=QualMeasures.count_face_error(packData,crit,facelist);
6833 CirclePack.cpb.msg("face_error: found "+count+
6834 " poorly placed faces out of "+hits);
6835 return 1;
6836 }
6837
6838 // ========= focus ========
6839 else if (cmd.startsWith("focus")) {
6840 boolean vert_mode=true; //
6841 boolean zoom=false;
6842 Complex z=null;
6843 double x=1.0;
6844 double rad=1.0;
6845 int v=packData.activeNode;
6846 // should be just one segment
6847 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
6848 String str=(String)items.get(0);
6849 try {
6850 if (str.startsWith("-vs")) { // also set screen size
6851 zoom=true;
6852 x=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(1));
6853 v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,
6854 (String)items.get(2));
6855 }
6856 else if (str.startsWith("-v")) {
6857 v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,
6858 (String)items.get(1));
6859 }
6860 else if (str.startsWith("-z")) {
6861 vert_mode=false;
6862 z=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(1)),
6863 Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(2)));
6864 }
6865 else { // read first str as vertex
6866 v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,str);
6867 }
6868 } catch (Exception ex) {
6869 v=packData.activeNode;
6870 }
6871 if (vert_mode) {
6872 z=packData.getCenter(v);
6873 rad=packData.getRadius(v);
6874 if (packData.hes<0) {
6875 CircleSimple sc=HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(z,rad);
6876 z=sc.center;
6877 rad=sc.rad;
6878 }
6879 else if (packData.hes>0) {
6880 z=packData.cpDrawing.sphView.toApparentSph(z);
6881 // TODO: do we need to check if on back?
6882 }
6883 if (zoom) {
6884 count += packData.cpDrawing.realBox.setWidthHeight(2.0*rad*x);
6885 }
6886 }
6887 count += packData.cpDrawing.realBox.focusView(z);//.times(-1.0));
6888 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
6889 try {
6890 jexecute(packData,"disp -wr");
6891 } catch (Exception ex) {}
6892 if (count>0) {
6893 packData.cpDrawing.repaint();
6894 }
6895 return count;
6896 }
6897
6898 // ========= frackMe ========
6899 else if (cmd.startsWith("frac")) {
6900 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // just one
6901 NodeLink verts=new NodeLink(packData,items);
6902 if (verts==null || verts.size()==0) {
6903 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: frack {v..}; "+
6904 "must provide vertices");
6905 return 0;
6906 }
6907
6908 Iterator<Integer> vis=verts.iterator();
6909 while (vis.hasNext() &&
6910 RawManip.frackVert(packData.packDCEL,vis.next())>0) {
6911 count++;
6912 }
6913 if (count>0)
6914 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
6915 return packData.nodeCount;
6916 }
6917
6918 break;
6919 } // end of 'f'
6920 case 'g':
6921 {
6922 // =========== gamma ============
6923 if (cmd.startsWith("gamma")) {
6924 int a=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,flagSegs);
6925 packData.packDCEL.setGamma(a);
6926 return packData.packDCEL.layoutPacking();
6927 }
6928
6929 // ========= gen_cut =========
6930 else if (cmd.startsWith("gen_cut")) {
6931
6932 // TODO: Need to recode this; not sure what behaviour
6933 // was intended, but some of the old 'RedChainer'
6934 // code has not been updated.
6935
6936 throw new ParserException(
6937 "'gen_cut' call is no longer implemented");
6938/*
6939 if (packData.locks!=0 || !packData.isSimplyConnected()) {
6940 throw new ParserException(
6941 "packing must be simply connected");
6942 }
6943 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // form: v n
6944 int v,n;
6945 try {
6946 v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(0));
6947 n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(1));
6948 if (n<2 || v<1 || v>packData.nodeCount)
6949 throw new ParserException("'v' or 'n' improper");
6950 } catch (Exception ex) {
6951 throw new DataException("usage: v n");
6952 }
6953 PackData pd = packData.gen_cut(v,n);
6954 if (pd==null) {
6955 CirclePack.cpb.msg("gen_cut: error "+
6956 "or no vertices were cut");
6957 return 1;
6958 }
6959 int pnum=packData.packNum;
6960 CirclePack.cpb.swapPackData(pd,pnum,false);
6961 packData=pd;
6962 CirclePack.cpb.msg("gen_cut: the new packing has "+
6963 pd.nodeCount+" vertices");
6964 return pd.nodeCount;
6965*/
6966 }
6967
6968 // =========== gen_mark ==========
6969 else if (cmd.startsWith("gen_mark")) {
6970 // Call routine which records generations of
6971 // vertices or faces as measured from 'seeds'
6972 // (specified in datastr). Records generation
6973 // in 'mark' and returns the last vertex or
6974 // face marked. Option '-m n' tells it to stop
6975 // at max generation n.
6976 CallPacket cP=CommandStrParser.valueExecute(
6977 packData,cmd,flagSegs);
6978 if (cP==null || cP.int_vec==null || cP.int_vec.size()==0)
6979 return 0; // failed
6980 return (int)cP.int_vec.get(0);
6981 }
6982
6983 // =============== geom_to_
6984 if (cmd.startsWith("geom_to_")) {
6985 boolean leave_flag=false;
6986 double []radii=new double[packData.nodeCount+1];
6987
6988 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag=flagSegs.iterator();
6989 while (nextFlag.hasNext() &&
6990 (items=nextFlag.next()).size()>0) {
6991 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
6992 switch(items.get(0).charAt(1)) {
6993 case 'l': // leave old radii, even with geom changes
6994 {leave_flag=true;}
6995 } // end of flag switch
6996 } // done handling a given flag segment
6997 }
6998
6999 if (leave_flag) {
7000 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++)
7001 radii[v]=packData.getRadius(v);
7002 }
7003 int old_hes=packData.hes;
7004 char c=cmd.charAt(8);
7005 switch(c) { // to which geometry?
7006 case 'h': // to hyperbolic
7007 {
7008 packData.geom_to_h();
7009 packData.fillcurves();
7010 break;
7011 }
7012 case 's': // to spherical
7013 {
7014 packData.geom_to_s();
7015 break;
7016 }
7017 case 'e': // to eucl
7018 {
7019 packData.geom_to_e();
7020 packData.fillcurves();
7021 break;
7022 }
7023 } // end of switch
7024 if (leave_flag) {
7025 if (old_hes<0) {
7026 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++) {
7027 if (radii[v]<=0) radii[v]=5.0;
7028 }
7029 }
7030 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++) {
7031 packData.setRadius(v,radii[v]);
7032 }
7033 }
7034
7035 packData.setGeometry(packData.hes);
7036 if (packData.cpDrawing!=null)
7037 packData.cpDrawing.setPackName();
7038 return 1;
7039 }
7040
7041 // =============== get_var
7042 else if (cmd.startsWith("get_var")) {
7043 String vname=null;
7044 try {
7045 vname=flagSegs.get(0).get(0).trim();
7046 } catch (Exception ex) {
7047 throw new ParserException("usage: variable name missing");
7048 }
7049 if (vname==null || vname.length()==0)
7050 throw new ParserException("usage: variable name missing");
7051 String gval=null;
7052 if ((gval=CPBase.varControl.getValue(vname))!=null) {
7053 CirclePack.cpb.msg(new String(vname+" = "+gval));
7054 return 1;
7055 }
7056 else
7057 return 0;
7058 }
7059
7060 break;
7061 } // end of 'g'
7062 case 'h':
7063 {
7064
7065 // =========== hex_refine =========
7066 if (cmd.startsWith("hex_ref")) {
7067 return packData.hex_refine();
7068 }
7069
7070 // =========== hex_slide ==========
7071 else if (cmd.startsWith("hex_slide")) {
7072 HalfLink edgelist=null;
7073 HalfEdge he=null;
7074 try {
7075 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // just one
7076 edgelist=new HalfLink(packData,items);
7077 he=edgelist.get(0);
7078 } catch (Exception ex) {
7079 throw new ParserException("usage: hex_slide v w ");
7080 }
7081 // get 'hexChain' simple closed hex axis
7082 edgelist=new HalfLink(packData,"eh "+he);
7083 int ans= packData.right_slide(edgelist);
7084 if (ans==0) {
7085 he=edgelist.get(0);
7086 throw new ParserException("failed for edge <"+
7087 he+">");
7088 }
7089 else {
7090 count +=ans;
7091 CirclePack.cpb.msg(
7092 "hex_slide "+he+" succeeded");
7093 }
7094 return count;
7095 }
7096
7097
7098 // =========== hh_path =================
7099 else if (cmd.startsWith("hh_path")) {
7100/* OPTIONS: (default to -b -S -x)
7101 (16) -a append to given edgepath
7102 (i.e., {e} is a list {e..})
7103 (8) -b stop when the next edge would
7104 lie in the boundary
7105 (1) -c continue --- no stop options
7106 -N {n} add at most n edges (counting e)
7107 (4) -S stop when edge runs into AND
7108 lines up with the original edge e.
7109 (If this flag is set, it overrides -x flag only
7110 in this instance.)
7111 (2) -x stop when encountering vert already hit on path
7112*/
7113 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0)
7114 throw new ParserException("hh_path: check usage");
7115 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagSegs.iterator();
7116 int stopCon=0;
7117 int N=-1;
7118 EdgeLink edgelist=null;
7119 while (its.hasNext()) {
7120 items=(Vector<String>)its.next();
7121 String str=(String)items.get(0);
7122 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) { //
7123 if (str.equals("-a")) // append
7124 stopCon+=16;
7125 else if (str.equals("-b")) // bdry stop
7126 stopCon+=8;
7127 else if (str.equals("-c")) // bdry stop
7128 stopCon+=1;
7129 else if (str.equals("-x")) // cross path
7130 stopCon+=2;
7131 else if (str.equals("-S")) // close up
7132 stopCon+=4;
7133 else if (str.equals("-N")) { // length limit
7134 try {
7135 items.remove(0); // dump 'str' entry
7136 N=Integer.parseInt((String)items.remove(0));
7137 } catch(Exception ex) {
7138 throw new ParserException(
7139 "hh_path: usage hh_path -N {n}");
7140 }
7141 if (N<1) throw new ParserException(
7142 "hh_path: usage -N {n}, n>0");
7143 }
7144 // flag seq is last --- should have edgelist
7145 if (!its.hasNext()) {
7146 edgelist=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
7147 }
7148 }
7149 else {
7150 edgelist=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
7151 }
7152 }
7153 if (edgelist==null || edgelist.size()==0)
7154 throw new ParserException("hh_path: no edgelist given");
7155 if (stopCon==0) stopCon=14; // default
7156 EdgeLink edge_rslts=HexPaths.halfHexPath(packData,edgelist,stopCon,N);
7157 if (edge_rslts==null || edge_rslts.size()==0) {
7158 throw new CombException("no half-hex path found");
7159 }
7160 else packData.elist=edge_rslts;
7161 return edge_rslts.size();
7162 }
7163
7164 // =========== holonomy_tr ==============
7165 else if (cmd.startsWith("holonomy_tr")) {
7166 String filename=null;
7167 BufferedWriter fp=null;
7168 boolean script_flag=false;
7169 // TODO: not handling append for script files.
7170 boolean append_flag=false;
7171
7172 // check for filename [-[fas] <filename>]
7173 if (StringUtil.ckTrailingFileName(flagSegs)) {
7174 StringBuilder strbuf=new StringBuilder("");
7175 int code=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs, strbuf);
7176 File file=new File(strbuf.toString());
7177 filename=file.getName();
7178 String dir=file.getParent();
7179 if (dir==null)
7180 dir=CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.toString();
7181 script_flag=((code & 04)==04);
7182 append_flag=((code & 02)==02);
7183 fp=CPFileManager.openWriteFP(new File(dir),
7184 append_flag,filename,script_flag);
7185 if (fp==null)
7186 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Failed to open '"+filename+
7187 "' for writing");
7188 }
7189
7190 // '-s {n}' flag or halfedge list
7191 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
7192 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink();
7193 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
7194 if (items.get(0).charAt(1)=='s') { // side index
7195 int sideIndx=-1;
7196 try {
7197 if (items.size()==1 && items.get(0).length()>2) { // no space?
7198 String substr=items.get(0).substring(2);
7199 sideIndx=Integer.parseInt(substr);
7200 }
7201 else
7202 sideIndx=Integer.parseInt(items.get(1));
7203 } catch (Exception ex) {
7204 throw new ParserException("usage: holonomy -s {n}");
7205 }
7206 hlink=HalfLink.HoloHalfLink(packData.packDCEL,sideIndx);
7207 }
7208 }
7209 else {
7210 FaceLink facelist=new FaceLink(packData,items);
7211 if (facelist==null || facelist.size()<2) {
7212 throw new ParserException("usage: holonomy: {f..}");
7213 }
7214
7215 // convert to corresponding 'HalfLink'
7216 Iterator<Integer> fis=facelist.iterator();
7217 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace currF=packData.packDCEL.faces[fis.next()];
7218 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace nextF=packData.packDCEL.faces[fis.next()];
7219 HalfEdge he=currF.faceNghb(nextF);
7220 if (he==null) {
7221 throw new ParserException("first two faces not contiguous");
7222 }
7223
7224 hlink.add(he.prev);
7225 hlink.add(he.twin);
7226 while (fis.hasNext()) {
7227 currF=nextF;
7228 nextF=packData.packDCEL.faces[fis.next()];
7229 he=currF.faceNghb(nextF);
7230 if (he==null)
7231 throw new ParserException("Faces "+currF.faceIndx+
7232 " and "+nextF.faceIndx+" are not contiguous");
7233 hlink.add(he.twin);
7234 }
7235 }
7236
7237 if (hlink==null || hlink.size()<3) {
7238 throw new ParserException(
7239 "usage holonomy: failed to get HalfLink");
7240 }
7241 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace firstF=hlink.getFirst().face;
7242 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace lastF=hlink.getLast().face;
7243 if (firstF==null || lastF==null || firstF!=lastF)
7244 throw new ParserException(
7245 "usage holonomy: list doesn't have same face first and last");
7246 Mobius holomob=PackData.holonomyMobius(packData,hlink);
7247 double frobNorm=Mobius.frobeniusNorm(holomob);
7248 CirclePack.cpb.msg(
7249 "Frobenius norm "+String.format("%.8e",frobNorm)+
7250 ", \nMobius is: \n"+
7251 " a = ("+String.format("%.8e",holomob.a.x)+","+
7252 String.format("%.8e",holomob.a.y)+
7253 ") b = ("+String.format("%.8e",holomob.b.x)+","+
7254 String.format("%.8e",holomob.b.y)+")\n"+
7255 " c = ("+String.format("%.8e",holomob.c.x)+","+
7256 String.format("%.8e",holomob.c.y)+
7257 ") d = ("+String.format("%.8e",holomob.d.x)+","+
7258 String.format("%.8e",holomob.d.y)+")");
7259 if (fp!=null) { // print to file also
7260 try {
7261 fp.write("\nFrobenius norm:\n ");
7262 fp.write(frobNorm+" \n");
7263 // print mobius
7264 fp.write("Mobius:\n a= "+holomob.a.x+" + i*("+holomob.a.y+")\n");
7265 fp.write(" b= "+holomob.b.x+" + i*("+holomob.b.y+")\n");
7266 fp.write(" c= "+holomob.c.x+" + i*("+holomob.c.y+")\n");
7267 fp.write(" d= "+holomob.d.x+" + i*("+holomob.d.y+")\n\n");
7268 } catch(Exception ex) {
7269 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("There were IOExceptions");
7270 }
7271 }
7272 if (fp!=null) {
7273 try {
7274 fp.flush();
7275 fp.close();
7276 } catch(Exception ex) {
7277 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("holonomy_tr: "+
7278 "IOException: "+ex.getMessage());
7279 }
7280 }
7281 if (frobNorm>=0)
7282 return 1;
7283 return 0;
7284 }
7285
7286 // ========== h_dist ===========
7287 else if (cmd.startsWith("h_dist")) {
7288 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // expect two complex numbers
7289 Complex z=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(0)),
7290 Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(1)));
7291 Complex w=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(2)),
7292 Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(3)));
7293 double dist=HyperbolicMath.h_dist(z,w);
7294 if (dist==0.0)
7295 CirclePack.cpb.msg("h_dist: points are essentially equal");
7296 else if (dist<0.0)
7297 CirclePack.cpb.msg("h_dist: one/both are on or "+
7298 "outside the unit circle; euclidean "+
7299 "separation is "+(-1.0*dist));
7300 else CirclePack.cpb.msg("h_dist is "+dist);
7301 return 1;
7302 }
7303
7304 break;
7305 } // end of 'h'
7306 case 'i':
7307 {
7308 break;
7309 } // end of 'i'
7310 case 'j':
7311 {
7312 break;
7313 } // end of 'j'
7314 case 'k':
7315 {
7316 break;
7317 } // end of 'k'
7318 case 'l':
7319 {
7320 // ============== locate ==========
7321 if (cmd.startsWith("locat")) {
7322 boolean circles=true;
7323 int msg_flag=3;
7324 LinkedList<Integer> list=null;
7325 Complex z=null;
7326 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // at most one flag
7327 String str=(String)items.get(0);
7328 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
7329 // locate faces, circles is default
7330 if (str.startsWith("-f")) circles=false;
7331 items.remove(0);
7332 }
7333 try {
7334 z=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(0)),
7335 Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(1)));
7336 } catch (Exception ex) {}
7337 if (packData.hes>0) { // sphere
7338 z=SphView.visual_plane_to_s_pt(z);
7339 z=packData.cpDrawing.sphView.toRealSph(z);
7340 }
7341 if (circles && (list=packData.cir_search(z))!=null &&
7342 list.size()>0) { // circles
7343 count=packData.labellist(list,msg_flag,true);
7344 packData.activeNode=(Integer)list.get(0);
7345 }
7346 else if (!circles && (list=packData.tri_search(z))!=null &&
7347 list.size()>0) { // faces
7348 count=packData.labellist(list,msg_flag,false);
7349 }
7350 return count;
7351 }
7352
7353 // ========= layout (deprecated: fix) =======
7354
7355 /*
7356 * Various layout functions, ie., locating circles based on
7357 * radii and combinatorics; also checking/updating data on
7358 * packing combinatorics, layout order, values of angle sums, etc.
7359 *
7360 * NOTE: some options change the information held in faces
7361 * about the drawing order, others use various info to
7362 * set centers.
7363 *
7364 * TODO: not all options are yet covered in DCEL case.
7365 *
7366 * Typical call is just 'layout' without any flags.
7367 *
7368 * Option:
7369 * -a default aims
7370 * -c [dfsc] compute centers
7371 * d write diagnostics in 'layout.log'
7372 * f use only 'well-placed' circles in layout
7373 * s use drawing order only -- not average.
7374 * c x (with f) critical value x (double)
7375 * -d [v] layout by drawing order, reporting location(s) of v.
7376 * -dt [c] special for torus: create 2 side-pairing layout, report
7377 * locations of corner.
7378 * -F redo everything
7379 * -h vwn drawing order by 'hex_walk' routine (not active)
7380 * -K redo combinatorics and dcel
7381 * -r {f..} recompute (don't draw) centers along given facelist
7382 * -s recompute angle sums
7383 * -l suppress poorly placed circles
7384 * (better to use -cf option above)
7385 * -t compute centers from 'tailored' drawing order;
7386 * vertices with 'mark' set will not (to extent
7387 * possible) be used in drawing order.
7388 * -T same as -t, but routine will NOT use the
7389 * vertices with 'mark' set; it will simply stop
7390 * once it has done all it can without them.
7391 * -v {v..} redo facedraworder with vertices defining the bdry
7392 * -x experimental routine.
7393 */
7394 else if (cmd.startsWith("layout")) {
7395 PackDCEL pdc=packData.packDCEL;
7396 boolean useSchw=false;
7397
7398 // most typical call, no flags
7399 if (flagSegs.size()==0) {
7400 pdc.layoutPacking();
7401 return 1;
7402 }
7403
7404 items=flagSegs.get(0);
7405
7406 // not a flag? try to extract HalfLink
7407 if (items.get(0).length()>0 && !StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
7408 int gc=0;
7409 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items.get(0));
7410 if (hlink!=null && hlink.size()>0)
7411 gc=pdc.layoutPacking(hlink); // return count
7412 return gc;
7413 }
7414
7415 // first flag is "-s" indicates use schwarzians for layouts
7416 if (items.get(0).startsWith("-s")) {
7417 if (packData.hes<0) {
7418 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Can't use schwarzians for "
7419 + "layout in the hyperbolic setting");
7420 return 0;
7421 }
7422 items.remove(0);
7423 useSchw=true;
7424 if (items.size()==0) {
7425 flagSegs.remove(0);
7426 if (flagSegs.size()==0) {
7427 pdc.layoutPacking(useSchw);
7428 return 1;
7429 }
7430 }
7431 }
7432
7433 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagSegs.iterator();
7434 String str=null;
7435 boolean tflag=false;
7436 while (its.hasNext()) {
7437 items=(Vector<String>)its.next();
7438 str=(String)items.remove(0);
7439 switch(str.charAt(1)) {
7440 case 'a': // default aims
7441 {
7442 packData.set_aim_default();
7443 count++;
7444 break;
7445 }
7446 case 'c': // compute center:
7447 {
7448 pdc.layoutPacking(useSchw);
7449 count++;
7450 break;
7451 }
7452 case 'd': // 'd [v]' layout by drawing order, normalize, report
7453 // 'dt [v]' for torus only, tries to layout 2-side pairs, with
7454 // optional corner vertex 'v'.
7455 {
7456 if (str.charAt(2)=='t') { // does nothing if not a torus
7457 if (packData.genus!=1 || packData.getBdryCompCount()!=0) {
7458 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(
7459 "usage: 'layout -dt' only applies to "+
7460 "complex that is a 1-torus.");
7461 break;
7462 }
7463
7464 // TODO: formerly, could specify common corner
7465 // vertex for the layout
7466// int v=0;
7467// if (items.size()>0) {
7468// str=(String)items.get(0);
7469// v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData, str);
7470// }
7471
7472 if (CombDCEL.torus4Sides(pdc)==null) {
7473 pdc.fixDCEL(packData);
7474 throw new CombException("torus 4-sided layout failed");
7475 }
7476 CombDCEL.fillInside(pdc);
7477 pdc.layoutPacking(useSchw);
7478 break;
7479 }
7480 else { // 'd' with optional vert whose locations to report
7481 str=(String)items.get(0);
7482 int v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,str);
7483 pdc.layoutReport(v,true,false,useSchw);
7484 count++;
7485 break;
7486 }
7487 }
7488 case 'e': // use edgelist of poison edges.
7489 {
7490 NodeLink vlink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
7491 RedEdge newRed=RawManip.vlink2red(packData.packDCEL,vlink);
7492
7493 if (newRed==null) {
7494 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("failed to get a new red chain");
7495 break;
7496 }
7497
7498 // clear out old red info, then install 'newRed'
7499 RawManip.wipeRedChain(packData.packDCEL,packData.packDCEL.redChain);
7500 packData.packDCEL.redChain=newRed;
7501
7502 // zero out 'eutil'; can set negative for edges to prevent
7503 // them from being red-twinned.
7504 for (int e=1;e<=packData.packDCEL.edgeCount;e++)
7505 packData.packDCEL.edges[e].eutil=0;
7506
7507 CombDCEL.finishRedChain(pdc,pdc.redChain);
7508 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
7509 packData.packDCEL.layoutPacking(useSchw);
7510 break;
7511 }
7512 case 'F': // redo combinatorics, reset aims/curv
7513 {
7514 pdc.redChain=null;
7515 pdc.fixDCEL(packData);
7516 pdc.layoutPacking(useSchw);
7517
7518 // TODO: some traditional pflag options
7519 // aren't implemented in DCEL version yet
7520
7521 packData.fillcurves();
7522 packData.set_aim_default();
7523 return 1;
7524 }
7525
7526/* TODO: update
7527 case 'h': // drawing order via hex_walk routine
7528 {
7529 int v=0,w=0,n=1;
7530 try {
7531 v=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
7532 w=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(1));
7533 n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(2));
7534 } catch (Exception ex) {
7535 throw new ParserException();
7536 }
7537 int []corners=new int[5];
7538 FaceLink hexwalklist=packData.try_hex_pg(v,w,n,corners);
7539 if (hexwalklist==null || hexwalklist.size()==0) {
7540 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("layout -h: error in finding this face list");
7541 break;
7542 }
7543 packData.poisonEdges=packData.outer_edges(hexwalklist);
7544 count +=packData.facedraworder(true);
7545 break;
7546 }
7547 */
7548 case 'K': // redo combinatorics only
7549 {
7550 pdc.redChain=null;
7551 pdc.fixDCEL(packData);
7552 count++;
7553 break;
7554 }
7555 case 'r': // recompute centers along given facelist
7556 {
7557 FaceLink facelist=new FaceLink(packData,items);
7558 if (facelist==null || facelist.size()==0) {
7559 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("layout -r: no "+
7560 "faces were provided.");
7561 break;
7562 }
7563 count +=LayoutShop.
7564 layoutFaceList(pdc,facelist,packData.hes,useSchw);
7565 break;
7566 }
7567 case 's': // lay out using schwarzians
7568 {
7569 useSchw=true;
7570 pdc.layoutPacking(useSchw);
7571 packData.fillcurves();
7572 count++;
7573 break;
7574 }
7575 case 'T': // respecting top level tiles
7576 {
7577 if (packData.tileData==null || packData.tileData.tileCount==0)
7578 break;
7579 PackExtender ex=null;
7580 TileData tData=null;
7581 for (int x=0;x<packData.packExtensions.size();x++) {
7582 ex=packData.packExtensions.get(x);
7583 if (ex.getAbbrev().equalsIgnoreCase("ct")) {
7584 ConformalTiling ct=(ConformalTiling)ex;
7585 PackData cPack=ct.getCanonicalPack();
7586 if (cPack!=null && cPack.nodeCount==packData.nodeCount) {
7587 tData=cPack.tileData.gradedTileData.get(0);
7588 CombDCEL.redchain_by_tile(packData,tData);
7589 pdc.fixDCEL(packData);
7590 count++;
7591 break;
7592 }
7593 }
7594 }
7595 // normalize
7596 count += CommonMath.normAlphaGamma(packData,
7597 packData.getAlpha(), packData.getGamma());
7598 break;
7599 }
7600 case 't': // tailored
7601 {
7602 NodeLink markedV=new NodeLink(packData);
7603 HalfLink newOrder;
7604 for (int i=1;i<=packData.nodeCount;i++)
7605 if(packData.getVertMark(i)!=0)
7606 markedV.add(i);
7607 if (markedV.size()==0) {
7608 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("layout -[tT]: no vertices "+
7609 "have been marked?");
7610 }
7611 else if ((newOrder=CombDCEL.
7612 tailorFaceOrder(pdc,markedV,tflag))!=null) {
7613 pdc.layoutOrder=newOrder;
7614 pdc.layoutPacking();
7615 count++;
7616 }
7617 packData.fillcurves();
7618 break;
7619 }
7620
7621
7622 } // done with cases
7623 } // end of while
7624 return count;
7625
7626 // TODO: reintroduce these options in DCEL setting??
7627// double crit=LAYOUT_THRESHOLD;
7628 // Options for computing center of v:
7629 // opt=1: use only one pair of contiguous neighbors,
7630 // typically specified in the data of face
7631 // used to plot v.
7632 // opt=2: use all pairs of contiguous neighbors
7633 // already plotted, average the resulting
7634 // centers for v.
7635// int opt=2; // default to use all plotted neighbors
7636// boolean errflag=false; // only use 'well-plotted' in layout
7637// boolean dflag=false; // debugging help
7638
7639 }
7640 } // end of 'l'
7641 case 'm': // fall through
7642 case 'M':
7643 {
7644 // ========== map_bary ===========
7645 if (cmd.startsWith("map_bary")) {
7646
7647 String filename="";
7648 String message="";
7649
7650 // have to have the base packing (associated with conformal map)
7651 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // -q{p}
7652 String str=(String)items.remove(0);
7653 PackData qackData=null;
7654 try {
7655 qackData=CPBase.cpDrawing[StringUtil.
7656 qFlagParse(str)].getPackData();
7657 } catch (Exception ex) {
7658 throw new ParserException("'q' packing is not active");
7659 }
7660 String filestr=flagSegs.lastElement().get(0);
7661 if (!filestr.startsWith("-f") && !filestr.startsWith("-a"))
7662 throw new InOutException("usage: "+
7663 "write_custom ... -[fa] {filename}");
7664 StringBuilder strbuf=new StringBuilder("");
7665 int code=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs, strbuf);
7666 filename=strbuf.toString();
7667 File file=new File(filename);
7668 String dir=file.getParent();
7669 if (dir==null)
7670 dir=CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.toString();
7671 else if (cmd.charAt(0)=='W')
7672 dir=CPFileManager.HomeDirectory.toString();
7673 boolean script_flag=((code & 04)==04);
7674 boolean append_flag=((code & 02)==02);
7675 BufferedWriter fp=CPFileManager.openWriteFP(new File(dir),
7676 append_flag,file.getName(),script_flag);
7677 if (fp==null)
7678 throw new InOutException("Failed to open '"+file.toString()+
7679 "' for writing in 'map_bary'");
7680
7681 int ans=PackMethods.writeDualBarys(fp, packData, qackData);
7682 try {
7683 fp.close();
7684 } catch(Exception ex) {
7685 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("problem in 'map_bary'");
7686 }
7687
7688 if (ans>0) {
7689 // for "message" window
7690 if (script_flag) {
7691 CPBase.scriptManager.includeNewFile(filename);
7692 message=new String("output data "+
7693 "appended as file '"+filename+"' in script");
7694 }
7695 else if (append_flag)
7696 message=new String("output data was appended to file '"+
7697 CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.getPath()+
7698 File.separator+filename+"'");
7699 else
7700 message=new String("output data saved in file '"+
7701 CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.getPath()+
7702 File.separator+filename+"'");
7703 }
7704 CirclePack.cpb.msg(message);
7705 return ans;
7706 }
7707
7708 // ========== match ==============
7709 else if(cmd.startsWith("match")) {
7710 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // -q{p} v w V W
7711 String str=(String)items.remove(0);
7712 PackData qackData=null;
7713 NodeLink pverts=null;
7714 NodeLink qverts=null;
7715 try {
7716 qackData=CPBase.cpDrawing[StringUtil.qFlagParse(str)].getPackData();
7717 if (qackData==null)
7718 throw new ParserException("'q' packing is not active");
7719
7720 // next two entries are verts from this packing
7721 StringBuilder strb=new StringBuilder((String)items.get(0));
7722 strb.append(" ");
7723 strb.append((String)items.get(1));
7724 pverts=new NodeLink(packData,strb.toString());
7725 // next two from qackData
7726 strb=new StringBuilder((String)items.get(2));
7727 strb.append(" ");
7728 strb.append((String)items.get(3));
7729 qverts=new NodeLink(qackData,strb.toString());
7730 if (pverts==null || qverts==null ||
7731 pverts.size()<2 || qverts.size()<2)
7732 throw new ParserException("node lists not big enough");
7733 } catch(Exception ex) {
7734 throw new ParserException("usage: match -q{p} v w V W");
7735 }
7736 if (packData.hes>0 || packData.hes!=qackData.hes) {
7737 throw new ParserException("usage: both packings eucl or both hyperbolic");
7738 }
7739 Mobius M=new Mobius();
7740 if (packData.match(qackData,(int)pverts.get(0),(int)pverts.get(1),
7741 (int)qverts.get(0),(int)qverts.get(1),M)==0 ||
7742 Math.abs(M.error)>PackData.TOLER) {
7743 throw new ParserException("some error in generating the "+
7744 "Mobius transformation.");
7745 }
7746 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,"a");
7747 packData.apply_Mobius(M,vertlist);
7748 return 1;
7749 }
7750
7751 // ============ mark ===============
7752 else if (cmd.startsWith("mark")) {
7753 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagSegs.iterator();
7754 while (its.hasNext()) {
7755 items=(Vector<String>)its.next();
7756 String str=(String)items.get(0);
7757 if (!StringUtil.isFlag(str)) { // on first segment only; default to circles
7758 NodeLink vlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
7759 if (vlist==null || vlist.size()==0) return 0;
7760 Iterator<Integer> vl=vlist.iterator();
7761 while (vl.hasNext()) {
7762 int v=(Integer)vl.next();
7763 packData.setVertMark(v,1);
7764 count++;
7765 }
7766 return count;
7767 }
7768
7769 // else, must have some flag
7770 items.remove(0);
7771 switch(str.charAt(1)) {
7772 case 'w': // wipe out all marks, faces/circles/edges
7773 {
7774 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++)
7775 packData.setVertMark(v,0);
7776 for (int f=1;f<=packData.faceCount;f++)
7777 packData.setFaceMark(f,0);
7778 for (int e=1;e<=packData.packDCEL.edgeCount;e++)
7779 packData.packDCEL.edges[e].mark=0;
7780 count++;
7781 break;
7782 }
7783 case 'c': // circles
7784 {
7785 // mark by drawing order:
7786 if (str.length()>2 && str.charAt(2)=='o') {
7787 Iterator<HalfEdge> vis=
7788 packData.packDCEL.layoutOrder.iterator();
7789 HalfEdge he=vis.next(); // mark first face
7790 int tick=1;
7791 packData.setVertMark(he.origin.vertIndx,tick++);
7792 he=he.next;
7793 packData.setVertMark(he.origin.vertIndx,tick++);
7794 he=he.next;
7795 packData.setVertMark(he.origin.vertIndx,tick++);
7796 while (vis.hasNext()) {
7797 he=vis.next();
7798 packData.setVertMark(he.next.next.origin.vertIndx,tick++);
7799 }
7800 count=tick;
7801 break;
7802 }
7803 else if (str.length()>2 && str.charAt(2)=='w') { // wipe first
7804 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++)
7805 packData.setVertMark(v,0);
7806 count++;
7807 }
7808 if (items.size()==0)
7809 break; // do not default to all here
7810 NodeLink vlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
7811 if (vlist==null || vlist.size()==0) break;
7812 Iterator<Integer> vs=vlist.iterator();
7813 while (vs.hasNext()) {
7814 packData.setVertMark((Integer)vs.next(),1);
7815 count++;
7816 }
7817 break;
7818 }
7819 case 'e': // edges
7820 {
7821 if (str.length()>2 && str.charAt(2)=='w') { // wipe first
7822 for (int e=1;e<=packData.packDCEL.edgeCount;e++) {
7823 packData.packDCEL.edges[e].mark=0;
7824 count++;
7825 }
7826 }
7827 if (items.size()==0)
7828 break; // do not default to all here
7829
7830 // mark selected
7831 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items);
7832 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
7833 while(his.hasNext()) {
7834 HalfEdge he=his.next();
7835 he.mark=1;
7836 }
7837 break;
7838 }
7839 case 'f': // faces
7840 {
7841 if (str.length()>2 && str.charAt(2)=='w') { // wipe out first
7842 for (int f=1;f<=packData.faceCount;f++)
7843 packData.setFaceMark(f,0);
7844 count++;
7845 }
7846 if (items.size()==0)
7847 break; // do not default to all here
7848 FaceLink flist=new FaceLink(packData,items);
7849 if (flist==null || flist.size()==0)
7850 break;
7851 Iterator<Integer> fs=flist.iterator();
7852 while (fs.hasNext()) {
7853 packData.setFaceMark((Integer)fs.next(),1);
7854 count++;
7855 }
7856 break;
7857 }
7858 case 'g': // mark gives generation of circles from
7859 // given vertlist (default to alpha)
7860 {
7861 int V;
7862 try {
7863 V=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(0));
7864 } catch(Exception ex) {
7865 V=packData.getAlpha();
7866 }
7867 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++)
7868 packData.setVertUtil(v,0);
7869 packData.setVertUtil(V,1);
7870 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
7871 int []gens=packData.packDCEL.label_generations(-1,uP);
7872 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++) {
7873 packData.setVertMark(v,gens[v]);
7874 count++;
7875 }
7876 packData.setVertMark(V,1);
7877 break;
7878 }
7879 } // end of switch
7880 }
7881 return count;
7882 }
7883
7884 // ============= max_pack ============
7885 else if (cmd.startsWith("max_pa")) {
7886 if (!packData.status || packData.nodeCount<=0) {
7887 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("bad packing data");
7888 return 0;
7889 }
7890 int puncture_v=-1;
7891 int cycles=CPBase.RIFFLE_COUNT;
7892 // Note: there should be only one flag segment. Call forms:
7893 // max_pack [k], for k cycles
7894 // max_pack -r {v}, sphere only, puncture at v.
7895 // max_pack -r {v} [k], both
7896
7897 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0) {
7898 try {
7899 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.elementAt(0);
7900
7901 // first entry a flag?
7902 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
7903 if (packData.hes>0 && items.elementAt(0).equals("-v")) {
7904 puncture_v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(1));
7905 if (puncture_v<1 || puncture_v>packData.nodeCount) {
7906 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("improper puncture; ignored");
7907 puncture_v=-1;
7908 }
7909 }
7910 else if (items.elementAt(0).equals("-v"))
7911 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("'-v' flag ignored; "+
7912 "applies to spherical case only");
7913 }
7914
7915 if (items.size()==1 || items.size()==3) { // last entry, cycles
7916 int k=Integer.parseInt(items.lastElement());
7917 if (k<1) cycles=1;
7918 else if (k>100000) cycles=100000;
7919 else cycles=k;
7920 }
7921 } catch(Exception ex) {}
7922 }
7923
7924 // hyperbolic is most common
7925 if ((packData.intrinsicGeom==0 &&
7926 packData.packDCEL.idealFaceCount>0) ||
7927 packData.intrinsicGeom<0) {
7928 if (packData.hes >=0) {
7929 packData.geom_to_h();
7930 packData.setGeometry(-1);
7931 }
7932 packData.set_aim_default();
7933 try { // e.g., there may be no boundary vertices
7934 jexecute(packData,"set_rad 9.0 b");
7935 } catch (Exception ex) { }
7936
7937 HypPacker h_packer=new HypPacker(packData,-1);
7938 count=h_packer.maxPack(cycles);
7939 }
7940 else if (packData.intrinsicGeom==0) { // can only be 1-torus
7941 if (packData.hes !=0) {
7942 packData.geom_to_e();
7943 packData.setGeometry(0);
7944 }
7945 packData.set_aim_default(); // Orick's code, if available
7946 EuclPacker e_packer=new EuclPacker(packData,-1);
7947 count=e_packer.genericRePack(cycles);
7948 if (count>0)
7949 e_packer.reapResults();
7950 packData.fillcurves();
7951 packData.packDCEL.layoutPacking();
7952 }
7953 else if (packData.intrinsicGeom > 0) { // sph (NSpole also called)
7954 packData.hes=1;
7955 packData.setGeometry(1);
7956 packData.set_aim_default();
7957 SphPacker sphpack=new SphPacker(packData,puncture_v,cycles);
7958 count=sphpack.maxPack(cycles);
7959 sphpack.reapResults();
7960 }
7961 else
7962 return 0;
7963 if (CirclePack.cpb!=null)
7964 CirclePack.cpb.msg("max_pack: "+count+" repacking cycles");
7965 return count;
7966 }
7967
7968 // ========= meld_edge =======
7969 else if (cmd.startsWith("meld_ed")) {
7970 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // just v w
7971 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items);
7972 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
7973 while (his.hasNext()) {
7974 HalfEdge he=his.next();
7975 if (RawManip.meldEdge_raw(packData.packDCEL,he)>0)
7976 count++;
7977 }
7978 if (count>0) {
7979 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
7980 }
7981 return count;
7982 }
7983
7984 // ========= migrate ======
7985 else if (cmd.startsWith("migrate")) {
7986 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // just v w
7987 HalfLink hlist=new HalfLink(packData,items);
7988 HalfEdge edge=hlist.get(0);
7989 int rslt = RawManip.migrate(packData.packDCEL,edge);
7990 if (rslt==0)
7991 return 0;
7992 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
7993 return rslt;
7994 }
7995
7996 // ============ motion =============10/2024
7997 else if (cmd.startsWith("moti")) {
7998 // capture the initial centers/radii
7999 ArrayList<ZRhold> bottom=Interpolator.loadZR(packData);
8000 int N=75; //default
8001 double delay=.004;
8002 StringBuilder quoted;
8003
8004 // quoted string is last string of last entry
8005 int fn=flagSegs.size();
8006 int in=flagSegs.get(fn-1).size();
8007 quoted=new StringBuilder(
8008 flagSegs.get(fn-1).remove(in-1).trim());
8009 if (quoted.charAt(0)!='\"')
8010 throw new ParserException("motion usage: missing commands");
8011
8012 // are there any flags?
8013 Iterator<Vector<String>> fit=flagSegs.iterator();
8014 while (fit.hasNext()) {
8015 items=fit.next();
8016 if (items.size()==2)
8017 try {
8018 if (items.get(0).startsWith("-d")) {
8019 double d=Double.parseDouble(items.remove(1));
8020 delay=d;
8021 }
8022 else if (items.get(0).startsWith("-n")) {
8023 int n=Integer.parseInt(items.remove(1));
8024 if (n>1)
8025 N=n;
8026 }
8027 } catch(Exception ex) {
8028 throw new ParserException(
8029 "motion usage: motion -d {x} -n {k} cmds");
8030 }
8031 }
8032
8033 quoted.deleteCharAt(0);
8034 int k=quoted.indexOf("\"");
8035 quoted.deleteCharAt(k);
8036
8037 String cmds=quoted.toString();
8038
8039 ResultPacket rP=new ResultPacket(CirclePack.cpb.
8040 getActivePackData(),cmds);
8041 CPBase.trafficCenter.parseCmdSeq(rP,0,null);
8042 int ans=Integer.valueOf(rP.cmdCount);
8043 if (ans==0) // if it failed
8044 return 0;
8045
8046 // now interpolate: 'bottom' --> new packing
8047 Interpolator inlator=new Interpolator(bottom,packData,N);
8048 for (int jj=1;jj<=N;jj++) {
8049 ArrayList<ZRhold> zrh=inlator.get(jj);
8050 Interpolator.restoreZR(packData,zrh);
8051 jexecute(packData,"disp");
8052 try {
8053 Thread.sleep((long) (delay * 1000.0));
8054 } catch (InterruptedException ie) {}
8055 count++;
8056 }
8057 jexecute(packData,"disp -wr");
8058 return count;
8059 }
8060 break;
8061 } // end of 'm' and 'M'
8062 case 'n': // fall through
8063 case 'N':
8064 {
8065 // =========== norm_scale ========
8066 /* normalize eucl packing using one (only) of these options.
8067 a: scale specified eucl area
8068 c: designated vert to prescribed radius
8069 e: radius of v in p equals radius of w in q.
8070 h: rotate so designated verts in horizontal line
8071 i: scale/rotate to center designated vert at z=i.
8072 m: apply trans. locating u,v at z1 z2
8073 s: special for schwarzian, to normalize to half planes
8074 t: torus: normalize fundamental domain, report tau.
8075 u: designated vert on unit circle
8076 U: scale down (only) to fit packing in unit disc
8077 Return 0 on error. */
8078 if (cmd.startsWith("norm_scale")) {
8079 if (packData.hes!=0) {
8080 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("'norm_scale' applies only to euclidean packings");
8081 return 1; // but don't consider it an error
8082 }
8083 try {
8084 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // only allow one flag segment
8085 String str=items.remove(0);
8086 switch(str.charAt(1)) {
8087
8088 case 'a': // scale to given area.
8089 {
8090 double x=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(0));
8091 if (x<PackData.OKERR)
8092 return 0;
8093 double area=0.0;
8094 for (int j=1;j<=packData.faceCount;j++) {
8095 area += packData.faceArea(j);
8096 }
8097 Double factor=Double.valueOf(Math.sqrt(x/area));
8098 if (!factor.isNaN())
8099 return packData.eucl_scale(factor);
8100 }
8101 case 'c': // scale to give v the prescribed radius
8102 {
8103 int v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(0));
8104 double rad=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(1));
8105 double factor=rad/packData.getRadius(v);
8106 return packData.eucl_scale(factor);
8107 }
8108 case 'e': // scale so vertex v has same radius as vert w in pack q
8109 // data in the form 'q v w'.
8110 {
8111 int q=Integer.parseInt((String)items.remove(0));
8112 if (q<0 || q>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS
8113 || !CPBase.cpDrawing[q].getPackData().status)
8114 throw new ParserException("pack q not valid");
8115 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
8116 int v=(Integer)vertlist.get(0);
8117 double rad=packData.getRadius(v);
8118 int w=(Integer)vertlist.get(1);
8119 PackData qackData=CPBase.cpDrawing[q].getPackData();
8120 if (w>qackData.nodeCount || rad<PackData.OKERR)
8121 throw new ParserException("problem with 'w'");
8122 double factor=qackData.getRadius(w)/rad;
8123 return packData.eucl_scale(factor);
8124 }
8125 case 'h': // v --> w horizontal, left to right
8126 {
8127 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
8128 int v=vertlist.get(0);
8129 int w=vertlist.get(1);
8130 Complex z=packData.getCenter(w).minus(packData.getCenter(v));
8131 double ang=(-1.0)*(MathComplex.Arg(z));
8132 return (packData.rotate(ang));
8133 }
8134 case 'i': // center v at z=i (if v is not too close to origin)
8135 {
8136 int v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(0));
8137 Complex z=packData.getCenter(v);
8138 double x=z.abs();
8139 if (x<PackData.OKERR)
8140 return 1; // don't need to adjust
8141 double factor=1.0/x;
8142 double ang=(-1.0)*(MathComplex.Arg(z))+Math.PI/2.0;
8143 packData.rotate(ang);
8144 return (packData.eucl_scale(factor));
8145 }
8146 case 'u': // designated vert on unit circle
8147 {
8148 int v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(0));
8149 double ctr=packData.getCenter(v).abs();
8150 // if already good, don't bother, close enough
8151 if (Math.abs(ctr-1.0) < PackData.OKERR)
8152 return 1;
8153 // if ctr is to close to zero, abort
8154 if (ctr<.001)
8155 return 0;
8156 double factor=1.0/ctr;
8157 return packData.eucl_scale(factor);
8158 }
8159 case 'U': // scale (down, only) to fit in unit disc,
8160 {
8161 if (packData.hes!=0)
8162 return 0;
8163 double max=0;
8164 NodeLink blist=new NodeLink(packData,"b");
8165 Iterator<Integer> bl=blist.iterator();
8166 while (bl.hasNext()) {
8167 int v=bl.next();
8168 double dist=packData.getCenter(v).abs()+packData.getRadius(v);
8169 max=(dist>max) ? dist:max;
8170 }
8171 // scale down
8172 if (max>.999) {
8173 return jexecute(packData,"scale "+1.0/max);
8174 }
8175 return 1; // don't scale, but don't fail (nice rhyme!)
8176 }
8177 case 'm': // [u v x1 y1 x2 y2] given, apply linear trans
8178 // to center u v at z1 z2.
8179 {
8180 int u=1;
8181 int v=1;
8182 Complex z1=null;
8183 Complex z2=null;
8184 try {
8185 u=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
8186 v=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(1));
8187 z1=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(2)),
8188 Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(3)));
8189 z2=new Complex(Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(4)),
8190 Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(5)));
8191 } catch(Exception ex) {
8192 throw new ParserException("usage: "+
8193 "norm_scale -t u v xu yu xv yv");
8194 }
8195 Mobius mymob=null;
8196 try {
8197 mymob=Mobius.mob_abAB(packData.getCenter(u),
8198 packData.getCenter(v),z1,z2);
8199 } catch (Exception ex) {
8200 throw new DataException("failed to create Mobius: "+
8201 ex.getMessage());
8202 }
8203
8204 // apply this mobius to the packing
8205 return (packData.apply_Mobius(mymob,
8206 new NodeLink(packData,"a")));
8207 }
