8208 case 's': // normalize a la schwarzian flowers
8209 {
8210 // must be a flower, max index at center,
8211 // center at origin
8212 if (packData.intNodeCount!=1)
8213 return 0;
8214 if (packData.hes!=0)
8215 CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData,"geom_to_e");
8216 CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData,"norm_scale -c M 1.0");
8217 // center's halfedge should point to "c_1"
8218 HalfEdge he=packData.packDCEL.vertices[packData.nodeCount].halfedge;
8219 Vertex c1=he.twin.origin; // should act as "c1"
8220 Vertex cn=he.twin.next.twin.origin; // should act as lower halfplane
8221 double rot=.5-cn.center.arg()/Math.PI; // rotate to center cn on y-axis
8222 CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData,"rotate "+rot);
8223 double r=cn.rad;
8224 double a=2*r/(1.0+r);
8225 // apply Mobius so cn is halfplane y<=-2i
8226 Mobius smob=new Mobius(new Complex(0.0,-a),new Complex(a,0.0),
8227 new Complex(1.0),new Complex(0.0,-1.0));
8228 packData.apply_Mobius(smob,new NodeLink(packData,"a"));
8229
8230 // put next c1 at origin, set its radius to 1
8231 double x=c1.center.x;
8232 c1.rad=1.0;
8233 smob=new Mobius(new Complex(1.0),new Complex(-x,0.0),
8234 new Complex(0.0),new Complex(1.0,0.0));
8235 int ans=packData.apply_Mobius(smob,
8236 new NodeLink(packData,"a"));
8237 return ans;
8238 }
8239 case 't': // normalize a torus and report tau
8240 {
8241 TorusData torusData;
8242 try {
8243 torusData=new TorusData(packData);
8244 } catch (Exception ex) {
8245 throw new ParserException("usage: "
8246 +"norm_scale -t only applies to"
8247 + "tori");
8248 }
8249
8250 // report 'tau' and its reciprocal
8251 CirclePack.cpb.msg("torus_tau: modulus = "+torusData.tau);
8252 Complex taurecip=torusData.tau.reciprocal();
8253 CirclePack.cpb.msg(" (and 1/modulus = "+taurecip+")");
8254 return 1;
8255 }
8256 } // end of switch
8257 } catch (Exception ex) {
8258 throw new ParserException("No flags found");
8259 }
8260 return 0;
8261 }
8262
8263 // =========== NSPole ==========
8264 else if (cmd.startsWith("NSpole") || cmd.startsWith(("NSPole"))) {
8265 if (packData.hes <= 0) {
8266 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("NSpole: pack must be spherical");
8267 return 1;
8268 }
8269 NSpole nsPoler=new NSpole(packData); // routines are here
8270 int rslt=nsPoler.parseNSpole(flagSegs);
8271 return rslt;
8272 }
8273
8274 // =========== newRed ==========
8275 else if (cmd.startsWith("newRe")) {
8276 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0)
8277 return 0;
8278 items=flagSegs.get(0); // DCELdebug.printRedChain(packData.packDCEL.recChain);
8279 RedEdge newRed=null;
8280
8281 // torus: '-t' flag only
8282 if (items.get(0).startsWith("-t") &&
8283 packData.genus==1 && packData.getBdryCompCount()==0) {
8284 newRed=CombDCEL.torus4Sides(packData.packDCEL);
8285 }
8286
8287 else { // possibly hex extended link
8288 NodeLink vlink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
8289 newRed=RawManip.vlink2red(packData.packDCEL,vlink);
8290 }
8291
8292 if (newRed==null) {
8293 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("failed to get a new red chain");
8294 return 0;
8295 }
8296
8297 // clear out old red info, then install 'newRed'
8298 RawManip.wipeRedChain(packData.packDCEL,packData.packDCEL.redChain);
8299 packData.packDCEL.redChain=newRed;
8300
8301 // zero out 'eutil'; can set negative for edges to prevent
8302 // them from being red-twinned.
8303 for (int e=1;e<=packData.packDCEL.edgeCount;e++)
8304 packData.packDCEL.edges[e].eutil=0;
8305
8306 CombDCEL.finishRedChain(packData.packDCEL,packData.packDCEL.redChain);
8307 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
8308 return 1;
8309 }
8310 break;
8311 } // end of 'n' and 'N'
8312 case 'o':
8313 {
8314 // ========= output ===========
8315 if (cmd.startsWith("output")) {
8316 String filename=null;
8317 String message=null;
8318 BufferedWriter fp=null;
8319 boolean script_flag=false;
8320 boolean append_flag=false;
8321
8322 // Is there a filename??
8323 StringBuilder theName=new StringBuilder();
8324 int code=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs,theName);
8325 if (code!=0) { // yes
8326 File file=new File(theName.toString());
8327 if ((code & 04)==04 && CPBase.scriptManager.isScriptLoaded())
8328 script_flag=true;
8329 if ((code & 02)==02)
8330 append_flag=true;
8331 filename=file.getName();
8332 String dir=file.getParent();
8333 if (dir==null || dir.length()==0)
8334 dir=CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.toString();
8335 fp=CPFileManager.openWriteFP(new File(dir),append_flag,filename,script_flag);
8336 }
8337 if (fp==null) {
8338 throw new InOutException("usage: output ... <filename>");
8339 }
8340
8341 // now process the output description
8342 String fullstr=StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs);
8343 String []part=new String[4];
8344 part=fullstr.toString().split("::");
8345 try {
8346 for (int i=0;i<4;i++) part[i]=part[i].trim();
8347 } catch (Exception ex) {
8348 throw new ParserException(
8349 "structure: 'prefix :: data :: loop :: suffix'");
8350 }
8351
8352 // write to and close the file, post message
8353 int rtncnt=OutPanel.outputter(fp,packData,part[0],
8354 part[1],part[2],part[3]);
8355 if (rtncnt>0) {
8356 // for "message" window
8357 if (script_flag) {
8358 CPBase.scriptManager.includeNewFile(filename);
8359 message=new String("output data "+
8360 "appended as file '"+filename+"' in script");
8361 }
8362 else if (append_flag)
8363 message=new String("output data was appended to file '"+
8364 CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.
8365 getPath()+File.separator+filename+"'");
8366 else
8367 message=new String("output data saved in file '"+
8368 CPFileManager.CurrentDirectory.
8369 getPath()+File.separator+filename+"'");
8370 }
8371 CirclePack.cpb.msg(message);
8372 return rtncnt;
8373 }
8374 break;
8375 } // end of 'o'
8376 case 'p':
8377 {
8378 // ============ pair_mob ===============
8379 if (cmd.startsWith("pair_mob")) {
8380 if (packData.packDCEL.pairLink==null ||
8381 packData.packDCEL.pairLink.size()<2) {
8382 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Packing has no side-pairings");
8383 return 0;
8384 }
8385
8386 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // one segment
8387 String str=(String)items.get(0);
8388 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) { // -s, currently the only flag
8389 if (!str.equals("-s")) {
8390 throw new ParserException("usage: pair_mob -s {label}");
8391 }
8392 items.remove(0); // toss it, keep rest
8393 }
8394
8395 if (items.size()==0)
8396 throw new ParserException("usage: pair_mob {label}");
8397
8398 Mobius mb=packData.namedSidePair(items.get(0).trim());
8399 if (mb==null)
8400 throw new ParserException("usage: 'label' not "+
8401 "matched with pair_mob");
8402 return packData.apply_Mobius(mb,
8403 new NodeLink(packData,"a"),true,false);
8404 }
8405
8406 // =========== perp_pack ==========
8407 else if (cmd.startsWith("perp")) {
8408
8409 if (!packData.status || packData.euler!=1 || packData.genus!=0) {
8410 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: perp_pack only "+
8411 "applies in topological disc case.");
8412 return 0;
8413 }
8414 CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData,"geom_to_e");
8415 int cycles=CPBase.RIFFLE_COUNT;
8416 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0 && (items=flagSegs.get(0))!=null) {
8417 try {
8418 int k=Integer.parseInt(items.elementAt(0));
8419 if (k<1)
8420 cycles=1;
8421 else if (k>100000)
8422 cycles=100000; // 100,000 limit
8423 else
8424 cycles=k;
8425 } catch(Exception ex) {
8426 cycles=5000;
8427 }
8428 }
8429
8430 // create copy and double across bdry
8431 PackData holdPack=packData.copyPackTo();
8432 PackDCEL newpdcel=CombDCEL.doubleDCEL(holdPack.packDCEL,null,false);
8433 int antip=newpdcel.oldNew.findW(packData.getAlpha());
8434 newpdcel.fixDCEL(holdPack);
8435 CommandStrParser.jexecute(holdPack,"geom_to_s");
8436
8437 // max_pack this topological sphere; this normalizes also
8438 int ans=0;
8439 if ((ans+=CommandStrParser.jexecute(holdPack,"max_pack -v "+antip+" "+cycles))==0) {
8440 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("hum.. ran into packing problem with 'perp_pack'");
8441 return 0;
8442 }
8443
8444 // project the copy to the plane
8445 CommandStrParser.jexecute(holdPack,"geom_to_e");
8446
8447 // now copy center/rad into 'packData'
8448 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++) {
8449 packData.setRadiusActual(v,holdPack.getActualRadius(v));
8450 packData.setCenter(v,holdPack.getCenter(v));
8451 }
8452
8453 return packData.nodeCount;
8454 }
8455
8456 // =========== prune ============
8457 else if (cmd.startsWith("prun")) {
8458 int rslt=CombDCEL.pruneDCEL(packData.packDCEL);
8459 if (rslt>0) {
8460 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
8461
8462 // store new-to-old indices in 'vertexMap'.
8463 EdgeLink newold=(EdgeLink)packData.packDCEL.oldNew;
8464 newold.flipEdgeEntries();
8465 packData.vertexMap=(VertexMap)newold;
8466
8467 return rslt;
8468 }
8469 return 1;
8470 }
8471
8472 // ============ puncture ==========
8473 else if (cmd.startsWith("puncture")) {
8474 boolean cutVert=true;
8475 int pf=-1;
8476 int pv=-1;
8477
8478 // default to puncture maximal vertex index
8479 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
8480 pv=packData.nodeCount;
8481 if (packData.puncture_vert(pv)==0)
8482 return 0;
8483 packData.xyzpoint=null; // ditch any xyz data
8484 return 1;
8485 }
8486
8487 // else look for flags or index
8488 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // one segment
8489 String str=(String)items.get(0);
8490 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
8491 items.remove(0); // dump this string
8492 char c=str.charAt(1);
8493 switch(c) {
8494 case 'f': // face
8495 {
8496 cutVert=false;
8497 break;
8498 }
8499 default:
8500 {
8501 cutVert=true;
8502 }
8503 } // end of switch
8504 }
8505 try {
8506 if (cutVert) { // puncture a vertex
8507 pv=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,flagSegs);
8508 if (pv<=0)
8509 pv=packData.nodeCount; // default to max index
8510 count +=pv;
8511 if (packData.puncture_vert(pv)==0)
8512 return 0;
8513 packData.xyzpoint=null;
8514 }
8515 else { // puncture a face
8516 pf=FaceLink.grab_one_face(packData,flagSegs);
8517 count+=pf;
8518 if (packData.puncture_face(pf)==0)
8519 return 0;
8520 }
8521 } catch (Exception ex) {
8522 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("attemp to puncture at "+pv+" went wrong.");
8523 return 0;
8524 }
8525 return count;
8526 }
8527
8528 // ========== proj =============
8529 else if (cmd.startsWith("proj")) {
8530 /* Options (in order of precedence):
8531 -e v gives vert to place at 1 on equator.
8532 -m compute a vertex furthest in generations from alpha
8533 and S and place it at 1 on equator.
8534 -t x dilation amount; sets ratio of spherical radii, alpha/S.
8535 default is "-t 1" (equal radii at N and S). */
8536 if (packData.hes>=0 || packData.getBdryCompCount()!=1) {
8537 throw new ParserException("packing must be hyperbolic");
8538 }
8539
8540 // find vertex to be put at 1 on equator
8541 double ratio=1.0;
8542 int E=0;
8543 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag=flagSegs.iterator();
8544 while (nextFlag.hasNext() && (items=nextFlag.next()).size()>0) {
8545 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
8546 switch(items.get(0).charAt(1)) {
8547
8548 // Here's the specific parsing of flag itself
8549 case 'e': // fall through to 'E'
8550 case 'E':
8551 {
8552 E=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(1));
8553 if (E<1 || E==packData.getAlpha() || packData.isBdry(E))
8554 E=0;
8555 if (E==0) {
8556 throw new CombException("invalid vertex");
8557 }
8558 ratio=0.0;
8559 break;
8560 }
8561 case 'm': // combinatorial midpoint between alpha and bdry
8562 {
8563 if (E<3) { // 'E flag takes precedence
8564 for (int j=1;j<=packData.nodeCount;j++){
8565 if (packData.isBdry(j))
8566 packData.setVertUtil(j,1);
8567 else
8568 packData.setVertUtil(j,0);
8569 }
8570 packData.setVertUtil(packData.getAlpha(),1);
8571 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
8572// int []list=packData.label_generations(-1,uP);
8573 if ((E=uP.rtnFlag)>0 &&
8574 E!=packData.getAlpha() &&
8575 !packData.isBdry(E)) { // okay choice
8576 ratio=0.0;
8577 }
8578 else {
8579 throw new ParserException("-m option failed");
8580 }
8581 }
8582 break;
8583 }
8584 case 't': // arrange right ratio of radii
8585 {
8586 if (E!=0) { // earlier choices take precedence
8587 try {
8588 ratio=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(1));
8589 } catch(Exception ex) {}
8590 if (ratio<=0.0 || ratio>1.0) ratio=1.0;
8591 }
8592 break;
8593 }
8594 } // end of flag switch
8595 } // done handling a given flagged segment
8596 } // end of while
8597
8598 return packData.proj_max_to_s(E,ratio);
8599 }
8600
8601 // ========= path_construct ======
8602 else if (cmd.startsWith("path_c")) {
8603 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // only one segment
8604 int mode=0; // default is -m
8605 String str=(String)items.get(0);
8606 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
8607 items.remove(0);
8608 switch(str.charAt(1)) {
8609 case 'm': // default: build edge path
8610 {
8611 mode=0;
8612 break;
8613 }
8614 case 'i': // incremental turns mode
8615 {
8616 mode=1;
8617 break;
8618 }
8619 default:
8620 {
8621 mode=0;
8622 }
8623 } // end of switch
8624 }
8625
8626 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
8627 // pick off v1
8628 int v1=vertlist.remove(0);
8629 if (v1<1 || v1>packData.nodeCount || vertlist==null
8630 || vertlist.size()==0)
8631 throw new ParserException();
8632 NodeLink new_verts=packData.path_construct(mode,v1,vertlist);
8633 if (new_verts==null || new_verts.size()==0) return 0;
8634 if (CPBase.Vlink==null) {
8635 CPBase.Vlink=new NodeLink((PackData)null); // create it
8636 new_verts.add(0,v1); // put v1 in first spot
8637 }
8638 else { // Add v1 before new_verts if not already there
8639 int last=(Integer)CPBase.Vlink.get(CPBase.Vlink.size()-1);
8640 if (last!=v1) new_verts.add(0,v1);
8641 }
8642 CPBase.Vlink.addAll(new_verts);
8643 CirclePack.cpb.msg("path_construct: added "+new_verts.size()+
8644 "vertices to 'Vlist'");
8645 return new_verts.size();
8646 }
8647
8648 // ========= post =======
8649 else if (cmd.startsWith("post")) {
8650 // No flag strings? Use default filename, 'postOptions',
8651 // and popup.
8652 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
8653 // if postManager is open, then close 'fp' and execute via PSPanel:
8654 // TODO: caution, this uses data from PSPanel, hence from
8655 // active pack
8656 if (CPBase.postManager.isOpen()) {
8657 jexecute(packData,PackControl.
8658 outputFrame.postPanel.createSuffix());
8659 }
8660 String cmdbuild=new String(PackControl.outputFrame.postPanel.
8661 createPrefix(new String("sel_post_"+packData.packNum))+
8662 PackControl.outputFrame.postPanel.formPostFlags()+
8663 PackControl.outputFrame.postPanel.createSuffix());
8664 jexecute(packData,cmdbuild);
8665 return 1;
8666 }
8667
8668 // Pick off 'o', 'x', create new flag segments with others
8669 Vector<Vector<String>> otherSegs=new Vector<Vector<String>>(2);
8670 try {
8671 int n=flagSegs.size();
8672 int i=0;
8673
8674 // '-o' flags can only come first
8675 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
8676 String sub_cmd=(String)items.get(0);
8677 if (sub_cmd.startsWith("-o")) {
8678 i=1;
8679 items.remove(0);
8680 int mode=1;
8681 String nmstr=null;
8682 String insstr=null;
8683 if (items.size()>0) { // must be: <name> and/or <quoted "string">
8684 // have to find, remove a quoted string, if it exists
8685 // (problem is, {name} may have whitespace)
8686 String recon=StringUtil.reconItem(items);
8687 int i1=recon.indexOf('"');
8688 int i2=-1;
8689 if (i1>=0) {
8690 i2=recon.indexOf('"',i1+1);
8691 // various errors: no characters between, too many quotes, etc
8692 if (i1>recon.length()-4 || i2==i1+1
8693 || i2<0 || recon.indexOf('"',i2+1)>=0) {
8694 recon=recon.substring(0,i1); // toss all after first "
8695 i1=-1;
8696 i2=-1;
8697 }
8698 else
8699 insstr=recon.substring(i1+1,i2);
8700 }
8701 // name should be string before or after quoted string
8702 if (i1==0) // name must be after quoted
8703 recon=recon.substring(i2+1,recon.length()-1).trim();
8704 else if (i1>0) // name must be before quoted
8705 recon=recon.substring(0,i1).trim();
8706 nmstr=new String(recon);
8707 }
8708 if (sub_cmd.startsWith("-oa")) { // append
8709 mode=3;
8710 }
8711 else if (sub_cmd.startsWith("-oi")) { // insert
8712 mode=2;
8713 }
8714 try {
8715 CPBase.postManager.open_psfile(packData.cpDrawing,mode,nmstr,insstr);
8716 count++;
8717 } catch(InOutException iox) {
8718 throw new InOutException("opening failed: "+iox.getMessage());
8719 }
8720 }
8721
8722 // now process the rest
8723 for (int j=i;j<n;j++) {
8724 if (!CPBase.postManager.isOpen()) {
8725 throw new InOutException("Postscript file not open.");
8726 }
8727 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(j);
8728 sub_cmd=(String)items.get(0);
8729
8730 if (sub_cmd.startsWith("-o"))
8731 throw new ParserException("post: usage: '-o' flag only first");
8732 // '-x' end the processing
8733 if (sub_cmd.startsWith("-x")) {
8734
8735 // process any intervening flag strings
8736 if (otherSegs!=null && otherSegs.size()>0) {
8737 count += PostParser.postParse(pF,packData,otherSegs);
8738 }
8739
8740 String hold=CPBase.postManager.psUltimateFile.getCanonicalPath();
8741 if (CPBase.postManager.close_psfile(packData.cpDrawing)>0) {
8742 CirclePack.cpb.msg("post: saved PostScript in "+hold);
8743 }
8744 else
8745 CirclePack.cpb.msg("post: there seems to be no file "+hold);
8746 if (sub_cmd!=null && sub_cmd.length()>2) {
8747 char d=sub_cmd.charAt(2);
8748 switch(d){
8749 case 'l': // send to printer
8750 {
8751 throw new InOutException("'print' postscript "+
8752 "option not yet implemented");
8753 // TODO:
8754 }
8755 case 'j':
8756 {
8757 throw new InOutException("'jpg' posting option "+
8758 "not yet implemented");
8759 // TODO:
8760 }
8761 case 'g':
8762 {
8763 // TODO: don't know how to call, and how to avoid looping
8764 break;
8765 // try executing system call
8766/* Runtime rt=Runtime.getRuntime();
8767 try {
8768 String gvcmd=new String(PackControl.preferences.getGvCmd()+
8769 " "+hold);
8770 String params[]={"ping","127.0.0.1"};
8771 Process proc=rt.exec(params);
8772// Process proc=rt.exec(gvcmd);
8773 BufferedReader reader=new BufferedReader(
8774 new InputStreamReader(proc.getInputStream()));
8775 String lineRead=null;
8776 while ((lineRead=reader.readLine())!=null) {
8777 System.out.println(lineRead);
8778 }
8779 int exitVal=proc.waitFor();
8780 if (exitVal!=0) {
8781 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("Ghostview popup,
8782 command '"+gvcmd+"', has failed.");
8783 }
8784 } catch (Exception ex) {
8785 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsgError("Ghostview 'popup' failed");
8786 break;
8787 }
8788 break;*/
8789 }
8790 } // end of switch
8791 }
8792 return count+1;
8793 } // done with '-x'
8794
8795 otherSegs.add(items);
8796 } // end of for
8797
8798 count += PostParser.postParse(pF,packData,otherSegs);
8799 return count;
8800 } catch (Exception ex) {
8801 throw new ParserException("post parsing error: "+ex.getMessage());
8802 }
8803
8804 } // end of 'post'
8805
8806 break;
8807 } // end of 'p'
8808 case 'q':
8809 {
8810 // ========= qc_dil ======
8811 if (cmd.startsWith("qc_dil")) {
8812 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // one segment
8813 String str=items.remove(0);
8814 PackData q=null;
8815 // must start with other packing number
8816 try {
8817 if ((q=CPBase.cpDrawing[StringUtil.
8818 qFlagParse(str)].getPackData())==packData) {
8819 throw new ParserException();
8820 }
8821 } catch (Exception ex) {
8822 throw new ParserException("usage: qc_dil -q{q} {f..}");
8823 }
8824 if (packData.nodeCount != q.nodeCount || packData.hes!=0 || q.hes!=0) {
8825 throw new ParserException("comparing p and q "+
8826 "requires they be eucl and equal sized");
8827 }
8828 FaceLink facelist=new FaceLink(packData,items);
8829 double maxdil=1.0;
8830 double dil=1.0;
8831 int f;
8832 Iterator<Integer> flist=facelist.iterator();
8833 while (flist.hasNext()) {
8834 f=(Integer)flist.next();
8835 dil=packData.face_dilatation(q,f);
8836 maxdil=(dil>maxdil) ? dil : maxdil;
8837 count++;
8838 }
8839 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Maximal dilatation, p"+
8840 packData.packNum+" q"+q.packNum+" is "+maxdil);
8841 return count;
8842 }
8843
8844 // =========== quality ===================
8845 if (cmd.startsWith("qual")) {
8846
8847 // TODO: functionality should be extended.
8848 CallPacket cP=null;
8849 try {
8850 cP=CommandStrParser.valueExecute(packData,cmd,flagSegs);
8851 } catch(Exception ex) {
8852 cP=null;
8853 }
8854 if (cP==null || cP.strValue.length()==0) {
8855 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("qual call failed");
8856 return 0;
8857 }
8858
8859 char c=cP.strValue.charAt(0);
8860 switch(c) {
8861 case 'v':
8862 {
8863 if (cP.error) {
8864 return 0;
8865 }
8866 else {
8867 CirclePack.cpb.msg("quality: worst visual error = "+
8868 String.format("%.2e",cP.double_vec.get(0))+
8869 " on edge ("+cP.int_vec.get(0)+" "+cP.int_vec.get(1)+")");
8870 if (cP.strValue.length()>3) // there is a "too small" message
8871 CirclePack.cpb.msg("(Some radii too small to rely on)");
8872 }
8873 return 1;
8874 }
8875 case 'a':
8876 {
8877 if (!cP.error)
8878 CirclePack.cpb.msg("The worst |angsum - aim| was "+cP.double_vec.get(0)+
8879 " at v = "+cP.int_vec.get(0));
8880 return 1;
8881 }
8882 case 'r':
8883 {
8884 if (cP.error)
8885 return 0;
8886 CirclePack.cpb.msg("quality: worst relative error = "+
8887 String.format("%.2e",cP.double_vec.get(0))+
8888 " on edge ("+cP.int_vec.get(0)+" "+cP.int_vec.get(1)+")");
8889 return 1;
8890 }
8891 case 'n':
8892 {
8893 if (!cP.error) {
8894 CirclePack.cpb.msg("quality: no radius or center NaN's");
8895 return 1;
8896 }
8897 if (cP.strValue.startsWith("nr"))
8898 CirclePack.cpb.msg("quality: v = "+
8899 cP.int_vec.get(0)+" has radius = NaN");
8900 else if (cP.strValue.startsWith("nc"))
8901 CirclePack.cpb.msg("quality: v = "+
8902 cP.int_vec.get(0)+" has center = NaN");
8903 else
8904 return 0; // some error
8905 return 1;
8906 }
8907 case 'o':
8908 {
8909 if (!cP.error)
8910 CirclePack.cpb.msg("There are no face orientation errors");
8911 else
8912 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Some faces are no oriented "+
8913 "correctly, e.g.,"+cP.int_vec.get(0));
8914 return 1;
8915 }
8916 } // end of switch
8917 return 0;
8918 }
8919 break;
8920 } // end of 'q'
8921 case 'r': // fall through
8922 case 'R':
8923 {
8924
8925 // =========== renumber =========
8926 if (cmd.startsWith("renum")) {
8927 int rslt=CombDCEL.reNumber(packData.packDCEL); // packData.getFlower(1132);
8928 if (rslt>0) {
8929 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Renumbering seemed to work");
8930 return rslt;
8931 }
8932
8933 return 0;
8934 }
8935
8936 // =========== rotate ===========
8937 else if (cmd.startsWith("rotate")) {
8938 double x=0.0;
8939 try {
8940 x=StringUtil.getOneDouble(flagSegs);
8941 } catch(Exception ex) {
8942 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: rotate <x>, x a double");
8943 return 0;
8944 }
8945 return packData.rotate(x*Math.PI);
8946 }
8947
8948 // ========== repack =============
8949 else if (cmd.startsWith("repack")) {
8950 if (packData.hes>0) {
8951 CirclePack.cpb.msg("repack: no spherical algorithm yet "+
8952 "exists; you can use 'max_pack'");
8953 return 0;
8954 }
8955
8956 // flags controlling the calls
8957 boolean oldReliable=false;
8958 boolean use_C=true;
8959
8960 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag=flagSegs.iterator();
8961 int cycles=CPBase.RIFFLE_COUNT;
8962 while (nextFlag.hasNext() && (items=nextFlag.next()).size()>0) {
8963 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
8964 String str=items.remove(0);
8965 char c=str.charAt(1);
8966 switch(c) {
8967 case 'v': // specified vertices only; must be last flag segment
8968 {
8969 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
8970
8971 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
8972 while(vlist.hasNext()) {
8973 int v=(Integer)vlist.next();
8974 if (packData.hes<0)
8975 count +=packData.h_riffle_vert(v);
8976 else if (packData.hes==0)
8977 count +=packData.e_riffle_vert(v);
8978 // else packData.s_riffle_vert(v);
8979 }
8980 if (count<=0) {
8981 CirclePack.cpb.msg("repack: no repacking was needed");
8982 return 1;
8983 }
8984 return count;
8985 }
8986 case 'o': // use 'oldReliable' -- caution: slow
8987 {
8988 oldReliable=true;
8989 // fix cycles (I think this is old meaning of 'cycles' so
8990 // may be smaller than anticipated.)
8991 try {
8992 int k=Integer.parseInt(items.elementAt(0));
8993 if (k<1) cycles=1;
8994 else if (k>100000) cycles=100000; // 100,000 limit
8995 else cycles=k;
8996 } catch(Exception ex) { }
8997 break;
8998 }
8999 // TODO: need to implement other packing routines and put
9000 // in the options here, e.g., 't' (which should be default
9001 // for inversive distance cases.)
9002 } // end of switch
9003 }
9004 else { // should be 'cycles' indicator
9005 try {
9006 int k=Integer.parseInt(items.elementAt(0));
9007 if (k<1) cycles=1;
9008 else if (k>100000) cycles=100000; // 100,000 limit
9009 else cycles=k;
9010 } catch(Exception ex) { }
9011 }
9012 } // end of while
9013 count=packData.repack_call(cycles,oldReliable,use_C);
9014
9015 if (count==0) {
9016 // TODO: what about errors? do they give exceptions?
9017 CirclePack.cpb.msg("repack: no repacking was needed");
9018 return 1;
9019 }
9020 return count;
9021 }
9022
9023 // ========== rm_? ===========
9024 else if (cmd.startsWith("rm_")) {
9025 cmd=cmd.substring(3);
9026 items=new Vector<String>();
9027 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0)
9028 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // just one seqment
9029
9030 if (cmd.startsWith("bary")) { // "rm_bary": barycenters
9031
9032 // default to all 3-degree interior
9033 NodeLink vertlist=null;
9034 if (items==null || items.size()==0)
9035 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,"{c:(i).and.(d.eq.3)}");
9036 else
9037 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
9038
9039 if (vertlist==null || vertlist.size()==0) {
9040 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("'rm_bary': no vertices specified");
9041 return count;
9042 }
9043
9044 // DCEL setting
9045 packData.packDCEL.oldNew=new VertexMap();
9046 Iterator<Integer> vis=vertlist.iterator();
9047 while(vis.hasNext()) {
9048 int v=vis.next();
9049 int newv=packData.packDCEL.oldNew.findW(v);
9050 if (newv==0)
9051 newv=v;
9052 int rslt=RawManip.rmBary_raw(packData.packDCEL,
9053 packData.packDCEL.vertices[newv]);
9054 if (rslt==0) {
9055 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("'rm_bary' failed on vertex "+v);
9056 if (count>0)
9057 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
9058 return count;
9059 }
9060 count++;
9061 }
9062 packData.packDCEL.oldNew=null;
9063 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
9064 return count++;
9065 }
9066
9067 else if (cmd.startsWith("cir")) { // "rm_circle"
9068 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
9069
9070 // is this just removing one barycenter??
9071 if (vertlist!=null && vertlist.size()==1) {
9072 Vertex vert=packData.packDCEL.vertices[vertlist.get(0)];
9073 if (!vert.isBdry() && vert.getNum()==3) {
9074 return CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData,"rm_bary "+vert.vertIndx);
9075 }
9076 }
9077
9078 int origCount=packData.packDCEL.vertCount;
9079 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink();
9080 Iterator<Integer> vis=vertlist.iterator();
9081 while (vis.hasNext()) {
9082 int v=vis.next();
9083 HalfLink hlk=packData.packDCEL.vertices[v].
9084 getOuterEdges();
9085 hlink.abutMore(hlk);
9086 }
9087 PackDCEL pdc=CombDCEL.extractDCEL(packData.packDCEL,
9088 hlink,null);
9089 pdc.fixDCEL(packData);
9090 packData.xyzpoint=null;
9091 int n=origCount-packData.packDCEL.vertCount;
9092 CirclePack.cpb.msg("rm_cir: removed "+n+" circles from p"+
9093 packData.packNum);
9094 if (n>0)
9095 return n;
9096 return 1;
9097 }
9098 else if (cmd.startsWith("quad")) { // "rm_quad"
9099
9100 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items);
9101
9102 if (hlink==null || hlink.size()==0) {
9103 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: rm_quad {u v ...} (give edges)");
9104 return count;
9105 }
9106
9107 // repeat while succeeding: a vert
9108 // may/maynot qualify after previous actions.
9109 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
9110
9111 packData.packDCEL.oldNew=new VertexMap();
9112 while (his.hasNext()) {
9113 // DCELdebug.printRedChain(packData.packDCEL.redChain);
9114 HalfEdge edge=his.next();
9115 int rslt=RawManip.rmQuadNode(packData.packDCEL,edge);
9116 if (rslt==0) {
9117 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("rm_quad failed for edge "+edge);
9118 if (count>0)
9119 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
9120 return count;
9121 }
9122 count++;
9123 }
9124
9125 // finish up
9126 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
9127 return count;
9128 }
9129 else if (cmd.startsWith("edge")) { // "rm_edge"
9130
9131 // check for '-c' (consolidate) flag (only for "rm_edge")
9132 boolean consolid=false;
9133 String strg=items.get(0);
9134 if (StringUtil.isFlag(strg)) {
9135 if (!strg.equals("-c"))
9136 throw new ParserException("illegal flag "+strg);
9137 // collapsing int/bdry edges
9138 items.remove(0); // shuck this entry
9139 consolid=true;
9140 }
9141
9142 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items);
9143 packData.packDCEL.oldNew=new VertexMap();
9144 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
9145 while(his.hasNext()) {
9146 HalfEdge edge=his.next();
9147 int rslt=0;
9148 if (consolid)
9149 rslt=RawManip.meldEdge_raw(packData.packDCEL,edge);
9150 else
9151 rslt=RawManip.rmEdge_raw(packData.packDCEL,edge);
9152 if (rslt==0) {
9153 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("rm_edge failed for edge "+edge);
9154 if (count>0)
9155 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
9156 return count;
9157 }
9158
9159 // negative: reset default new red edge data using
9160 // current vData. (-rslt has just become a bdry
9161 // vertex, so it comes back with red edge having
9162 // default data)
9163 if (rslt<0) {
9164 Vertex vert=packData.packDCEL.vertices[-rslt];
9165 RedEdge redge=vert.halfedge.myRedEdge;
9166
9167 // get the original index for this vertex
9168 int origv=packData.packDCEL.oldNew.findV(-rslt);
9169 if (origv==0)
9170 origv=-rslt;
9171 redge.setCenter(new Complex(packData.packDCEL.vertices[origv].center));
9172 redge.setRadius(packData.packDCEL.vertices[origv].rad);
9173 }
9174 count++;
9175 }
9176 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
9177 return count;
9178 }
9179
9180 // fix things up
9181 packData.chooseAlpha();
9182 packData.chooseGamma();
9183 return count;
9184 }
9185
9186 // ========= reorient =======
9187 else if (cmd.startsWith("reorie")) {
9188 CombDCEL.reorient(packData.packDCEL);
9189 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
9190 return packData.packDCEL.vertCount;
9191 }
9192 break;
9193 } // end of 'r' and 'R'
9194 case 's':
9195 {
9196
9197 // ============== slider ===========
9198 if (cmd.startsWith("slide")) {
9199 if (flagSegs == null || flagSegs.size() == 0)
9200 return 0;
9201
9202 // must be initial flag: -R, -S, -A
9203 int type = -1; // 0=radii, 1=edge schwarzian, 2=angle sum
9204 items = flagSegs.remove(0);
9205 if (!StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
9206 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: 'slider' must start with -[RSA] flag");
9207 return 0;
9208 }
9209 char c = items.remove(0).charAt(1);
9210 switch (c) {
9211 case 'R': // start for radii
9212 {
9213 type = 0;
9214 break;
9215 }
9216 case 'S': // start for flower schwarzians
9217 {
9218 type = 1;
9219 if (CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData,"set_sch")<=0)
9220 throw new DataException("failed to compute schwarzians");
9221 break;
9222 }
9223 case 'A': // start for angle sum sliders
9224 {
9225 type=2;
9226 break;
9227 }
9228 default: {
9229 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: 'slider' must start with -R, -S, or -A flag");
9230 return 0;
9231 }
9232 } // end of switch
9233
9234 SliderFrame generic=packData.radiiSliders;
9235 if (type==1)
9236 generic=packData.schFlowerSliders;
9237 else if (type==2)
9238 generic=packData.angSumSliders;
9239
9240 // three situations:
9241 // * no other flags: create with specified objects (perhaps to default)
9242 // * -c, -m, or -o flags, reconstitute flagSegs and pass for creation
9243 // * nothing else in first item, but then flags such as -a or -r (add/remove)
9244 if (flagSegs.size() == 0) {
9245 return CreateSliderFrame.createSliderFrame(packData, type, items);
9246 }
9247 items = flagSegs.get(0);
9248
9249 try {
9250
9251 // not open? ONly the -c, -m, or -o flag means to create
9252 char fc=items.get(0).charAt(1);
9253 if ((generic==null || generic.packData.nodeCount!=packData.nodeCount) &&
9254 (fc=='c' || fc=='m' || fc=='o')) {
9255 StringBuilder strbld=new StringBuilder(StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs));
9256 return CreateSliderFrame.createSliderFrame(packData,type,strbld);
9257 }
9258
9259 if (generic==null && !items.get(0).equals("-x")) {
9260 throw new ParserException("expected sliderframe does not exist.");
9261 }
9262
9263 int hits=0;
9264 Iterator<Vector<String>> fls=flagSegs.iterator();
9265 while (fls.hasNext()) {
9266 items=fls.next();
9267 fc = items.remove(0).charAt(1);
9268 switch (fc) {
9269 // set change command: quoted text
9270 case 'c':
9271 {
9272 StringBuilder chgbld=new StringBuilder(StringUtil.reconItem(items));
9273 // get first quote-enclosed string
9274 int k=chgbld.indexOf("\"",0);
9275 if (k>=0 && k<chgbld.length()-1) {
9276 int n=chgbld.indexOf("\"",k+1);
9277 if (n>=0) {
9278 generic.changeCmdField.setText(chgbld.substring(k+1,n));
9279 generic.changeCheck.setSelected(true);
9280 hits++;
9281 }
9282 }
9283 break;
9284 }
9285 // set move command: quoted text
9286 case 'm':
9287 {
9288 StringBuilder mvbld=new StringBuilder(StringUtil.reconItem(items));
9289 // get first quote-enclosed string
9290 int k=mvbld.indexOf("\"",0);
9291 if (k>=0 && k<mvbld.length()-1) {
9292 int n=mvbld.indexOf("\"",k+1);
9293 if (n>=0) {
9294 generic.optCmdField.setText(mvbld.substring(k+1,n));
9295 generic.motionCheck.setSelected(true);
9296 hits++;
9297 }
9298 }
9299 break;
9300 }
9301 // set optional command: quoted text
9302 case 'o':
9303 {
9304 StringBuilder opbld=new StringBuilder(StringUtil.reconItem(items));
9305 // get first quote-enclosed string
9306 int k=opbld.indexOf("\"",0);
9307 if (k>=0 && k<opbld.length()-1) {
9308 int n=opbld.indexOf("\"",k+1);
9309 if (n>=0) {
9310 generic.optCmdField.setText(opbld.substring(k+1,n));
9311 hits++;
9312 }
9313 }
9314 break;
9315 }
9316 case 'a': // add object; for radii and ang sliders only
9317 {
9318 items.remove(0);
9319 if (type == 0 && packData.radiiSliders != null) {
9320 hits +=packData.radiiSliders.addObject(
9321 StringUtil.reconItem(items));
9322 } else if (type == 2 && packData.angSumSliders != null) {
9323 hits +=packData.angSumSliders.addObject(
9324 StringUtil.reconItem(items));
9325 }
9326
9327 break;
9328 }
9329 case 'r': // remove object; for radii and ang sliders only
9330 {
9331 items.remove(0);
9332 if (type == 0 && packData.radiiSliders != null) {
9333 hits +=packData.radiiSliders.removeObject(
9334 StringUtil.reconItem(items));
9335 } else if (type == 1 && packData.schFlowerSliders != null) {
9336 hits +=packData.angSumSliders.removeObject(
9337 StringUtil.reconItem(items));
9338 }
9339 break;
9340 }
9341 case 'd': // download from packdata to sliders
9342 {
9343 generic.downloadData();
9344 hits++;
9345 break;
9346 }
9347 case 'l': // set lower (min) value for sliders
9348 {
9349 double min=0.0;
9350 try {
9351 min=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
9352 } catch(NumberFormatException nfx) {
9353 throw new DataException(nfx.getMessage());
9354 }
9355 generic.resetMin(min);
9356 hits++;
9357 break;
9358 }
9359 case 'u': // set upper (max) value for sliders
9360 {
9361 double max=0.0;
9362 try {
9363 max=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
9364 } catch(NumberFormatException nfx) {
9365 throw new ParserException(nfx.getMessage());
9366 }
9367 generic.resetMax(max);
9368 hits++;
9369 break;
9370 }
9371 case 'x': // destroy the slider and frame
9372 {
9373 if (type==0) {
9374 if (packData.radiiSliders!=null)
9375 packData.radiiSliders.dispose();
9376 packData.radiiSliders=null;
9377 }
9378 else if (type==1) {
9379 if (packData.schFlowerSliders!=null)
9380 packData.schFlowerSliders.dispose();
9381 packData.schFlowerSliders=null;
9382 }
9383 else if (type==2) {
9384 if (packData.angSumSliders!=null)
9385 packData.angSumSliders.dispose();
9386 packData.angSumSliders=null;
9387 }
9388 return 1;
9389 }
9390 default:
9391 {
9392 throw new ParserException("usage: illegal "+
9393 "slider flag");
9394 }
9395 } // end of switch
9396 } // end of while though flag segments
9397 if (hits>0) // got some flags
9398 return hits;
9399 } catch (Exception ex) {
9400 throw new ParserException("problem in slider call");
9401 }
9402
9403 } // done with 'slider'
9404
9405 // =============== sch_report =======
9406 if (cmd.startsWith("sch_repo")) {
9407 return Schwarzian.schwarzReport(packData,flagSegs);
9408 }
9409
9410 // =============== sch_layout ========
9411 else if (cmd.startsWith("sch_lay")) {
9412 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("OBE: 'sch_layout' has "+
9413 "been replaced by 'dual_layout'.");
9414 return 0;
9415 }
9416
9417
9418 // =============== scale ==========
9419 else if (cmd.startsWith("scale") && !cmd.startsWith("scale_")) {
9420
9421// debug deBugging.LayoutBugs.log_RedList(packData,packData.redChain);
9422//deBugging.LayoutBugs.log_RedCenters(packData);
9423// DCELdebug.rededgecenters(packData.packDCEL);
9424
9425 double factor = 1.1;
9426 try {
9427 factor=StringUtil.getOneDouble(flagSegs);
9428 } catch (Exception ex) {}
9429 if (factor<=0.0)
9430 return 0;
9431 return packData.eucl_scale(factor);
9432 }
9433
9434 // ============= scale_aims =============
9435 else if (cmd.startsWith("scale_aim")) {
9436 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // just one segment
9437 String str=(String)items.remove(0);
9438 double factor=Double.parseDouble(str);
9439 if (factor<0.0) {
9440 throw new ParserException("given factor x is negative");
9441 }
9442 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
9443 return packData.scale_aims(factor,vertlist);
9444 }
9445
9446 // ============= scale_radii =============
9447 else if (cmd.startsWith("scale_rad")) {
9448 // just one segment: -q{} x {v..}
9449 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
9450 String str=(String)items.remove(0);
9451 int qnum=-1;
9452 if (!StringUtil.isFlag(str) || items.size()==0) {
9453 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: scale_radii -q{.} x {v..}");
9454 return 0;
9455 }
9456 else
9457 qnum=StringUtil.qFlagParse(str);
9458 if (qnum<0 || qnum>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS)
9459 throw new ParserException("Failed to read '-q{}' flag");
9460 str=(String)items.remove(0);
9461 double factor=Double.parseDouble(str);
9462 if (factor<0.0) {
9463 throw new ParserException("given factor x is negative");
9464 }
9465 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
9466 return packData.scale_rad(CPBase.cpDrawing[qnum].getPackData(),factor,vertlist);
9467 }
9468
9469 // =========== sq_grid_overlaps ===========
9470 else if (cmd.startsWith("sq_grid_ov")) {
9471 return packData.sq_grid_overlaps();
9472 }
9473
9474 // =========== svg ========================
9475 // TODO: this is very simple preliminary routine
9476 else if (cmd.startsWith("svg")) {
9477// boolean append_flag=false; // no append option for now
9478 boolean script_flag=false;
9479 // Get and remove trailing filename as first step
9480 StringBuilder strbld=new StringBuilder();
9481 int fra=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs, strbld);
9482 if (fra==0)
9483 throw new ParserException("No filename given in 'svg' call");
9484 String fname=strbld.toString();
9485 // now process
9486 File dir=CPFileManager.PackingDirectory;
9487 BufferedWriter fp=CPFileManager.openWriteFP(dir,false,fname,script_flag);
9488 int act;
9489 try {
9490 act=packData.writeSVG(fp,flagSegs); //
9491 } catch(Exception ex) {
9492 throw new InOutException("writeSVG failed");
9493 }
9494
9495 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Wrote SVG image to "+dir.getPath()+
9496 File.separator+fname);
9497 return act;
9498 }
9499
9500 // =============== swap =========
9501 else if (cmd.startsWith("swap")) { // swap vert indices
9502
9503 // look for any flags first
9504 int keepFlag=0;
9505 Iterator<Vector<String>> fit=flagSegs.iterator();
9506 while (fit.hasNext()) {
9507 items=fit.next();
9508 if (items.size()>0 && StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
9509 String itst=items.remove(0); // grab and remove the flag
9510 if (itst.contains("c"))
9511 keepFlag = keepFlag | 00001; // set for color
9512 if (itst.contains("m"))
9513 keepFlag = keepFlag | 00002; // set for mark
9514 if (itst.contains("a"))
9515 keepFlag = keepFlag | 00004; // set for aim
9516 }
9517 } // done looking for flags
9518
9519 // now 'items' should have just v and w
9520 try {
9521 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
9522 NodeLink nL=new NodeLink(packData,items);
9523 if (keepFlag!=0)
9524 packData.swap_nodes(nL.get(0),nL.get(1),keepFlag);
9525 else
9526 packData.swap_nodes(nL.get(0),nL.get(1));
9527 } catch(Exception ex) {
9528 throw new ParserException("usage: swap [-cma] v w");
9529 }
9530 return 1;
9531 }
9532
9533 // ============= square_fit =========
9537 else if (cmd.startsWith("square_fit")) {
9538 double maxdist=0.0,x=0.0,y=0.0;
9539
9540 if (packData.hes!=0) {
9541 throw new ParserException("packing must be euclidean");
9542 }
9543 for (int i=1;i<=packData.nodeCount;i++)
9544 if (packData.isBdry(i)) {
9545 x=Math.abs(packData.getCenter(i).x)+packData.getRadius(i);
9546 y=Math.abs(packData.getCenter(i).y)+packData.getRadius(i);
9547 maxdist = (x>maxdist) ? x : maxdist;
9548 maxdist = (y>maxdist) ? y : maxdist;
9549 }
9550 if (maxdist>0.0) packData.eucl_scale(1/maxdist);
9551 return 1;
9552 }
9553
9554 // ========= set =========
9555 else if (cmd.startsWith("set_")) {
9556 cmd=cmd.substring(4);
9557
9558 // ========= set_active ==========
9559 if (cmd.startsWith("active")) { // set's active node
9560 int v;
9561 if ((v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,flagSegs))<0) return 1;
9562 packData.activeNode=v;
9563 return v;
9564 }
9565
9566 // ========= set_rand ============
9567 if (cmd.startsWith("rand")) { // set random radii or inv distances
9568 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagSegs.iterator();
9569 boolean iDist=false;
9570 boolean jiggle=false;
9571 boolean factor_flag=false; // 'factor' or 'range' mode
9572 double low=.005;
9573 double high=5.0;
9574 double pctg=1.0;
9575 String str=null;
9576 items=null;
9577
9578 while (its.hasNext()) {
9579 items=(Vector<String>)its.next();
9580 str=(String)items.get(0);
9581 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
9582 items.remove(0);
9583 switch(str.charAt(1)) {
9584 case 'o': // overlaps
9585 {
9586 iDist=true;
9587 break;
9588 }
9589 case 'j': // jiggle
9590 {
9591 jiggle=true;
9592 factor_flag=true;
9593 try {
9594 pctg=Double.parseDouble((String)items.remove(0));
9595 if (Math.abs(pctg)>10.0) pctg=10.0;
9596 pctg = pctg/100.0;
9597 } catch (Exception ex) {
9598 low=.99;
9599 high=1.01;
9600 }
9601 break;
9602 }
9603 case 'f': // factor
9604 {
9605 factor_flag=true;
9606 break;
9607 }
9608 case 'r': // read range
9609 {
9610 try {
9611 low=Double.parseDouble((String)items.remove(0));
9612 high=Double.parseDouble((String)items.remove(0));
9613 if (low>=high) throw new ParserException();
9614 } catch (Exception ex) {
9615 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("usage: set_random: -f {low} {high}");
9616 }
9617 break;
9618 }
9619 } // end of switch
9620 } // done with flags
9621 } // done with while
9622
9623 // 'items' should now have {v..} or {e..}
9624 Random randizer=new Random();
9625 double factor=1.0;
9626 if (iDist) { // adjust inversive distance
9627 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items);
9628 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
9629 while (his.hasNext()) {
9630 HalfEdge he=his.next();
9631 double value=1.0;
9632 if (factor_flag) { // use a factor
9633 if (jiggle) {
9634 factor=Math.exp(randizer.nextGaussian()*pctg);
9635 }
9636 else
9637 factor=low+randizer.nextDouble()*(high/low);
9638 value=he.getInvDist()*factor;
9639 }
9640 else
9641 value=low+randizer.nextDouble()*(high/low);
9642 he.setInvDist(value);
9643 count++;
9644 }
9645 }
9646 else { // adjust radii
9647 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
9648 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
9649 int v;
9650 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
9651 v=(Integer)vlist.next();
9652 if (factor_flag) { // use a factor
9653 if (jiggle) {
9654 factor=Math.exp(
9655 randizer.nextGaussian()*pctg);
9656 }
9657 else
9658 factor=low+randizer.nextDouble()*(high-low);
9659 packData.setRadiusActual(v,
9660 packData.getActualRadius(v)*factor);
9661 }
9662 else packData.setRadiusActual(v,
9663 low+randizer.nextDouble()*(high-low));
9664 count++;
9665 }
9666 }
9667 if (count>0) packData.fillcurves();
9668 return count;
9669 }
9670
9671 // ========= set_schwarzians ==========
9672 if (cmd.startsWith("sch")) {
9673 HalfLink hlink=null;
9674 boolean givenx=false;
9675 double sch_value=0.0; // default
9676
9677 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0 ||
9678 flagSegs.get(0).size()==0) {
9679 hlink=new HalfLink(packData,"a");
9680 }
9681 else {
9682 items=flagSegs.remove(0);
9683 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
9684 if (items.get(0).startsWith("-s")) {
9685 items.remove(0);
9686 try {
9687 sch_value=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
9688 givenx=true;
9689 items.remove(0);
9690 } catch (Exception ex) {
9691 throw new ParserException("usage: set_schw -[su] {x} {v w ..}");
9692 }
9693 }
9694 else if (items.get(0).startsWith("-u")) {
9695 items.remove(0);
9696 try {
9697 sch_value=1.0-Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
9698 givenx=true;
9699 items.remove(0);
9700 } catch (Exception ex) {
9701 throw new ParserException("usage: set_schw -s {x} {v w ..}");
9702 }
9703 }
9704 else
9705 throw new ParserException("usage: set_schw -[su] ..");
9706 }
9707 if (items.size()==0)
9708 hlink=new HalfLink(packData,"a");
9709 else
9710 hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items);
9711 }
9712
9713 if (givenx) {
9714 if (hlink==null || hlink.size()==0)
9715 return count;
9716
9717 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
9718 while (his.hasNext()) {
9719 try {
9720 HalfEdge edge=his.next();
9721 if (edge.isBdry()) {
9722 edge.setSchwarzian(0.0);
9723 edge.twin.setSchwarzian(0.0);
9724 }
9725 else {
9726 edge.setSchwarzian(sch_value);
9727 edge.twin.setSchwarzian(sch_value);
9728 }
9729 count++;
9730 } catch (Exception ex) {
9731 throw new DataException("error in set_schwarz: "+
9732 "perhaps schwarzians not allocated?");
9733 }
9734 }
9735 return count;
9736 }
9737
9738 // else set to current
9739 return Schwarzian.comp_schwarz(packData, hlink);
9740 }
9741
9742 // ========= set_invdist ========
9743 if (cmd.startsWith("invdis")) {
9744
9745 // if no segments, error
9746 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
9747 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: 'set_invdist' has no arguments");
9748 return 0;
9749 }
9750
9751 items=flagSegs.get(0);
9752 String str=(String)items.remove(0);
9753
9754 // look for a file of xyz values; must start "-x <name>"
9755 if (str.startsWith("-x")) {
9756 StringBuilder strbld=new StringBuilder();
9757 int rwflag=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs,strbld);
9758 // error or no filename, use 'packData.xyzpoint'
9759 if (rwflag==0 || (rwflag & 01)== 01)
9760 return packData.set_xyz_overlaps(packData.xyzpoint,1);
9761 boolean in_script=false;
9762 if ((rwflag & 04)==04) // bit 3
9763 in_script=true;
9764 String dataname=strbld.toString();
9765
9766 // try to read the data into 'packData.xyzpoint'.
9767 if (CPFileManager.readDataFile(packData,dataname,in_script,1)==0) {
9768 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(
9769 "Failed to load file "+dataname);
9770 return 0;
9771 }
9772 return packData.set_xyz_overlaps(packData.xyzpoint,1);
9773 }
9774
9775 // look for a flag
9776 EdgeLink edgelist=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
9777 Iterator<EdgeSimple> eis=edgelist.iterator();
9778
9779 // to default (tangency)
9780 if (str.startsWith("-d")) {
9781
9782 // empty list, do all
9783 if (edgelist.size()==0) { // default to all
9784 packData.set_invD_default();
9785 packData.fillcurves();
9786 CirclePack.cpb.msg("set_invdist: set all inversive "+
9787 "distances to default (1.0, tangency)");
9788 return 1;
9789 }
9790
9791 while (eis.hasNext()) {
9792 HalfEdge he=packData.packDCEL.findHalfEdge(eis.next());
9793 he.setInvDist(1.0);
9794 count++;
9795 }
9796 packData.fillcurves();
9797 CirclePack.cpb.msg("set_invdist: set "+count+
9798 " inversive distances to default");
9799 return count;
9800 }
9801
9802 else if (str.startsWith("-c")) { // set to current
9803
9804 while (eis.hasNext()) {
9805 HalfEdge he=packData.packDCEL.findHalfEdge(eis.next());
9806 he.setInvDist(packData.comp_inv_dist(
9807 he.origin.vertIndx,he.twin.origin.vertIndx));
9808 count++;
9809 }
9810 packData.fillcurves();
9811 CirclePack.cpb.msg("set_invdist: set "+count+
9812 " inversive distances to their current values");
9813 return count;
9814 }
9815
9816 // truncate to given upper limit
9817 else if (str.startsWith("-t")) {
9818 double uplim=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(0));
9819 if (uplim<=1.0) {
9820 throw new DataException(
9821 "usage: truncation value x must be >=1");
9822 }
9823
9824 while(eis.hasNext()) {
9825 HalfEdge he=packData.packDCEL.findHalfEdge(eis.next());
9826 if (he.getInvDist()>uplim) {
9827 he.setInvDist(uplim);
9828 count++;
9829 }
9830 }
9831 packData.fillcurves();
9832 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Cut "+count+
9833 " inversive distances down to max of "+uplim);
9834 return count;
9835 }
9836
9837 else if (str.startsWith("-h")) { // use packData.xyzpoint,
9838 // but set based on local edge lengths
9839 return packData.set_xyz_overlaps(packData.xyzpoint,2);
9840 }
9841
9842 // no flag? 'inv dist' followed by edge list (default to all)
9843 // NOTE: this is always an inversive distance, NOT an angle/Pi.
9844 // [-1,0) deep overlap (cos(t), where t is in (Pi/2, Pi]
9845 // [0,1) overlap (cos(t), where t is in (0,Pi/2]
9846 // 1 tangency
9847 // (1, infty) separated (cosh(t), where t is hyp
9848 // distance of circles
9849
9850 double invDist=1.0;
9851 try {
9852 invDist=Double.parseDouble(str);
9853 } catch (Exception ex) {
9854 throw new ParserException(
9855 "usage: invdist <x> {v w ...}"+ex.getMessage());
9856 }
9857
9858 if (invDist<-1.0)
9859 throw new ParserException(" tried to set 'invDist' < -1.0");
9860
9861 while (eis.hasNext()) {
9862 HalfEdge he=packData.packDCEL.findHalfEdge(eis.next());
9863 if (he!=null) {
9864 he.setInvDist(invDist);
9865 count++;
9866 }
9867 }
9868 packData.fillcurves();
9869 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Set "+count+
9870 " inversive distances to "+invDist);
9871 return count;
9872 }
9873
9874 // ========= set_overlaps ========
9875 // OBE. use 'set_invdist' after adjusting 'invDist', if given
9876 if (cmd.startsWith("ove")) {
9877
9878 // if no segments, exception
9879 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0) {
9880 throw new ParserException(
9881 "usage: 'set_overlaps' has no edges specified");
9882 }
9883
9884 items=flagSegs.get(0);
9885 StringBuilder strbld=new StringBuilder("set_invdist ");
9886
9887 // if a flag, just pass to 'set_invdist'
9888 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
9889 strbld.append(StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs));
9890 }
9891
9892 // otherwise look for <x> or <*x> format
9893 else {
9894 String str=items.get(0);
9895 if (str.charAt(0)=='*') { // indicates inv_dist in (1, infty)
9896 String newstr=str.substring(1,str.length()); // remove '*'
9897 items.remove(0);
9898 Double invdist=Double.parseDouble(newstr);
9899 strbld.append(invdist.toString());
9900 strbld.append(StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs));
9901 }
9902 else {
9903 String number=items.remove(0);
9904 Double costheta=Math.cos(Double.parseDouble(number)*Math.PI);
9905 strbld.append(costheta.toString()+" ");
9906 strbld.append(StringUtil.reconstitute(flagSegs));
9907 }
9908 }
9909 return CommandStrParser.jexecute(packData,strbld.toString());
9910 }
9911
9912 // ========= set_xyz =============
9913 if (cmd.startsWith("xyz")) {
9914 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0)
9915 return packData.set_xyz_data();
9916 // TODO: may want to pass filename ???
9917 return 0;
9918 }
9919
9920 // ========= set_rad =============
9921 if (cmd.startsWith("rad")) {
9922 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0 ||
9923 (items=flagSegs.elementAt(0)).size()==0) {
9924 throw new ParserException("check usage");
9925 }
9926 NodeLink nodeLink=null;
9927
9928 // there are the flag options (more to come, I'm sure)
9929 String str=(String)items.get(0);
9930 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
9931 PackData qackData=packData;
9932 if (str.startsWith("-q")) {
9933 int qnum=StringUtil.qFlagParse(str);
9934 if (qnum<0) {
9935 throw new ParserException("-q{p} option failed");
9936 }
9937 qackData=CPBase.cpDrawing[qnum].getPackData();
9938
9939 // there must be additional flags
9940 try {
9941 items=flagSegs.get(1);
9942 str=(String)items.remove(0);
9943 if (!StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
9944 throw new ParserException("option flags missing");
9945 }
9946 char mode=str.charAt(1);
9947 nodeLink=new NodeLink(qackData,items);
9948
9949 Iterator<Integer> nlist=nodeLink.iterator();
9950 while (nlist.hasNext()) {
9951 int v=nlist.next();
9952 if (v<=packData.nodeCount) {
9953 count++;
9954 double qr=qackData.getRadius(v);
9955 switch(mode) {
9956 case 'M': // maximum
9957 {
9958 if (qr>packData.getRadius(v))
9959 packData.setRadius(v,qr);
9960 break;
9961 }
9962 case 'm': // minimum
9963 {
9964 if (qr<packData.getRadius(v))
9965 packData.setRadius(v,qr);
9966 break;
9967 }
9968 case 'a': // average
9969 {
9970 packData.setRadius(v,packData.getRadius(v)+qr);
9971 packData.setRadius(v,packData.getRadius(v)/2.0);
9972 break;
9973 }
9974 } // end of switch
9975 }
9976 } // end of while
9977 return count;
9978 } catch (Exception ex) {
9979 throw new DataException("set_rad error "+
9980 "in flag options: "+ex.getMessage());
9981 }
9982 }
9983 else {
9984 throw new ParserException("-q{p} flag missing?");
9985 }
9986 } // end of flag option parsing
9987
9988 else { // this is non-flag option: <x> <v..>
9989 if (flagSegs.size()>1 || items.size()<2) {
9990 throw new ParserException("check usage");
9991 }
9992 double rad=Double.parseDouble(items.elementAt(0));
9993 if (rad<=0.0) {
9994 if (packData.hes>=0)
9995 throw new DataException("radius can be negative "+
9996 "only in the hyperbolic setting.");
9997 else
9998 rad=9.0; // essentially infinite.
9999 }
10000 items.remove(0);
10001 nodeLink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
10002 if (nodeLink==null || nodeLink.size()==0) {
10003 throw new ParserException("no valid vertices are provided.");
10004 }
10005
10006 Iterator<Integer> vlist=nodeLink.iterator();
10007 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
10008 packData.setRadiusActual((Integer)vlist.next(),rad);
10009 count++;
10010 }
10011 return count;
10012 }
10013 }
10014
10015 // ========= set_center ==========
10016 if (cmd.startsWith("cent")) {
10017 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()==0 ||
10018 (items=flagSegs.elementAt(0)).size()==0) {
10019 throw new ParserException("check usage: [XY] -[fx] {v..}");
10020 }
10021 NodeLink vertlist=null;
10022
10023 // there are the flag and data options
10024 String str=(String)items.get(0);
10025 if (!StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
10026 Complex z=null;
10027 if (str.startsWith("Zli") || str.startsWith("zli")) {
10028 items.remove(0);
10029 PointLink plk=CPBase.Zlink;
10030 if (plk==null)
10031 plk=packData.zlist;
10032 if (plk!=null && plk.size()>0)
10033 z=plk.get(0);
10034 else
10035 throw new ParserException("zlist empty");
10036 }
10037
10038 // typical data: X Y {v..}. However, if first string
10039 // alone gives a non-real complex, assume rest are
10040 // vertices. (This isn't perfect, but ...???...)
10041 else {
10042 try {
10043 z=Complex.string2Complex(items.remove(0));
10044 // if real, take as hint that next is Y
10045 if (z.y==0.0) {
10046 Complex zz=Complex.string2Complex(items.remove(0));
10047 z.y=zz.x;
10048 }
10049 } catch (VarException vex) {
10050 throw new ParserException(vex.getMessage());
10051 }
10052 }
10053
10054 // now get the vertices
10055 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
10056 return packData.set_centers(z,vertlist);
10057 }
10058 items.remove(0); // str holds flag
10059 char c=str.charAt(1);
10060 switch(c) {
10061 case 'f': // fall through use mapping: center --> "Function Frame" value
10062 case 'm': // deprecated
10063 {
10064 if (PackControl.newftnFrame.ftnField.getText().trim().length()==0) {
10065 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("'Function' frame is not set");
10066 return 0;
10067 }
10068 if (items.size()==0) // default to 'all'
10069 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,"a");
10070 else
10071 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
10072 Iterator<Integer> vlst=vertlist.iterator();
10073 while (vlst.hasNext()) {
10074 int v=vlst.next();
10075 Complex z=packData.getCenter(v);
10076 // convert to complex to pass to function
10077 if (packData.hes>0)
10078 z=SphericalMath.s_pt_to_plane(z);
10079 Complex w=CirclePack.cpb.getFtnValue(z);
10080 if (packData.hes>0) // back to sphere
10081 w=SphericalMath.proj_pt_to_sph(w);
10082 packData.setCenter(v,w);
10083 count++;
10084 } // end of while
10085 break;
10086 }
10087 case 'x': // use xyz points, if available, depending on geometry
10088 {
10089 if (str.contains("xy") && packData.xyzpoint!=null) {
10090 vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
10091 Iterator<Integer> vlst=vertlist.iterator();
10092 while (vlst.hasNext()) {
10093 int vv=vlst.next();
10094
10095 // hyp/eucl, just use x, y coords
10096 if (packData.hes<=0) {
10097 packData.setCenter(vv,packData.xyzpoint[vv].x,
10098 packData.xyzpoint[vv].y);
10099 count++;
10100 }
10101 else { // sphere?
10102 packData.setCenter(vv,
10103 SphericalMath.proj_vec_to_sph(
10104 packData.xyzpoint[vv]));
10105 count++;
10106 }
10107 }
10108 }
10109 break;
10110 }
10111 } // end of switch
10112 return count;
10113 }
10114
10115
10116 // ========= set_aims ==========
10117 if (cmd.startsWith("aim")) {
10118 int mode=3;
10119 double inc=1.0;
10120 double aim=2*Math.PI;
10121
10122 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag=flagSegs.iterator();
10123 while (nextFlag.hasNext() && (items=nextFlag.next()).size()>0) {
10124 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
10125 char c=items.get(0).charAt(1);
10126 items.remove(0);
10127 switch(c) {
10128
10129 // Here's the specific parsing of flag itself
10130 case 'd': // mode = set to default angle sums
10131 {
10132 mode=1;
10133 break;
10134 }
10135 case 'c': // mode = set to current angle sums
10136 {
10137 mode=2;
10138 break;
10139 }
10140 case '%': // mode = modify current aims by multiplicative factor
10141 {
10142 // TODO: what to do with inversive distances >= 1?
10143 mode=3;
10144 try {
10145 inc=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
10146 if (inc<=0.0) {
10147 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg(
10148 "set_aim: usage: -% x. Must have x>0.");
10149 }
10150 items.remove(0);
10151 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
10152 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("set_aim: usage: -% x "+
10153 "where x>0 is multiplicative factor.");
10154 return count;
10155 }
10156 break;
10157 }
10158 case 'x': // use 3D 'xyz' data, if available
10159 {
10160 mode=4;
10161 if (packData.xyzpoint==null)
10162 return 0;
10163 break;
10164 }
10165 case 't': // give factor for moving interiors toward 2pi
10166 {
10167 mode=5;
10168 try {
10169 inc=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
10170 if (inc<=0.0 || inc>1.0) {
10171 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("set_aim: usage: "+
10172 "-t x, x in (0,1].");
10173 }
10174 items.remove(0);
10175 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
10176 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("set_aim: usage: "+
10177 "-t x where x>0 is factor.");
10178 return count;
10179 }
10180 break;
10181 }
10182 case 'a': // add given amount to aim, may be +,-
10183 {
10184 mode=6;
10185 try {
10186 inc=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
10187 items.remove(0);
10188 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
10189 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("set_aim: usage: "+
10190 "-t x where x>0 is factor.");
10191 return count;
10192 }
10193 break;
10194 }
10195 } // end of flag switch
10196 }
10197 else { // no flag; default action is to read a double aim first.
10198 mode=0; // normal "set this value for these vertices"
10199 try {
10200 aim=Double.parseDouble(items.remove(0));
10201 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
10202 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("set_aim: usage: x {v..} "+
10203 "where x>0 is intended aim.");
10204 return count;
10205 }
10206 }
10207
10208 if (items.size()==0) { // no list
10209 if (mode==0 || mode==3 || mode==6) return 0;
10210 if (mode==1) { // default
10211 packData.set_aim_default();
10212 return (packData.nodeCount);
10213 }
10214 if (mode==2) { // current
10215 return packData.set_aim_current(false);
10216 }
10217 if (mode==4) { // based on 'xyzpoint'
10218 return packData.set_aim_xyz(true);
10219 }
10220 if (mode==5) { // move by factor towards flat
10221 packData.set_aim_x_flatten(inc);
10222 }
10223 return 0;
10224 }
10225
10226 // Now read the vertex list
10227 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
10228 if (vertlist.size()>0) {
10229 Iterator<Integer> vl=vertlist.iterator();
10230
10231 while (vl.hasNext()) {
10232 int v=(Integer)vl.next();
10233 if (mode==1) {
10234 packData.set_aim_default(vertlist);
10235 count++;
10236 }
10237 else if (mode==2) {
10238 packData.setAim(v,packData.getCurv(v));
10239 count++;
10240 }
10241 else if (mode==3) { // TODO: is this the right adjustment?
10242 packData.setAim(v,packData.getAim(v)+inc*Math.PI);
10243 count++;
10244 }
10245 else if (mode==0) {
10246 if (aim!=0.0 || ((packData.hes < 0) && packData.isBdry(v))) {
10247 packData.setAim(v,aim*Math.PI);
10248 count++;
10249 }
10250 else count--;
10251 }
10252 else if (mode==4) { // based on 'xyzpoint' data
10253 double angsum=0.0;
10254 for (int j=0;j<packData.countFaces(v);j++) {
10255 int n=packData.getPetal(v,j);
10256 int m=packData.getPetal(v,j+1);
10257 angsum += Math.acos(EuclMath.e_cos_3D(
10258 packData.xyzpoint[v],packData.xyzpoint[n],
10259 packData.xyzpoint[m]));
10260 }
10261 packData.setAim(v,angsum);
10262 count++;
10263 }
10264 else if (mode==5 && !packData.isBdry(v)) { // towards flat by increment
10265 double curv=2.0*Math.PI-packData.getAim(v);
10266 packData.setAim(v, packData.getAim(v)+inc*curv);
10267 count++;
10268 }
10269 else if (mode==6) { // additive amount x in [-0.1,0.1].
10270 packData.setAim(v, packData.getAim(v)+inc);
10271 count++;
10272 }
10273 }
10274 return count;
10275 }
10276 return 0;
10277 } // end of set_aim while
10278 } // done with 'set_aim'
10279
10280 // =============== set_plot_flags =======
10281 if (cmd.startsWith("plot_f")) {
10282 int pf=1;
10283 if (flagSegs==null || flagSegs.size()>1 || (items=flagSegs.elementAt(0)).size()<2) {
10284 throw new ParserException("check usage");
10285 }
10286 pf=Integer.parseInt(items.get(0));
10287
10288 NodeLink nodeLink=new NodeLink(packData,(String)items.get(1));
10289 Iterator<Integer> vlist=nodeLink.iterator();
10290 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
10291 packData.setPlotFlag((Integer)vlist.next(),pf);
10292 count++;
10293 }
10294 }
10295
10296 // ========== set_?list =========
10297 if (cmd.substring(1).startsWith("list")) {
10298 char c=cmd.charAt(0);
10299 try { // just one flag sequence
10300 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.elementAt(0);
10301 if (items.size()==0) items=(Vector<String>)null;
10302 } catch(Exception ex){
10303 items=(Vector<String>)null;
10304 }
10305 switch(c) {
10306 case 'v':
10307 {
10308 if (items==null) {
10309 packData.vlist=null;
10310 count=1;
10311 }
10312 else {
10313 packData.vlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
10314 count=packData.vlist.size();
10315 }
10316 break;
10317 }
10318 case 'V':
10319 {
10320 if (items==null) {
10321 CPBase.Vlink=null;
10322 count=1;
10323 }
10324 else {
10325 CPBase.Vlink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
10326 count=CPBase.Vlink.size();
10327 }
10328 break;
10329 }
10330 case 'e':
10331 {
10332 if (items==null) {
10333 packData.elist=null;
10334 count=1;
10335 }
10336 else {
10337 packData.elist=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
10338 count=packData.elist.size();
10339 }
10340 break;
10341 }
10342 case 'E':
10343 {
10344 if (items==null) {
10345 CPBase.Elink=null;
10346 count=1;
10347 }
10348 else {
10349 CPBase.Elink=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
10350 count=CPBase.Elink.size();
10351 }
10352 break;
10353 }
10354 case 'h':
10355 {
10356 if (items==null) {
10357 packData.hlist=null;
10358 count=1;
10359 }
10360 else {
10361 packData.hlist=new HalfLink(packData,items);
10362 count=packData.hlist.size();
10363 }
10364 break;
10365 }
10366 case 'H':
10367 {
10368 if (items==null) {
10369 CPBase.Hlink=null;
10370 count=1;
10371 }
10372 else {
10373 CPBase.Hlink=new HalfLink(packData,items);
10374 count=CPBase.Hlink.size();
10375 }
10376 break;
10377 }
10378 case 'f':
10379 {
10380 if (items==null) {
10381 packData.flist=null;
10382 count=1;
10383 }
10384 else {
10385 packData.flist=new FaceLink(packData,items);
10386 count=packData.flist.size();
10387 }
10388 break;
10389 }
10390 case 'F':
10391 {
10392 if (items==null) {
10393 CPBase.Flink=null;
10394 count=1;
10395 }
10396 else {
10397 CPBase.Flink=new FaceLink(packData,items);
10398 count=CPBase.Flink.size();
10399 }
10400 break;
10401 }
10402 // 'set_tlist' can also be called through 'ConformalTiling'.
10403 case 't': // 'tileData' tiles only;
10404 {
10405 if (items==null) {
10406 packData.tlist=null;
10407 count=1;
10408 }
10409 else {
10410 packData.tlist=new TileLink(packData.tileData,items);
10411 count=packData.tlist.size();
10412 }
10413 break;
10414 }
10415 case 'T': // 'tileData' tiles only
10416 {
10417 if (items==null) {
10418 CPBase.Tlink=null;
10419 count=1;
10420 }
10421 else {
10422 CPBase.Tlink=new TileLink(packData.tileData,items);
10423 count=CPBase.Tlink.size();
10424 }
10425 break;
10426 }
10427 case 'g':
10428 {
10429 if (items==null) {
10430 packData.glist=null;
10431 count=1;
10432 }
10433 else {
10434 packData.glist=new GraphLink(packData,items);
10435 count=packData.glist.size();
10436 }
10437 break;
10438 }
10439 case 'G':
10440 {
10441 if (items==null) {
10442 CPBase.Glink=null;
10443 count=1;
10444 }
10445 else {
10446 CPBase.Glink=new GraphLink(packData,items);
10447 count=CPBase.Glink.size();
10448 }
10449 break;
10450 }
10451 case 'z':
10452 {
10453 if (items==null) {
10454 packData.zlist=null;
10455 count=1;
10456 }
10457 else {
10458 packData.zlist=new PointLink(items);
10459 count=packData.zlist.size();
10460 }
10461 break;
10462 }
10463 case 'D':
10464 {
10465 if (items==null) {
10466 CPBase.Dlink=null;
10467 count=1;
10468 }
10469 else {
10470 CPBase.Dlink=new DoubleLink(packData,items);
10471 count=CPBase.Dlink.size();
10472 }
10473 break;
10474 }
10475 case 'Z':
10476 {
10477 if (items==null) {
10478 CPBase.Zlink=null;
10479 count=1;
10480 }
10481 else {
10482 CPBase.Zlink=new PointLink(items);
10483 count=CPBase.Zlink.size();
10484 }
10485 break;
10486 }
10487 case 'b':
10488 {
10489 if (items==null) {
10490 packData.blist=null;
10491 count=1;
10492 }
10493 else {
10494 packData.blist=new BaryLink(packData,items);
10495 count=packData.blist.size();
10496 }
10497 break;
10498 }
10499 case 'B':
10500 {
10501 if (items==null) {
10502 CPBase.Blink=null;
10503 count=1;
10504 }
10505 else {
10506 CPBase.Blink=new BaryLink(packData,items);
10507 count=CPBase.Blink.size();
10508 }
10509 break;
10510 }
10511 } // end of switch
10512
10513 return count;
10514 }
10515
10516 // =============== set_screen =====
10517 // this is full set of options;
10518 // processing in parent for those not needing packing
10519 if (cmd.startsWith("screen")) {
10520 ViewBox vbox=packData.cpDrawing.realBox;
10521 Complex utilz=new Complex(0.0);
10522 char c;
10523
10524 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag=flagSegs.iterator();
10525
10526 while (nextFlag.hasNext() &&
10527 (items=nextFlag.next()).size()>0) {
10528 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
10529 c=items.get(0).charAt(1);
10530 switch(c) {
10531
10532 case 'a': // adjust up to see all circles (eucl only)
10533 {
10534 double dist;
10535 if (packData.hes!=0) // not error, but no effect
10536 return 1;
10537
10538 double hwid=vbox.getWidth()/2.0;
10539 double hhgt=vbox.getHeight()/2.0;
10540
10541 // get start at vert 1
10542 Complex z=packData.getCenter(1);
10543 double rad=packData.getRadius(1);
10544 double maxw = Math.abs(z.x)+rad;
10545 double maxh = Math.abs(z.y)+rad;
10546 for (int i=2;i<=packData.nodeCount;i++) {
10547 z=packData.getCenter(i);
10548 rad=packData.getRadius(i);
10549 dist=Math.abs(z.x)+rad;
10550 if (dist>maxw) maxw=dist;
10551 dist=Math.abs(z.y)+rad;
10552 if (dist>maxh) maxh=dist;
10553 }
10554 if (maxw>hwid || maxh>hhgt) { // need to scale vbox up
10555 double factor=(maxw/hwid>maxh/hhgt) ? maxw/hwid : maxh/hhgt;
10556 vbox.scaleView(1.1*factor); // scale with a margin
10557 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
10558 }
10559 count++;
10560 break;
10561 }
10562 case 'b': // set real box (lx,ly), (rx,ry)
10563 // TODO: need tailored versions for speed,
10564 // change 'CPDrawing.update' too
10565 {
10566 double []corners=new double[4];
10567 try {
10568 for (int i=0;i<4;i++)
10569 corners[i]=Double.parseDouble(items.get(i+1));
10570 packData.cpDrawing.realBox.setView(new Complex(corners[0],corners[1]),
10571 new Complex(corners[2],corners[3]));
10572 } catch (Exception ex) {
10573 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("'"+cmd+"' parsing error.");
10574 return count;
10575 }
10576 count++;
10577 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
10578 break;
10579 }
10580 case 'd': // default canvas size, sphView
10581 {
10582 vbox.reset();
10583 count++;
10584 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
10585 packData.cpDrawing.sphView.defaultView();
10586 break;
10587 }
10588 case 'f': // scale by given factor
10589 {
10590 try {
10591 count += packData.cpDrawing.realBox.
10592 scaleView(Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)));
10593 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
10594 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
10595 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("usage: set_screen "+
10596 "-f <x>: "+nfe.getMessage());
10597 }
10598 break;
10599 }
10600 case 'i': // incremental moves (typically from mouse click)
10601 {
10602 try {
10603 utilz=new Complex(Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)),
10604 Double.parseDouble(items.get(2)));
10605 count +=vbox.transView(utilz);
10606 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
10607 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("usage: set_screen "+
10608 "-i <x> <y>: "+nfe.getMessage());
10609 }
10610 break;
10611
10612 }
10613 case 'h': // height (or fall through for width)
10614 {}
10615 case 'w': // width
10616 {
10617 try {
10618 double f=Double.parseDouble(items.get(1));
10619 count += packData.cpDrawing.realBox.scaleView(f/vbox.getWidth());
10620 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
10621 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
10622 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("usage: set_screen "+
10623 "-w(or h) <x>: "+nfe.getMessage());
10624 }
10625 break;
10626 }
10627 case 'c': // center at the origin. Fall through first to 'z',
10628 // then further, to 'v'.
10629 {
10630 utilz=new Complex(0.0); // default, if problems below
10631 }
10632 case 'z': // Fall through to 'v'
10633 {
10634 if (c=='z') {
10635 try {
10636 utilz=new Complex(Double.parseDouble(items.get(1)),
10637 Double.parseDouble(items.get(2)));
10638 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
10639 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("usage: set_screen -[zc]"+
10640 " <x> <y>: "+nfe.getMessage());
10641 }
10642 }
10643 }
10644 case 'v': // center on center of v
10645 {
10646 if (c=='v') { // did not fall through
10647 try {
10648 int v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,(String)items.get(1));
10649 utilz=packData.getCenter(v);
10650 if (packData.hes<0) {
10651 CircleSimple sc=HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(utilz,packData.getRadius(v));
10652 utilz=sc.center;
10653 }
10654 else if (packData.hes>0) {
10655 utilz=packData.cpDrawing.sphView.toApparentSph(utilz);
10656 // TODO: do we need to check if on back?
10657 }
10658 } catch (NumberFormatException nfe) {
10659 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("usage: set_screen -v <n>: "+
10660 nfe.getMessage());
10661 }
10662 }
10663
10664 // now should have 'utilz' one way or another
10665 count +=vbox.focusView(utilz);
10666 break;
10667 }
10668
10669 } // end of flag switch
10670 } // done handling a given flag
10671 else { // no flags? default to default screen
10672 vbox.reset();
10673 count++;
10674 packData.cpDrawing.update(2);
10675 }
10676 } // end of while
10677
10678 if (count>0) {
10679 packData.cpDrawing.repaint();
10680 }
10681 return count;
10682 } // done with 'set_screen'
10683 } // done with all "set_" command parsing
10684
10685 // ========= spiral =======
10686 if (cmd.startsWith("spiral")) {
10687 boolean inc_flag=false;
10688 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
10689 String str=(String)items.get(0);
10690 if (str.startsWith("-f")) {
10691 inc_flag=true;
10692 items.remove(0);
10693 }
10694 double a=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(0));
10695 double b=Double.parseDouble((String)items.get(1));
10696
10697 if (inc_flag) {
10698 int al=packData.getAlpha();
10699 double rad=packData.getRadius(al);
10700// if (rad<=packData.OKERR) { // this shouldn't happen
10701// throw new DataException();
10702// }
10703
10704 int[] flower=packData.getFlower(al);
10705 int j=flower[0];
10706 a=a*packData.getRadius(j)/rad;
10707 j=flower[1];
10708 b=b*packData.getRadius(j)/rad;
10709 }
10710 return Exponential.spiral(packData,a,b);
10711 }
10712
10713 // ========= slit ========
10714 if (cmd.startsWith("slit")) {
10715 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0));
10716 if (vertlist==null || vertlist.size()==0)
10717 return 0;
10718
10719 HalfLink hlink=HalfLink.getChain(packData.packDCEL, vertlist);
10720 if (hlink!=null) {
10721 int[] rslt=CombDCEL.slitComplex(packData.packDCEL, hlink);
10722 if (rslt==null)
10723 throw new CombException("something wrong in 'slit' attempt");
10724 packData.attachDCEL(packData.packDCEL);
10725 CirclePack.cpb.msg("'slit' gave new bdry edges from "+
10726 rslt[0]+" to "+rslt[1]);
10727 }
10728 return 1;
10729 }
10730 break;
10731 } // end of 's'
10732 case 'u':
10733 {
10734 // ========= unflip ========
10735 if (cmd.startsWith("unflip")) {
10736 items=flagSegs.elementAt(0); // should be only one segment
10737 EdgeLink edgeLink=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
10738 if (edgeLink==null || edgeLink.size()<1)
10739 return 0;
10740 Iterator<EdgeSimple> elist=edgeLink.iterator();
10741
10742 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(packData);
10743 while (elist.hasNext()) {
10744 EdgeSimple edge=elist.next();
10745 HalfEdge he=RawManip.getCommonEdge(packData.packDCEL,edge.v,edge.w);
10746 hlink.add(he); // might be null
10747 }
10748 if (hlink==null || hlink.size()==0)
10749 return 0;
10750 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
10751 while (his.hasNext()) {
10752 HalfEdge he=his.next();
10753 HalfEdge newhe=RawManip.flipEdge_raw(packData.packDCEL,he);
10754 if (newhe!=null)
10755 count++;
10756 }
10757 if (count>0)
10758 packData.packDCEL.fixDCEL(packData);
10759 packData.fillcurves();
10760 return count;
10761 }
10762 break;
10763 } // end of 'u'
10764 case 'v':
10765 {
10766 // ========= vert_map_off =========
10767 if (cmd.startsWith("vert_map_off")) {
10768 packData.vertexMap=null;
10769 return 1;
10770 }
10771 break;
10772 } // end of 'v'
10773
10774 case 'w': // fall through from 'w' to 'W'
10775 case 'W':
10776 { // =============== write ==============
10808 if ((cmd.startsWith("write") || cmd.startsWith("Write")) &&
10809 !cmd.contains("L") && !cmd.contains("_")) {
10810 int len;
10811 String fname=null;
10812 int act=0000; // bit-encoded write flags
10813 String flagstr=null;
10814 boolean append_flag=false;
10815 boolean script_flag=false;
10816 File dir=CPFileManager.PackingDirectory;
10817
10818 try {
10819 // should be just one flag string for display codes and
10820 // possibly one for trailing filename
10821 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
10822 flagstr=items.firstElement();
10823 if (!StringUtil.isFlag(flagstr)) {
10824 act=020017;
10825 flagstr=null; // can only be the filename
10826 }
10827
10828 // get filename
10829 StringBuilder strbld=new StringBuilder();
10830 int code=CPFileManager.trailingFile(flagSegs, strbld);
10831 if ((code & 02)==02)
10832 append_flag=true;
10833 if ((code & 04)==04)
10834 script_flag=true;
10835 File tmpdir=new File(strbld.toString().trim());
10836 fname=tmpdir.getName().trim();
10837 if (fname.length()==0)
10838 fname=packData.fileName;
10839 if (tmpdir.getParentFile()!=null) {
10840 if (cmd.startsWith("W")) // use given directory
10841 dir=tmpdir.getParentFile();
10842 else // append to current 'dir'
10843 dir=new File(dir.getName()+tmpdir.getParent());
10844 }
10845 // Note: if "Write" but no directory given, default to current 'dir'
10846
10847 } catch (Exception ex) {
10848 throw new InOutException("check usage: "+ex.getMessage());
10849 }
10850
10851 if (flagstr!=null && flagstr.length()>0 && StringUtil.isFlag(flagstr)) {
10852 flagstr=flagstr.substring(1);
10853 len=flagstr.length();
10854
10855 // just "s"? equivalent to "cgirzs"
10856 if (len==1 && flagstr.equalsIgnoreCase("s")) {
10857 if (cmd.charAt(0)=='W') {
10858 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("Can't 'Write' (cap 'W') to script");
10859 return 0;
10860 }
10861 script_flag=true;
10862 act=00037;
10863 }
10864 // "A" (append) must be accompanied by other options
10865 else if (len==1 && flagstr.equals("A")) {
10866 return 0;
10867 }
10868
10869 // build 'act' encoding
10870 else if (flagstr!=null) {
10871 for(int j=0;j<len;j++) {
10872 switch(flagstr.charAt(j)) {
10873 case 'A': {append_flag=true;break;}
10874 case 'c': {act |= 00001;break;}
10875 case 'd': {act |= 040000;break;}
10876 case 'g': {act |= 00002;break;}
10877 case 'i': {act |= 00004;break;}
10878 case 'r': {act |= 00010;break;}
10879 case 'z': {act |= 00020;break;}
10880 case 'a': {act |= 00040;break;}
10881 case 'v': {act |= 00100;break;}
10882 case 'l': {act |= 00200;break;}
10883 case 'L': {act |= 0100000;break;}
10884 case 'o': {act |= 00400;break;}
10885 case 'f': {act |= 01000;break;}
10886 case 't': {act |= 010000;break;} // triangles
10887 case 'T': {act |= 020000;break;} // tiles (if 'TileData' exists)
10888 case 'F': {act |= 0200000;break;} // dual faces as a tiling
10889 case 'h': {act |= 020000000;break;} // intrinsic schwarzians
10890 case 's': { // write to the script file
10891 if (cmd.charAt(0)=='W') {
10892 CirclePack.cpb.myErrorMsg("Can't 'Write' (cap 'W') to script");
10893 return 0;
10894 }
10895 script_flag=true;
10896 break;
10897 }
10898 case 'e': { // side pairing Mobius maps
10899 if (packData.getSidePairs()!=null) act |= 04000;
10900 break;
10901 }
10902 case 'm': {act |= 020017;break;}
10903 case 'M': {act |= 031777;break;}
10904 case 'x': { // xyz points
10905 if (packData.xyzpoint!=null)
10906 act |= 02000;
10907 else {
10908 throw new ParserException("'-x' in write call "+
10909 "requires xyz date: see 'set_xyz'");
10910 }
10911 }
10912 case 'n': {act |= 01000000;break;} // util list of integers
10913 case 'y': {act |= 02000000;break;} // util list of doubles
10914 case 'w': {act |= 04000000;break;} // util list of complexes
10915
10916 case 'S': {act |= 020000000;break;} // schwarzians (if exist)
10917
10918 } // end of flag parsing switch
10919 } // end of for
10920 } // end of flag parsing
10921 }
10922
10923 BufferedWriter fp=CPFileManager.openWriteFP(dir,append_flag,fname,script_flag);
10924 try { // (00017 & 00004)==00004;
10925 ReadWrite.writePack(fp,packData,act,false);
10926 } catch(Exception ex) {
10927 throw new InOutException("write failed");
10928 }
10929 if (script_flag) { // include in script
10930 CPBase.scriptManager.includeNewFile(fname);
10931 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Wrote packing "+fname+" to the script");
10932 return act;
10933 }
10934 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Wrote packing to "+dir.getPath()+
10935 File.separator+fname);
10936 return act;
10937 }
10938 break;
10939 } // end of 'w' and 'W'
10940
10941 case 'z':
10942 {
10943 // ============ zip ==============
10944 if (cmd.startsWith("zip")) {
10953 int n;
10954 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
10955 if (items.size()<2)
10956 throw new ParserException("usage: zip n v");
10957
10958 // get n
10959 try {
10960 n=Integer.parseInt((String)items.remove(0));
10961 } catch(Exception ex) {n=-1;} // default: do whole bdry comp
10962
10963 // vertex index (one only) comes first
10964 int v=NodeLink.grab_one_vert(packData,items.remove(0));
10965 if (!packData.isBdry(v)) {
10966 throw new ParserException("'zip' usage: n v, 'v' must be boundary");
10967 }
10968
10969 int b=packData.bdry_comp_count(v);
10970 int m=b/2;
10971 if (b!=2*m)
