10972 m=(b-1)/2;
10973 if (n<0 || n>=m)
10974 n=m; // full bdry
10975
10976 PackDCEL pdcel=packData.packDCEL;
10977 for (int j=1;j<=pdcel.vertCount;j++)
10978 pdcel.vertices[j].vutil=j;
10979 HalfEdge nxtedge=
10980 pdcel.vertices[v].halfedge.twin.next;
10981 for (int j=1;j<=n;j++) {
10982 Vertex vert=nxtedge.origin;
10983 nxtedge=nxtedge.next;
10984 CombDCEL.zipEdge(pdcel,vert);
10985 }
10986 pdcel=CombDCEL.wrapAdjoin(pdcel,pdcel);
10987 VertexMap oldnew=pdcel.oldNew;
10988 pdcel.fixDCEL(packData);
10989 packData.vertexMap=oldnew;
10990 packData.vlist=NodeLink.translate(packData.vlist,oldnew);
10991 packData.elist=EdgeLink.translate(packData.elist,oldnew);
10992 return packData.nodeCount;
10993 }
10994 break;
10995 } // end of 'z'
10996 default:
10997 {
10998 return -1; // didn't find the command here
10999 } // end of switch
11000 } // end of main switch
11001
11002 return -1; // indicates that command was not processed
11003 } // end of 'packExecute'
11004
11035public static CallPacket valueExecute(PackData packData,String cmdstr) {
11036 // normally just a single command (and its flags); we toss any others
11037 cmdstr = cmdstr.split(";")[0].trim(); // discard all but first command string
11038
11039 // Note: 'string2vec' catches variables, reconstitutes parens/brackets
11040 Vector<String> allitems=StringUtil.string2vec(cmdstr,true);
11041 String cmd=(String)allitems.remove(0);
11042
11043 // need to check for -p flag, should now be first string
11044 PackData p=packData;
11045 if (allitems.size()>0 && allitems.get(0).startsWith("-p")) {
11046 StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder(allitems.remove(0));
11047 int pnum=StringUtil.extractPackNum(sb);
11048 if (pnum>=0)
11049 p=CPBase.cpDrawing[pnum].getPackData();
11050 }
11051
11052 /* NOTE: Vector 'flagSegs' will hold only the flag strings
11053 * occurring after the command --- the command itself is 'cmd' */
11054 Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs=StringUtil.flagSeg(allitems);
11055 return valueExecute(p,cmd,flagSegs);
11056}
11057
11067public static CallPacket valueExecute(PackData packData,
11068 String cmd,Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs) {
11069 CallPacket rtnCp=null;
11070
11071 Vector<String> items=null;
11072 if (flagSegs.size()>0)
11073 items=flagSegs.get(0);
11074
11075 // ============ first: commands needing packing ================
11076 if (packData!=null && packData.status) {
11077
11078 // note: if successfull, create and return 'rtnCp'
11079 switch(cmd.charAt(0)) {
11080 case 'a':
11081 {
11082 // ========= aspect ====== (formerly 'rect_ratio')
11083 if (cmd.startsWith("aspect")) {
11084 if (packData.hes!=0)
11085 throw new ParserException("only euclidean packings (for now)");
11086// items=flagSegs.elementAt(0); // should be only one segment
11087 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
11088 if (vertlist.size()<4) {
11089 throw new DataException("requires 4 (counterclockwise) boundary vertices.");
11090 }
11091 int []cnrs=new int[4];
11092
11093 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
11094 int i=0;
11095 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
11096 int v=(Integer)vlist.next();
11097 cnrs[i]=v;
11098 i++;
11099 }
11100 for (i=0;i<4;i++)
11101 if (!packData.isBdry(cnrs[i])) {
11102 throw new DataException("corners must be boundary vertices.");
11103 }
11104 double aspect=packData.rect_ratio(cnrs[0],cnrs[1],cnrs[2],cnrs[3]);
11105 rtnCp=new CallPacket("aspect");
11106 rtnCp.double_vec=new Vector<Double>();
11107 rtnCp.double_vec.add(aspect);
11108 rtnCp.int_vec=new Vector<Integer>();
11109 for (int j=0;j<4;j++)
11110 rtnCp.int_vec.add(Integer.valueOf(cnrs[j]));
11111 return rtnCp;
11112 }
11113 break;
11114 }
11115 case 'c':
11116 {
11117
11118 // ============ count ==========
11119 if (cmd.startsWith("count")) {
11120 int count=0;
11121 items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0); // should be at most one flag
11122 String str=(String)items.get(0);
11123 if (!StringUtil.isFlag(str)) { // by default, must want circles
11124 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
11125 count=NodeLink.countMe(vertlist);
11126 if (count==0) {
11127 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count -v: no vertices specified");
11128 return null;
11129 }
11130 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count of vertices: "+count);
11131 rtnCp=new CallPacket("count");
11132 rtnCp.int_vec=new Vector<Integer>();
11133 rtnCp.int_vec.add(count);
11134 return rtnCp;
11135 }
11136 else {
11137 items.remove(0);
11138 char c=str.charAt(1);
11139 switch(c) {
11140 case 'f':
11141 {
11142 FaceLink facelist=new FaceLink(packData,items);
11143 count=FaceLink.countMe(facelist);
11144 if (count==0) {
11145 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count -f: no faces specified");
11146 return null;
11147 }
11148 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count of faces: "+count);
11149 rtnCp=new CallPacket("count");
11150 rtnCp.int_vec=new Vector<Integer>();
11151 rtnCp.int_vec.add(count);
11152 return rtnCp;
11153 }
11154 case 'e': // edges (no check for redundancies)
11155 {
11156 EdgeLink edgelist=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
11157 if (edgelist==null || (count=edgelist.size())==0) {
11158 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count -e: no edges specified");
11159 return null;
11160 }
11161 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count of edges: "+count+
11162 "(with possible redundancies, orientations) ");
11163 rtnCp=new CallPacket("count");
11164 rtnCp.int_vec=new Vector<Integer>();
11165 rtnCp.int_vec.add(count);
11166 return rtnCp;
11167 }
11168 case 't': // tiles (if they exist)
11169 {
11170 if (packData.tileData==null)
11171 return null;
11172 TileLink tilelist=new TileLink(packData.tileData,items);
11173 if (tilelist==null || (count=tilelist.size())==0) {
11174 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count -t: no tiles specified");
11175 return null;
11176 }
11177 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count of tiles: "+count+
11178 "(with possible redundancies, orientations) ");
11179 rtnCp=new CallPacket("count");
11180 rtnCp.int_vec=new Vector<Integer>();
11181 rtnCp.int_vec.add(count);
11182 return rtnCp;
11183
11184 }
11185
11186 default: // default to vertices
11187 {
11188 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(packData,items);
11189 count=NodeLink.countMe(vertlist);
11190 if (count==0) {
11191 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count -v: no vertices specified");
11192 return null;
11193 }
11194 CirclePack.cpb.msg("count of vertices: "+count);
11195 rtnCp=new CallPacket("count");
11196 rtnCp.int_vec=new Vector<Integer>();
11197 rtnCp.int_vec.add(count);
11198 return rtnCp;
11199 }
11200 } // end of switch
11201 }
11202 }
11203 break;
11204 }
11205 case 'g':
11206 {
11207 // ========= gen_mark =====
11208 if (cmd.startsWith("gen_mark")) {
11209 boolean face_flag = false;
11210 NodeLink seedlist = null;
11211 int mx = 0;
11212 int last_vert=0;
11213 rtnCp=null;
11214
11215 Iterator<Vector<String>> nextFlag = flagSegs.iterator();
11216 while (nextFlag.hasNext()
11217 && (items = nextFlag.next()).size() > 0) {
11218 if (StringUtil.isFlag(items.elementAt(0))) {
11219 char c = items.get(0).charAt(1);
11220 items.remove(0);
11221 switch (c) {
11222 // Here's the specific parsing of flag itself;
11223 // default to 'c'
11224 case 'f': // mark faces
11225 {
11226 face_flag = true;
11227 break;
11228 }
11229 case 'm': // max
11230 {
11231 mx = Integer.parseInt((String)items.elementAt(0));
11232 if (mx < 1)
11233 mx = 0;
11234 items.remove(0);
11235 }
11236 } // end of flag switch
11237
11238 if (items.size() > 0) // seeds follow
11239 seedlist = new NodeLink(packData, items);
11240 } // done handling a given flagged segment
11241 else
11242 seedlist = new NodeLink(packData, items);
11243 } // end of while
11244
11245 // default to seed = 'alpha'
11246 if (seedlist == null) {
11247 seedlist = new NodeLink(packData);
11248 seedlist.add(packData.getAlpha());
11249 }
11250
11251 if ((last_vert = packData.gen_mark(seedlist, mx, true)) <= 0
11252 || last_vert > packData.nodeCount) {
11253 throw new ParserException("usage: [fm] {v..}");
11254 }
11255 mx = packData.getVertMark(last_vert);
11256 if (face_flag) {
11257 int Gmax = 0, g0, g1, g2, gmax, gmin, last_face = 0;
11258 for (int f = 1; f <= packData.faceCount; f++)
11259 packData.setFaceMark(f,0);
11260 for (int f = 1; f <= packData.faceCount; f++) {
11261 gmax = gmin = 0;
11262 int[] verts=packData.packDCEL.faces[f].getVerts();
11263 if ((g0 = packData.getVertMark(verts[0])) != 0
11264 && (g1 = packData.getVertMark(verts[1])) != 0
11265 && (g2 = packData.getVertMark(verts[2])) != 0) {
11266 gmax = g0;
11267 gmax = (g1 > gmax) ? g1 : gmax;
11268 gmax = (g2 > gmax) ? g2 : gmax;
11269 gmin = g0;
11270 gmin = (g1 < gmin) ? g1 : gmin;
11271 gmin = (g2 < gmin) ? g2 : gmin;
11272 }
11273 if (gmax > gmin)
11274 packData.setFaceMark(f,gmax - 1);
11275 else if (gmax != 0)
11276 packData.setFaceMark(f,gmin); // gmax=gmin
11277 if (packData.getFaceMark(f) > Gmax) {
11278 Gmax = packData.getFaceMark(f);
11279 last_face = f;
11280 }
11281 }
11282 if (last_face > 0) {
11283 CirclePack.cpb.msg("gen_mark: last face marked = "
11284 + last_face + ", generation is " + Gmax);
11285 rtnCp = new CallPacket("last_face");
11286 rtnCp.int_vec = new Vector<Integer>();
11287 rtnCp.int_vec.add(last_face);
11288 }
11289 return rtnCp;
11290 }
11291 if (last_vert > 0) {
11292 CirclePack.cpb.msg("gen_mark: last vertex marked = "
11293 + last_vert + ", generation is " + mx);
11294 rtnCp = new CallPacket("last_vert");
11295 rtnCp.int_vec = new Vector<Integer>();
11296 rtnCp.int_vec.add(last_vert);
11297 }
11298 return rtnCp;
11299 }
11300 break;
11301 }
11302 case 'q':
11303 {
11304 // ========= quality ======
11305 if (cmd.startsWith("qual")) {
11306 // results are processed by calling routine
11307
11308 // default: '-v {e..}', worst edge visual error (eucl/hyp only)
11309 // '-n', NaN in some center or radius
11310 // '-r {e..}', worst edge relative error
11311 // '-o {f..}', orientation error
11312 // '-a {v..}', worst and average angle sum error
11313 // '-e {v..}', worst relative effective radius error, |rad - effrad|/rad.
11314 // lists default to 'all'
11315
11316 // only one flagSeg is allowed; handle default situations first
11317 items=null;
11318 char c='v'; // default to 'visual'
11319 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0 && (items=flagSegs.get(0))!=null &&
11320 items.size()>0 && StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0)))
11321 c=items.remove(0).charAt(1);
11322 if (items==null) {
11323 items=new Vector<String>();
11324 items.add("a"); // default to all
11325 }
11326
11327 switch(c) {
11328 case 'n':
11329 {
11330 for (int v=1;v<=packData.nodeCount;v++) {
11331 if (Double.isNaN(packData.getRadius(v))) {
11332 rtnCp = new CallPacket("qual");
11333 rtnCp.strValue="nr";
11334 rtnCp.int_vec = new Vector<Integer>(1);
11335 rtnCp.int_vec.add(Integer.valueOf(v));
11336 rtnCp.error=true;
11337 return rtnCp;
11338 }
11339 if (Complex.isNaN(packData.getCenter(v))) {
11340 rtnCp = new CallPacket("qual");
11341 rtnCp.strValue = "nc";
11342 rtnCp.int_vec = new Vector<Integer>();
11343 rtnCp.int_vec.add(Integer.valueOf(v));
11344 rtnCp.error=true;
11345 return rtnCp;
11346 }
11347 }
11348
11349 // reaching here, no NaN problems
11350 rtnCp = new CallPacket("qual");
11351 rtnCp.strValue="n";
11352 rtnCp.error=false;
11353 return rtnCp;
11354 }
11355 case 'o':
11356 {
11357 FaceLink flk=new FaceLink(packData,items);
11358 int f=QualMeasures.badOrientation(packData,flk);
11359 if (f<0)
11360 throw new CombException("orientation check ran into error");
11361 rtnCp = new CallPacket("qual");
11362 rtnCp.strValue="o";
11363 if (f==0) {
11364 rtnCp.error=false; // no problem faces
11365 return rtnCp;
11366 }
11367 rtnCp.int_vec=new Vector<Integer>(1);
11368 rtnCp.int_vec.add(Integer.valueOf(f));
11369 rtnCp.error=true;
11370 return rtnCp;
11371 }
11372 case 'a': // anglesum error
11373 {
11374 NodeLink nlink=new NodeLink(packData,items);
11375 double angsumerr=0.0;
11376 int vert=-1;
11377 packData.fillcurves();
11378 Iterator<Integer> nlst=nlink.iterator();
11379 while(nlst.hasNext()) {
11380 int v=nlst.next();
11381 if (packData.getAim(v)>0) {
11382 double diff=Math.abs(packData.getCurv(v)-packData.getAim(v));
11383 angsumerr=(diff>angsumerr) ? diff:angsumerr;
11384 vert=v;
11385 }
11386 }
11387 rtnCp = new CallPacket("qual");
11388 rtnCp.strValue="a";
11389 rtnCp.error=true; // no valid case found
11390 if (vert>0) {
11391 rtnCp.double_vec=new Vector<Double>(1);
11392 rtnCp.double_vec.add(Double.valueOf(angsumerr));
11393 rtnCp.int_vec=new Vector<Integer>(1);
11394 rtnCp.int_vec.add(Integer.valueOf(vert));
11395 rtnCp.error=false;
11396 }
11397 else
11398 CirclePack.cpb.msg("No angsum-aim comparisons could be computed");
11399 return rtnCp;
11400 }
11401 case 'e': // error in effective radii -- not yet implemented
11402 {
11403 rtnCp = new CallPacket("qual");
11404 rtnCp.strValue="e";
11405 rtnCp.error=false;
11406 return rtnCp;
11407 }
11408 case 'r':
11409 {
11410 rtnCp = new CallPacket("qual");
11411 rtnCp.strValue="r";
11412 EdgeLink elt=new EdgeLink(packData,items);
11413 if (packData.hes<0) { // keep only those with interior ends
11414 Iterator<EdgeSimple> els=elt.iterator();
11415 EdgeLink newelt=new EdgeLink(packData);
11416 while (els.hasNext()) {
11417 EdgeSimple edge=els.next();
11418 if (!packData.isBdry(edge.v) && !packData.isBdry(edge.w))
11419 newelt.add(edge);
11420 }
11421 elt=newelt;
11422 }
11423 if (elt.size()==0) {
11424 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Quality, relative error: no valid edges to compute");
11425 rtnCp.error=true;
11426 return rtnCp;
11427 }
11428 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
11429 EdgeSimple worstedge=QualMeasures.worst_rel_err(packData, elt, uP);
11430 if (worstedge==null)
11431 throw new DataException("exception in measuring visual error");
11432 rtnCp.int_vec = new Vector<Integer>(2);
11433 rtnCp.int_vec.add(Integer.valueOf(worstedge.v));
11434 rtnCp.int_vec.add(Integer.valueOf(worstedge.w));
11435 rtnCp.double_vec=new Vector<Double>(1);
11436 rtnCp.double_vec.add(Double.valueOf(uP.value));
11437 rtnCp.error=false;
11438 return rtnCp;
11439 }
11440 default: // 'v' for visual error
11441 {
11442 rtnCp = new CallPacket("qual");
11443 rtnCp.strValue="v";
11444 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
11445 HalfLink elt=new HalfLink(packData,items);
11446 HalfEdge worstedge=QualMeasures.visualErrMax(packData, elt, uP);
11447 if (worstedge==null)
11448 throw new DataException("error in measuring visual error");
11449 if (uP.rtnFlag<0) { // some radii too small?
11450 rtnCp.strValue="v -- some radii too small to use";
11451 }
11452 rtnCp.int_vec = new Vector<Integer>();
11453 rtnCp.int_vec.add(Integer.valueOf(worstedge.origin.vertIndx));
11454 rtnCp.int_vec.add(Integer.valueOf(worstedge.twin.origin.vertIndx));
11455 rtnCp.double_vec=new Vector<Double>(1);
11456 rtnCp.double_vec.add(Double.valueOf(uP.value));
11457 rtnCp.error=false;
11458 return rtnCp;
11459 }
11460 } // end of switch
11461
11462 } // end of 'qual' processing
11463
11464 break;
11465 }
11466
11467 } // end of switch
11468 } // end of calls needing packing
11469
11470 // ============ second: other commands (or earlier fall throughs) =====
11471 switch(cmd.charAt(0)) {
11472 case 'a':
11473 {
11474 break;
11475 }
11476 case '?': // return first string of query result,
11477 // and then only if it's a number or true/false.
11478 {
11479 String query=cmd.substring(1);
11480 if (query.length()<=0)
11481 return null;
11482
11483 // we only use first string from 'ans'
11484 String ans=StringUtil.grabNext(QueryParser.
11485 queryParse(packData, query, flagSegs, false));
11486 if (ans==null || ans.length()==0)
11487 return null;
11488
11489 // only return via 'strValue' if 'ans' represents a
11490 // double (or integer) or true/false.
11491 rtnCp=new CallPacket(query);
11492 try {
11493 Double.valueOf(ans); // if not a double, should throw exception here
11494 rtnCp.strValue=new String(ans);
11495 return rtnCp;
11496 } catch(Exception ex) {
11497 if (ans.equalsIgnoreCase("true") ||
11498 ans.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
11499 rtnCp.strValue=new String(ans);
11500 return rtnCp;
11501 }
11502 }
11503
11504 return null; // didn't get number or true/false
11505
11506 }
11507 } // end of switch
11508
11509 return rtnCp;
11510}
11511
